attributes.description: Primary business use case or campaign objective for this segment (e.g., acquisition, retention, cross-sell, upsell, win-back, personalization, A/B testing, churn prevention).
attributes.references: Marketing Automation Platform - Campaign Strategy Framework

attributes.name: version
attributes.description: Version identifier for the segment definition, enabling tracking of rule changes, A/B testing variants, and historical comparison (e.g., v1.0, v2.3, 2024-Q1).
attributes.references: Customer Data Platform - Segment Version Control

attributes.name: created_by
attributes.description: User identifier or email of the person who created the segment definition. Used for audit trail and accountability.
attributes.references: Customer Data Platform - Audit Trail Standards

products.name: preference
products.description: Customer preference and communication opt-in/opt-out record capturing explicit customer choices for personalization, notifications, and marketing communications. Stores preference category (email marketing, SMS, push notification, personalized recommendations, third-party data sharing, cookie consent), preference value (opted-in, opted-out, not-set), channel, preference source (customer self-service, agent-set, import), effective date, expiry date, and last updated timestamp. GDPR and CCPA compliance anchor — this is the SSOT for consent and preference management.
products.reference: Consent and Preference Management / GDPR Consent Record

attributes.name: preference_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the customer preference record. Primary key.

attributes.name: customer_profile_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the customer who owns this preference. Links to the customer master record in the Customer Data Platform.
attributes.references: Customer Data Platform - Unified Customer Profile

attributes.name: marketing_campaign_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the marketing campaign that triggered or is associated with this preference capture. Nullable if the preference was not captured in the context of a specific campaign. Links to campaign performance analysis.
attributes.references: Marketing Automation Platform - Salesforce Marketing Cloud (Campaign Management)

attributes.name: parent_preference_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the parent preference record if this preference is a channel-specific override of a global preference. Nullable for top-level global preferences. Enables hierarchical preference inheritance.
attributes.references: Customer Data Platform - Preference Hierarchy Management

attributes.name: preferred_brand_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.brand. Business justification: Brand preferences drive personalized homepage recommendations, email campaigns, and search ranking in e-commerce. Distinct from item-level preference (preferred_catalog_item_id already exists). A pers

attributes.name: preferred_catalog_item_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.catalog_item. Business justification: Supports personalized recommendation engine: captures a customer's explicit preference for a specific catalog item.

attributes.name: preferred_category_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.category. Business justification: Category preferences (e.g., 'prefers Electronics, Sports') are a foundational personalization signal used in recommendation engines, browse personalization, and targeted email campaigns. Distinct from

attributes.name: promotional_campaign_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to pricing.promotional_campaign. Business justification: Customers opt in or out of specific promotional campaigns (GDPR-compliant promotional pricing consent). Linking preference to promotional_campaign enables the pricing engine to check customer consent

attributes.name: channel
attributes.description: The channel through which this preference applies or was captured. Enables channel-specific preference management and omnichannel consent orchestration.
attributes.references: Marketing Automation Platform - Salesforce Marketing Cloud (Channel Management)

attributes.name: consent_text
attributes.description: The full text of the consent statement or privacy notice that was presented to the customer at the time of preference capture. Stored for regulatory audit and proof of consent.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 7 (Demonstrating Consent), CCPA Section 1798.100 (Notice Requirements)

attributes.name: consent_version
attributes.description: The version identifier of the consent text or privacy policy that the customer agreed to when setting this preference. Enables audit trail of consent changes over time.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 7 (Demonstrating Consent), CCPA Section 1798.100 (Notice Requirements)

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp when this preference record was first created in the system. Establishes the initial consent capture time for regulatory compliance and audit purposes.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 7 (Demonstrating Consent), SOX (Sarbanes-Oxley Act) - Audit Trail

attributes.name: data_retention_period_days
attributes.description: Number of days this preference record and associated consent data must be retained for regulatory compliance and audit purposes. Used to enforce data retention policies and right to erasure.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 5 (Storage Limitation), CCPA Section 1798.105 (Right to Deletion)

attributes.name: device_code
attributes.description: Unique identifier of the device from which the preference was set. Used for device-level consent tracking and cross-device preference synchronization.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 4 (Definition of Personal Data), PCI DSS (Device Identification)

attributes.name: double_opt_in_confirmed
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the customer has confirmed their opt-in preference through a double opt-in process (e.g., email confirmation link). Required for certain marketing channels under GDPR.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 7 (Conditions for Consent), Marketing Automation Platform - Double Opt-In Workflow

attributes.name: double_opt_in_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp when the customer confirmed their opt-in preference through the double opt-in process. Nullable if double opt-in is not required or not yet completed.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 7 (Demonstrating Consent), Marketing Automation Platform - Double Opt-In Workflow

attributes.name: effective_date
attributes.description: The date from which this preference becomes active and enforceable. Used for time-bound consent management and regulatory compliance reporting.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 7 (Conditions for Consent), CCPA Section 1798.135

attributes.name: expiry_date
attributes.description: The date on which this preference expires and is no longer valid. Nullable for preferences with indefinite duration. Supports time-limited consent and periodic re-consent workflows.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 7 (Withdrawal of Consent), CCPA Section 1798.135

attributes.name: frequency_cap
attributes.description: Maximum number of communications allowed per time period for this preference category. Used to enforce customer-specified communication frequency limits and prevent over-messaging.

attributes.name: frequency_period
attributes.description: The time period over which the frequency cap applies. Defines the window for counting communications against the frequency cap.

attributes.name: hash
attributes.description: Cryptographic hash of the preference record content. Used for tamper detection, data integrity verification, and proof of consent immutability for regulatory audit.
attributes.references: ISO 27001 (Information Security Management), NIST Cybersecurity Framework (Data Integrity)

attributes.name: ip_address
attributes.description: The IP address from which the preference was set. Captured for fraud detection, audit trail, and proof of consent. May be considered PII under GDPR in certain jurisdictions.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 4 (Definition of Personal Data), NIST Cybersecurity Framework

attributes.name: is_global_preference
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this preference applies globally across all channels and touchpoints, or is specific to a single channel. Supports hierarchical preference management.
attributes.references: Customer Data Platform - Unified Preference Orchestration

attributes.name: jurisdiction
attributes.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code representing the legal jurisdiction under which this preference was captured. Used for jurisdiction-specific consent rules and regulatory reporting.
attributes.references: ISO 3166-1 (Country Codes), GDPR (EU Jurisdiction), CCPA (California Jurisdiction)

attributes.name: language_code
attributes.description: ISO 639-2 three-letter language code indicating the language in which the consent was presented and captured. Supports multilingual consent management and regulatory compliance.

attributes.name: last_modified_by
attributes.description: Identifier of the user or system that last modified this preference record. Used for audit trail and accountability.
attributes.references: SOX (Sarbanes-Oxley Act) - Internal Controls, ISO 27001 (Information Security Management)

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp when this preference record was last updated. Critical for audit trail, consent history tracking, and regulatory compliance reporting.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 7 (Demonstrating Consent), SOX (Sarbanes-Oxley Act) - Audit Trail

attributes.name: legal_basis
attributes.description: The GDPR Article 6 legal basis under which this preference and associated data processing is justified. Critical for GDPR compliance and regulatory audit.

attributes.name: notes
attributes.description: Free-text field for additional notes or context about this preference record. Used by customer service agents to document special circumstances or customer requests.
attributes.references: Customer Data Platform - Preference Management Module

attributes.name: preference_category
attributes.description: The category or type of preference being captured. Defines the communication channel or data usage purpose for which consent is being managed.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 6 (Lawful Basis), CCPA Section 1798.120 (Right to Opt-Out)

attributes.name: preference_source
attributes.description: The origin or method by which this preference was captured. Indicates whether the preference was set by the customer directly, by a customer service agent, imported from an external system, or defaulted by the system.
attributes.references: Customer Data Platform - Preference Management Module

attributes.name: preference_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of this preference record. Indicates whether the preference is currently in effect, has expired, been superseded by a newer preference, or revoked by the customer.
attributes.references: Customer Data Platform - Preference Management Module

attributes.name: preference_value
attributes.description: The explicit choice made by the customer for this preference category. Indicates whether the customer has consented to or declined the specific communication or data usage.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 7 (Conditions for Consent), CCPA Section 1798.135 (Right to Opt-Out)

attributes.name: right_to_be_forgotten_requested
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the customer has exercised their GDPR Article 17 right to erasure (right to be forgotten) for this preference and associated data. Triggers data deletion workflows.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 17 (Right to Erasure), CCPA Section 1798.105 (Right to Deletion)

attributes.name: right_to_be_forgotten_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp when the customer requested their right to be forgotten. Nullable if no such request has been made. Used for compliance tracking and audit trail.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 17 (Right to Erasure), CCPA Section 1798.105 (Right to Deletion)

attributes.name: score
attributes.description: Calculated score representing the strength or confidence of this preference based on customer behavior, engagement history, and preference consistency. Used for predictive personalization and preference inference.
attributes.references: Customer Data Platform - Behavioral Analytics and Preference Scoring

attributes.name: suppression_category
attributes.description: Categorical classification of the suppression reason. Enables structured analysis of opt-out patterns and compliance reporting.

attributes.name: suppression_reason
attributes.description: Free-text field capturing the reason why a customer opted out or was suppressed from communications. Used for customer service insights and preference analysis.
attributes.references: Customer Data Platform - Preference Management Module

attributes.name: third_party_sharing_partners
attributes.description: Comma-separated list of third-party partner identifiers with whom the customer has consented to share their data. Used for granular third-party data sharing consent management under GDPR and CCPA.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 6 (Lawful Basis for Third-Party Sharing), CCPA Section 1798.120 (Right to Opt-Out of Sale)

attributes.name: user_agent
attributes.description: The user agent string of the browser or application from which the preference was set. Provides technical context for audit and troubleshooting.

products.name: consent_event
products.description: Immutable audit log of every consent change event for a customer, required for GDPR Article 7 and CCPA compliance. Stores event type (consent-given, consent-withdrawn, consent-updated, data-deletion-requested, data-portability-requested), consent category, prior value, new value, event timestamp, collection method (web form, mobile app, call center, email link), IP address at time of consent, user agent string, legal basis (legitimate interest, contract, consent), and processing purpose. This is the regulatory evidence trail for consent lifecycle.
products.reference: GDPR Consent Audit / CCPA Opt-Out Record

attributes.name: consent_event_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for each consent event record. Primary key for the consent event log.

attributes.name: parent_consent_event_id
attributes.description: Reference to a previous consent event that this event modifies or supersedes. Enables tracking of consent change chains and audit trail reconstruction.

attributes.name: seller_profile_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to seller.seller_profile. Business justification: GDPR/CCPA require tracking customer consent per data processor. In marketplace e-commerce, individual sellers are separate data controllers/processors. consent_event.seller_profile_id identifies which

attributes.name: collection_method
attributes.description: Channel or interface through which the consent event was captured. Identifies the touchpoint where the customer interacted with consent management.

attributes.name: communication_language
attributes.description: Two-letter ISO 639-1 language code representing the language in which the consent was presented and captured. Ensures consent was obtained in the customer's preferred language.

attributes.name: consent_category
attributes.description: Category of consent or preference being managed. Defines the specific processing purpose or communication channel covered by this consent event.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 6(1)(a), GDPR Article 7, CCPA Section 1798.100(b)

attributes.name: consent_scope
attributes.description: Geographic or operational scope to which this consent applies. Defines the boundaries of consent applicability across different jurisdictions or business units.

attributes.name: consent_text
attributes.description: The exact consent language or terms that were displayed to the customer at the time of consent. Provides evidence of what the customer agreed to for regulatory audits.

attributes.name: consent_version
attributes.description: Version identifier of the consent policy or terms and conditions that were presented to the customer at the time of this event. Enables tracking of policy changes over time.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: System timestamp when this consent event record was first created in the data platform. Used for data lineage and audit trail purposes.

attributes.name: customer_email
attributes.description: Email address of the customer at the time of the consent event. Captured for verification and communication purposes in consent lifecycle management.

attributes.name: data_retention_period_days
attributes.description: Number of days that data will be retained under this consent. Used to enforce data minimization principles and automated data deletion policies.

attributes.name: device_code
attributes.description: Unique identifier of the device (mobile, tablet, desktop) from which the consent event was initiated. Used for cross-device consent tracking and fraud prevention.

attributes.name: event_timestamp
attributes.description: Precise date and time when the consent event occurred, in ISO 8601 format (yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX). This is the authoritative timestamp for regulatory audit trails.

attributes.name: event_type
attributes.description: Type of consent event that occurred. Categorizes the nature of the customer's action for regulatory reporting and lifecycle tracking.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 7, GDPR Article 15, GDPR Article 17, GDPR Article 20, CCPA Section 1798.105

attributes.name: expiration_date
attributes.description: Date when this consent is set to expire and require renewal. Used for time-bound consent management and automated re-consent workflows.

attributes.name: geolocation_country
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO country code representing the geographic location from which the consent event originated. Used for jurisdiction-specific compliance reporting.
attributes.references: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3, GDPR Article 3, CCPA Section 1798.140

attributes.name: geolocation_region
attributes.description: State, province, or region from which the consent event originated. Provides additional geographic context for jurisdiction-specific privacy laws (e.g., CCPA for California).

attributes.name: ip_address
attributes.description: Internet Protocol address of the device from which the consent event was initiated. Used for fraud detection and regulatory evidence of consent origin.

attributes.name: is_minor
attributes.description: Indicates whether the customer was identified as a minor (under age of consent) at the time of this event. Critical for GDPR Article 8 and COPPA compliance.

attributes.name: legal_basis
attributes.description: The lawful basis under which personal data processing is justified for this consent event. Required for GDPR Article 6 compliance and regulatory reporting.

attributes.name: new_value
attributes.description: The consent status after this event was applied. Represents the current state resulting from the customer's action.

attributes.name: notes
attributes.description: Free-text notes or comments associated with this consent event. May include customer service representative notes for call center-originated events or system-generated messages.

attributes.name: opt_out_sale_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the customer has exercised their right to opt out of the sale of personal information under CCPA. Must be honored across all business processes.

attributes.name: parental_consent_required
attributes.description: Indicates whether parental or guardian consent was required for this event due to the customer being a minor. Used for COPPA and GDPR Article 8 compliance tracking.

attributes.name: parental_consent_verified
attributes.description: Indicates whether parental or guardian consent was successfully verified for this event. Critical for processing consent events for minors under COPPA and GDPR.

attributes.name: prior_value
attributes.description: The consent status before this event occurred. Captures the previous state to enable audit trail reconstruction and change tracking.

attributes.name: processing_completed_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the consent event was fully processed and applied across all relevant systems. Used to measure compliance with GDPR's one-month response requirement.

attributes.name: processing_purpose
attributes.description: Detailed description of the specific purpose for which personal data will be processed under this consent. Must be explicit and granular per GDPR requirements.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 5(1)(b), GDPR Article 13(1)(c), CCPA Section 1798.100(b)

attributes.name: processing_status
attributes.description: Current processing status of the consent event. Tracks whether the event has been successfully applied to downstream systems and customer profiles.

attributes.name: session_code
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the user session during which the consent event occurred. Enables correlation with other user actions in the same session for behavioral analysis.

attributes.name: source_system
attributes.description: Name or identifier of the system that originated this consent event record. Identifies the operational system of record for data lineage and troubleshooting.

attributes.name: third_party_sharing_allowed
attributes.description: Indicates whether the customer has consented to sharing their personal data with third parties. Critical for CCPA 'Do Not Sell' compliance and GDPR Article 6 lawful basis.

attributes.name: user_agent
attributes.description: Browser or application user agent string at the time of consent. Provides technical context about the device and software used for the consent action.

attributes.name: verification_method
attributes.description: Method used to verify the identity of the customer before processing the consent event. Critical for data deletion and portability requests to prevent fraud.

attributes.name: verification_status
attributes.description: Status of identity verification for this consent event. Indicates whether the customer's identity was successfully confirmed before processing the request.

products.name: wishlist
products.description: Customer wishlist representing products explicitly saved for future consideration. Stores wishlist header: name, type (personal, gift-registry, shared), visibility setting, creation date, sharing URL, expiry date for gift registries. Owns individual line items: each item records SKU reference, product name at save time, price at save time, current price, price change indicator, availability status, priority rank, customer notes, date added, date removed, and notification preferences for price drops and back-in-stock alerts. Supports personalization, re-engagement campaigns, and gift registry workflows. Distinct from cart (active purchase intent) — wishlist represents longer-term interest signals and demand forecasting inputs.

attributes.name: wishlist_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the wishlist. Primary key.

attributes.name: brand_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.brand. Business justification: Brand-curated wishlists (e.g., 'My Nike Collection', brand gift registries) are a real e-commerce feature enabling brand-specific marketing outreach and conversion campaigns. Retailers use brand-scope

attributes.name: category_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.category. Business justification: Category-scoped wishlists (e.g., 'My Electronics Wishlist', 'Baby Registry - Clothing') are a standard e-commerce feature. Category association enables back-in-stock notifications by category, categor

attributes.name: customer_profile_id
attributes.description: Reference to the customer who owns this wishlist. Links to the customer master record in the Customer Data Platform.
attributes.references: Customer Data Platform - Unified Customer Profile

attributes.name: marketplace_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to marketplace.marketplace. Business justification: In multi-marketplace platforms, wishlists are marketplace-scoped: sharing URLs, currency display, and item availability are marketplace-specific. Operational reports on wishlist conversion rates and c

attributes.name: archived_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the wishlist was archived by the customer or system. Null if never archived. Supports lifecycle reporting and data retention policies.

attributes.name: conversion_count
attributes.description: Number of items from this wishlist that have been purchased by the owner or gift contributors. Measures wishlist effectiveness and purchase intent conversion.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the wishlist was first created by the customer. Immutable. Used for lifecycle analytics and customer engagement measurement.

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for all monetary values in this wishlist (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP). Supports multi-currency e-commerce operations.

attributes.name: deleted_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the wishlist was soft-deleted. Null if active. Supports GDPR right-to-erasure and data retention compliance. Hard deletion occurs after retention period.

attributes.name: event_date
attributes.description: Target date for gift registries (wedding date, baby due date, birthday). Used to trigger expiration logic and prioritize gift-giving urgency. Null for non-event wishlists.
attributes.references: E-Commerce Industry Standard - Gift Registry Management

attributes.name: expiry_date
attributes.description: Date when the wishlist automatically transitions to expired status. Typically set for gift registries (e.g., 90 days post-event). Null for permanent wishlists.

attributes.name: is_default
attributes.description: Indicates whether this is the customer's default wishlist. When a customer adds an item without specifying a wishlist, it goes to the default. Only one wishlist per customer can be default.

attributes.name: item_count
attributes.description: Total number of active line items currently in the wishlist. Excludes removed or purchased items. Updated in real-time as items are added or removed.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the wishlist metadata (name, type, visibility, preferences) was last updated. Excludes line item changes. Used for audit and sync purposes.

attributes.name: last_viewed_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the customer last opened or viewed this wishlist. Used for engagement scoring and re-engagement campaign targeting.

attributes.name: notes
attributes.description: Free-form internal notes or metadata about the wishlist. May include customer service annotations, special handling instructions, or system-generated insights. Not visible to customer.

attributes.name: notification_back_in_stock_enabled
attributes.description: Customer preference flag indicating whether to send notifications when out-of-stock items in this wishlist become available again. Drives conversion from latent demand.

attributes.name: notification_event_reminder_enabled
attributes.description: Customer preference flag for gift registries indicating whether to send reminders as the event date approaches. Helps drive gift purchases from registry contributors.

attributes.name: notification_price_drop_enabled
attributes.description: Customer preference flag indicating whether to send notifications when any item in this wishlist experiences a price reduction. Supports re-engagement campaigns.

attributes.name: priority_rank
attributes.description: Customer-assigned priority ranking for this wishlist relative to other wishlists owned by the same customer. Lower numbers indicate higher priority. Used for personalization and recommendation engines.

attributes.name: privacy_consent_marketing
attributes.description: Customer consent flag indicating permission to use wishlist data for personalized marketing campaigns (price drop alerts, recommendations, promotions). Required under GDPR and CCPA.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 6 - Lawfulness of Processing, CCPA Section 1798.100

attributes.name: privacy_consent_sharing
attributes.description: Customer consent flag indicating explicit permission to share wishlist data with third parties (e.g., gift registry partners, social media). Required under GDPR and CCPA.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 6 - Lawfulness of Processing, CCPA Section 1798.100

attributes.name: registry_completion_percentage
attributes.description: For gift registries, the percentage of items that have been purchased by contributors. Calculated as (purchased_items / total_items) * 100. Null for non-registry wishlists.
attributes.references: E-Commerce Industry Standard - Gift Registry Management

attributes.name: share_count
attributes.description: Number of times the wishlist sharing URL has been generated or distributed. Tracks viral/social engagement for gift registries.

attributes.name: sharing_token
attributes.description: Secure token embedded in sharing URL for access control. Prevents unauthorized access to shared wishlists. Regenerated if sharing is disabled and re-enabled.

attributes.name: sharing_url
attributes.description: Unique shareable URL for gift registries and shared wishlists. Enables customers to distribute wishlist access to friends and family without requiring account login.

attributes.name: source_channel
attributes.description: Channel through which the wishlist was originally created (web browser, mobile app, API integration, customer service agent). Used for channel attribution and UX optimization.

attributes.name: source_device_type
attributes.description: Device type used when the wishlist was created. Supports device-specific personalization and responsive design optimization.

attributes.name: total_current_value
attributes.description: Sum of all item prices at current market rates. Recalculated nightly or on-demand. Enables price drop alerts and conversion optimization. Currency is USD unless otherwise specified.

attributes.name: total_value_at_save
attributes.business_glossary_term: Total Wishlist Value at Save Time
attributes.description: Sum of all item prices at the time they were added to the wishlist. Provides baseline for price change tracking and demand forecasting. Currency is USD unless otherwise specified.

attributes.name: view_count_by_others
attributes.description: Number of times the wishlist has been viewed by users other than the owner (gift contributors, shared link recipients). Measures gift registry engagement.

attributes.name: visibility
attributes.description: Access control setting for the wishlist. Private: only owner can view; Public: discoverable by others; Shared Link: accessible via unique URL.

attributes.name: wishlist_description
attributes.description: Optional customer-provided description or notes about the wishlist purpose, occasion, or preferences. Supports gift registry messaging and personalization.

attributes.name: wishlist_name
attributes.description: Customer-defined name for the wishlist (e.g., 'Birthday Gifts', 'Home Office Setup', 'Wedding Registry'). Enables customers to organize multiple wishlists by purpose.

attributes.name: wishlist_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle state of the wishlist. Active: in use; Archived: preserved but inactive; Expired: past event date for registries; Deleted: soft-deleted pending purge.

attributes.name: wishlist_type
attributes.description: Classification of the wishlist purpose. Personal wishlists are private shopping lists; gift registries are shared for events (weddings, baby showers); shared wishlists allow collaborative curation. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: personal|gift_registry|shared|wedding_registry|baby_registry|holiday|wishlist — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

products.name: wishlist_item
products.description: This association product represents the relationship between a customer wishlist and a catalog item. It captures when an item was added to a wishlist, the desired quantity, priority ranking, and any user notes. Each record links one wishlist to one catalog item and stores data that belongs only to the association.. Existence Justification: Customers actively create and manage wishlists, adding multiple catalog items to each wishlist. Each catalog item can appear in many different customers' wishlists. The platform records attributes such as when an item was added, desired quantity, priority, and user notes, making the association a managed business entity.

attributes.name: wishlist_item_id
attributes.description: Primary key for the wishlist_item association

attributes.name: bundle_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.bundle. Business justification: Customers add product bundles (gift sets, starter kits) to wishlists for gift registries and deferred purchase. Bundle wishlist items support bundle promotion conversion tracking and gift registry ful

attributes.name: catalog_item_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to the catalog item

attributes.name: marketplace_listing_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to marketplace.marketplace_listing. Business justification: Price-drop and back-in-stock notification workflows require knowing which specific marketplace listing a wishlist item references — including seller, condition, and current price. E-commerce platforms

attributes.name: sku_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.sku. Business justification: Customers save specific SKU variants (size, color) to wishlists — not just generic catalog items. SKU-level wishlist items enable precise back-in-stock alerts, accurate inventory-driven conversion nud

attributes.name: wishlist_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to the wishlist

attributes.name: added_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the item was added to the wishlist

attributes.name: notes
attributes.description: Free‑form notes the customer adds for the item

attributes.name: priority_rank
attributes.description: Customer-assigned priority for this item within the wishlist

attributes.name: quantity
attributes.description: Desired quantity of the catalog item in the wishlist

domains.name: product
domains.description: Authoritative source for the entire product catalog, SKU master data, product attributes, digital assets, taxonomy, and product lifecycle management. Manages UPC, EAN, ASIN identifiers, PDP and PLP content, product enrichment, variants, cross-sell/upsell relationships, and CPSC compliance metadata. Integrates with PIM systems for catalog governance.
domains.references: Product Information Management System (PIM), GS1 Standards, ISO 8000, CPSC

products.name: catalog_item
products.description: Core master entity representing a sellable product in the e-commerce catalog. Serves as the authoritative SKU master record, capturing product identity, UPC/EAN/ASIN identifiers, brand, manufacturer, model number, product type, lifecycle status (active, discontinued, draft, archived), launch date, end-of-life date, and PIM system source reference. This is the SSOT for all product identity data across the platform.

attributes.name: catalog_item_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the catalog item. Primary key for the product catalog master record.

attributes.name: brand_id
attributes.description: FK to product.brand

attributes.name: carrier_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to logistics.carrier. Business justification: Preferred carrier for this catalog item; required for carrier compliance checks and shipping cost estimation reports.

attributes.name: category_id
attributes.description: FK to product.product_category

attributes.name: legal_entity_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.legal_entity. Business justification: Multi-entity e-commerce compliance: catalog items are owned/sold by a specific legal entity for cross-border VAT, customs duty, and intercompany transfer pricing. Regulatory requirement — tax authorit

attributes.name: primary_seller_profile_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to seller.seller_profile. Business justification: REQUIRED: Default Seller Assignment for catalog items, needed for pricing, fulfillment routing and sales reporting; obvious to marketplace operators.

attributes.name: asin
attributes.description: 10-character alphanumeric unique identifier used for product catalog management in Amazon-style marketplaces.

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: Primary color or color variant of the product, used for product differentiation, filtering, and variant management.

attributes.name: country_of_origin
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO country code indicating where the product was manufactured or assembled, required for customs, tariffs, and trade compliance.

attributes.name: cpsc_compliance_status
attributes.business_glossary_term: Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) Compliance Status
attributes.description: Indicates whether the product meets CPSC safety standards and regulations, critical for product safety compliance and recall management.
attributes.references: Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) - Product Safety Standards

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this catalog item record was first created in the system, used for audit trail and data lineage tracking.

attributes.name: ean
attributes.description: 13-digit international product identifier used globally for retail scanning and supply chain tracking.

attributes.name: end_of_life_date
attributes.description: The date when the product will be or was discontinued and removed from active catalog, used for inventory planning and clearance strategies.

attributes.name: height_cm
attributes.description: Product height dimension in centimeters, used for packaging, shipping, and warehouse storage optimization.

attributes.name: hs_code
attributes.description: International standardized system of names and numbers for classifying traded products, used for customs clearance, tariff calculation, and international trade compliance.

attributes.name: is_age_restricted
attributes.description: Indicates whether the product has age restrictions for purchase (e.g., alcohol, tobacco, mature content), requiring age verification at checkout.
attributes.references: Federal Trade Commission (FTC) - Consumer Protection Standards

attributes.name: is_hazardous_material
attributes.description: Indicates whether the product is classified as hazardous material requiring special handling, shipping restrictions, and compliance documentation per CPSC and DOT regulations.
attributes.references: Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) - Hazardous Substances Act

attributes.name: is_returnable
attributes.description: Indicates whether the product is eligible for return under the standard Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA) policy.
attributes.references: Federal Trade Commission (FTC) - Consumer Protection Standards

attributes.name: is_taxable
attributes.description: Indicates whether the product is subject to sales tax, VAT, or other consumption taxes in applicable jurisdictions.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this catalog item record was last updated, used for change tracking, data freshness monitoring, and incremental ETL processing.

attributes.name: launch_date
attributes.description: The date when the product was first made available for sale on the platform, used for new product performance tracking and lifecycle analytics.

attributes.name: length_cm
attributes.description: Product length dimension in centimeters, used for packaging, shipping, and warehouse storage optimization.

attributes.name: lifecycle_status
attributes.description: Current state of the product in its lifecycle. Active products are available for sale, discontinued products are phased out, draft products are under development, archived products are historical records.

attributes.name: manufacturer_name
attributes.description: The legal name of the company that manufactures the product, used for supplier management and compliance tracking.

attributes.name: manufacturer_part_number
attributes.description: The unique part number assigned by the manufacturer, used for warranty claims, technical support, and supplier coordination.

attributes.name: material_composition
attributes.description: Description of the materials used in the product construction (e.g., 100% Cotton, Stainless Steel), used for product specifications and compliance labeling.
attributes.references: Federal Trade Commission (FTC) - Textile and Fiber Identification

attributes.name: minimum_age_requirement
attributes.description: The minimum age in years required to purchase this product, enforced during checkout for age-restricted items.
attributes.references: Federal Trade Commission (FTC) - Consumer Protection Standards

attributes.name: model_number
attributes.description: The specific model identifier assigned by the manufacturer, used for product differentiation and technical specifications lookup.

attributes.name: pim_source_code
attributes.description: Unique identifier of this product in the source PIM system, used for data lineage and system integration reconciliation.

attributes.name: pim_source_system
attributes.description: Name of the Product Information Management system that is the authoritative source for this catalog item master data.

attributes.name: product_name
attributes.description: The primary display name of the product shown on Product Detail Pages (PDP) and Product Listing Pages (PLP). Used for customer-facing search and discovery.

attributes.name: product_subcategory
attributes.description: Granular subcategory classification within the product taxonomy, enabling precise product discovery and merchandising strategies.

attributes.name: product_title
attributes.description: Extended product title optimized for Search Engine Optimization (SEO) and Search Engine Marketing (SEM), including key attributes and brand information.

attributes.name: product_type
attributes.description: High-level classification of the product category (e.g., Electronics, Apparel, Home & Garden), used for catalog organization and merchandising.

attributes.name: return_window_days
attributes.description: Number of days from delivery date within which the customer can initiate a return under the RMA policy.
attributes.references: Federal Trade Commission (FTC) - Consumer Protection Standards

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Size designation of the product (e.g., Small, Medium, Large, or numeric sizes), used for apparel, footwear, and size-variant products.

attributes.name: sku
attributes.description: Unique alphanumeric identifier for the product used across inventory, order management, and fulfillment systems. The authoritative SKU master identifier.

attributes.name: tax_code
attributes.description: Tax classification code used to determine applicable sales tax, VAT, or GST rates for the product in different jurisdictions.

attributes.name: upc
attributes.description: 12-digit barcode identifier used for retail scanning and inventory tracking in North America.

attributes.name: warranty_duration_months
attributes.description: Duration of the manufacturer or seller warranty in months, used for warranty claim validation and customer service.

attributes.name: warranty_type
attributes.description: Type of warranty coverage provided with the product (manufacturer warranty, seller warranty, extended warranty, or no warranty).

attributes.name: weight_kg
attributes.description: Product weight in kilograms, used for shipping cost calculation, carrier selection, and warehouse capacity planning.

attributes.name: width_cm
attributes.description: Product width dimension in centimeters, used for packaging, shipping, and warehouse storage optimization.

products.name: sku
products.description: Stock Keeping Unit record representing a specific, orderable variant of a catalog item. Captures the unique SKU code, variant dimensions (size, color, material, style), sellable unit of measure, weight, dimensions (length, width, height), packaging type, hazmat flag, age restriction flag, country of origin, and fulfillment eligibility flags (FBA-eligible, BOPIS-eligible, DTC-eligible). Each SKU maps to exactly one catalog item and is the atomic unit tracked by inventory and order systems.

attributes.name: sku_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the SKU record. Primary key.

attributes.name: catalog_item_id
attributes.description: Reference to the parent catalog item. Each SKU maps to exactly one catalog product.

attributes.name: inventory_general_ledger_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.general_ledger. Business justification: Needed for inventory valuation accounting; each SKU posts inventory movements to its specific GL account for COGS and stock balance.

attributes.name: legal_entity_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.legal_entity. Business justification: SKU-level legal entity ownership drives customs declarations, import duty calculations, and intercompany transfer pricing in cross-border e-commerce. The sellable unit (SKU) may belong to a different

attributes.name: owner_seller_profile_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to seller.seller_profile. Business justification: REQUIRED: Seller SKU Ownership links each SKU to its owning seller for inventory, compliance and fulfillment decisions; standard in multi‑seller marketplaces.

attributes.name: supplier_id
attributes.description: Reference to the primary supplier or vendor for this SKU.

attributes.name: age_restriction_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this SKU has age verification requirements (e.g., alcohol, tobacco, adult content).
attributes.references: Federal Trade Commission (FTC) Consumer Protection Standards

attributes.name: asin
attributes.description: 10-character alphanumeric unique identifier used for product identification in Amazon-style marketplaces.

attributes.name: bopis_eligible_flag
attributes.business_glossary_term: Buy Online Pick Up In Store (BOPIS) Eligible Flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this SKU is eligible for buy online, pick up in store fulfillment.

attributes.name: country_of_origin
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO country code indicating where this SKU was manufactured or produced.

attributes.name: cpsc_compliant_flag
attributes.business_glossary_term: Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) Compliant Flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this SKU meets CPSC product safety standards and testing requirements.

attributes.name: cpsc_tracking_label
attributes.business_glossary_term: Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) Tracking Label
attributes.description: CPSC-required tracking label containing manufacturer, production date, batch, and cohort information for children's products.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this SKU record was first created in the system.

attributes.name: discontinuation_date
attributes.description: Date when this SKU was discontinued and removed from active catalog. Null for active SKUs.

attributes.name: dtc_eligible_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this SKU is eligible for direct-to-consumer shipping from distribution centers.

attributes.name: ean
attributes.description: 13-digit European Article Number for international product identification and barcode scanning.

attributes.name: fba_eligible_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this SKU is eligible for FBA-style fulfillment services (stored in marketplace fulfillment centers).

attributes.name: hazmat_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this SKU is classified as hazardous material requiring special handling and shipping restrictions.
attributes.references: US Department of Transportation (DOT) Hazmat Regulations

attributes.name: height_cm
attributes.description: Height dimension of the SKU in centimeters, used for packaging and shipping optimization.

attributes.name: launch_date
attributes.description: Date when this SKU was first made available for sale.

attributes.name: length_cm
attributes.description: Length dimension of the SKU in centimeters, used for packaging and shipping optimization.

attributes.name: lot_controlled_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this SKU is tracked by lot or batch number for quality control and traceability.

attributes.name: manufacturer_part_number
attributes.description: Manufacturer's unique part number for this SKU, used for supplier ordering and warranty claims.

attributes.name: minimum_age_years
attributes.description: Minimum age in years required to purchase this SKU. Null if no age restriction applies.
attributes.references: Federal Trade Commission (FTC) Consumer Protection Standards

attributes.name: modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this SKU record was last modified.

attributes.name: moq
attributes.description: Minimum order quantity required when purchasing this SKU from the supplier.

attributes.name: packaging_type
attributes.description: Type of packaging required for this SKU (e.g., standard, fragile, oversized, gift wrap, bulk, refrigerated).

attributes.name: perishable_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this SKU is perishable and requires temperature-controlled storage and expedited fulfillment.

attributes.name: serialized_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether each unit of this SKU is tracked by unique serial number for warranty, recall, or anti-counterfeiting purposes.

attributes.name: shelf_life_days
attributes.description: Number of days this SKU remains sellable from receipt date. Null for non-perishable items.

attributes.name: sku_code
attributes.description: Unique alphanumeric code identifying this specific sellable variant. The atomic unit tracked by inventory and order systems.

attributes.name: sku_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the SKU (active, inactive, discontinued, pending approval, blocked, seasonal).

attributes.name: unit_of_measure
attributes.description: Sellable unit of measure for this SKU (e.g., each, case, pack, box). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: each|case|pack|box|pallet|dozen|pair|set — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: upc
attributes.description: 12-digit Universal Product Code for North American retail scanning and inventory tracking.

attributes.name: variant_color
attributes.description: Color dimension of the variant (e.g., Blue, Red, Black, Navy).

attributes.name: variant_material
attributes.description: Material composition of the variant (e.g., Cotton, Polyester, Leather, Stainless Steel).

attributes.name: variant_name
attributes.description: Human-readable name describing this specific variant (e.g., 'Blue Cotton T-Shirt - Size M').

attributes.name: variant_size
attributes.description: Size dimension of the variant (e.g., S, M, L, XL, 32x34, 10.5).

attributes.name: variant_style
attributes.description: Style or design dimension of the variant (e.g., Crew Neck, V-Neck, Slim Fit, Classic).

attributes.name: weight_kg
attributes.description: Weight of the SKU in kilograms, used for shipping cost calculation and carrier selection.

attributes.name: width_cm
attributes.description: Width dimension of the SKU in centimeters, used for packaging and shipping optimization.

products.name: category
products.description: Hierarchical taxonomy node defining the classification structure for the product catalog. Stores category name, category code, parent category reference (for tree traversal), depth level, full path string, display order, SEO slug, meta title, meta description, is_leaf flag, and active status. Supports multi-level category trees (e.g., Electronics > Smartphones > Android Phones) used for PLP navigation, search faceting, and catalog governance.

attributes.name: category_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the product category node in the hierarchical taxonomy. Primary key.

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Budgeting and expense allocation per product category uses a cost center; linking enables category‑level cost tracking in financial reports.

attributes.name: parent_category_id
attributes.description: Reference to the parent category node in the hierarchy. Null for root-level categories. Enables tree traversal and multi-level category structures.

attributes.name: profit_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Category profit center assignment: e-commerce category managers are accountable for category-level P&L. Profit center assignment to category enables management reporting, category margin analysis, and

attributes.name: revenue_general_ledger_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.general_ledger. Business justification: Category-level revenue GL mapping: e-commerce finance teams post category revenue to specific GL accounts for financial statement segmentation (electronics vs. apparel vs. consumables). Category P&L r

attributes.name: average_margin_percent
attributes.description: Average gross margin percentage for products in this category. Used for pricing strategy, promotional planning, and financial forecasting. Business-confidential metric.

attributes.name: category_code
attributes.description: Unique alphanumeric business identifier for the category. Used for system integration, API (Application Programming Interface) calls, and internal catalog management.

attributes.name: category_description
attributes.description: Detailed textual description of the category displayed on PLP (Product Listing Page) headers. Provides context and improves SEO (Search Engine Optimization) content richness.
attributes.references: ISO 8601 - Data Elements and Interchange Formats

attributes.name: category_name
attributes.description: Human-readable name of the product category displayed on Product Listing Pages (PLP) and navigation menus. Used for customer-facing catalog browsing.
attributes.references: ISO 8601 - Data Elements and Interchange Formats

attributes.name: commission_rate_percent
attributes.description: Default commission rate percentage applied to marketplace seller transactions for products in this category. Used for GMV (Gross Merchandise Value) and seller disbursement calculations.

attributes.name: created_by_user_code
attributes.description: Identifier of the user or system account that created the category record. Used for audit trail and governance.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the category record was first created in the system. Used for audit trail and data lineage tracking.

attributes.name: default_shipping_class
attributes.description: Default shipping class for products in this category. Used for carrier selection, rate calculation, and SLA (Service Level Agreement) determination in TMS (Transportation Management System).
attributes.references: ISO 8601 - Data Elements and Interchange Formats

attributes.name: depth_level
attributes.description: Numeric depth of the category node in the hierarchy tree. Root categories are level 0 or 1. Used for tree traversal algorithms and display logic.

attributes.name: display_order
attributes.description: Numeric sequence controlling the sort order of categories within the same parent level. Lower values appear first in navigation menus and PLP (Product Listing Page).
attributes.references: ISO 8601 - Data Elements and Interchange Formats

attributes.name: effective_end_date
attributes.description: Date when the category is scheduled to be deactivated or archived. Null for indefinite categories. Used for seasonal category management.

attributes.name: effective_start_date
attributes.description: Date when the category becomes active and visible to customers. Used for scheduled category launches and merchandising campaigns.

attributes.name: external_code
attributes.description: Identifier from the source Product Information Management (PIM) system or ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) system. Used for data integration and reconciliation.

attributes.name: full_path
attributes.description: Complete hierarchical path from root to current node, typically slash-delimited (e.g., Electronics/Smartphones/Android Phones). Used for breadcrumb navigation and SEO (Search Engine Optimization).

attributes.name: hazmat_classification
attributes.description: Hazardous material classification for products in this category. Used for shipping restrictions, carrier selection in TMS (Transportation Management System), and warehouse handling in WMS (Warehouse Management System).

attributes.name: icon_url
attributes.description: URL to the category icon or glyph stored in CDN (Content Delivery Network). Used for compact navigation menus and mobile interfaces.

attributes.name: image_url
attributes.description: URL to the category thumbnail or banner image stored in CDN (Content Delivery Network). Used for visual navigation tiles and PLP (Product Listing Page) headers.

attributes.name: is_active
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the category is currently active and visible to customers. Inactive categories are hidden from navigation and search but retained for historical data.
attributes.references: ISO 8601 - Data Elements and Interchange Formats

attributes.name: is_featured
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this category is promoted as a featured category on the homepage or main navigation. Used for merchandising campaigns.
attributes.references: ISO 8601 - Data Elements and Interchange Formats

attributes.name: is_leaf
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this category is a terminal node (leaf) with no child categories. Leaf categories typically contain SKU (Stock Keeping Unit) assignments.

attributes.name: is_navigable
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this category appears in customer-facing navigation menus. Hidden categories may exist for internal classification only.
attributes.references: ISO 8601 - Data Elements and Interchange Formats

attributes.name: is_searchable
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this category is included in site search indexing and autocomplete suggestions. Used to control search faceting.

attributes.name: meta_description
attributes.description: HTML meta description tag content for the category page. Displayed in search engine results snippets to improve CTR (Click-Through Rate).

attributes.name: meta_keywords
attributes.description: Comma-separated list of keywords associated with the category for search engine indexing and internal search relevance tuning.

attributes.name: meta_title
attributes.description: HTML meta title tag content for the category page. Optimized for search engine ranking and displayed in browser tabs and search results.

attributes.name: product_count
attributes.description: Total number of active SKU (Stock Keeping Unit) products currently assigned to this category. Used for merchandising analytics and empty category detection.

attributes.name: requires_age_verification
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether products in this category require age verification at checkout (e.g., alcohol, tobacco). Used for compliance with FTC (Federal Trade Commission) and state regulations.

attributes.name: requires_cpsc_compliance
attributes.business_glossary_term: Requires CPSC (Consumer Product Safety Commission) Compliance Flag
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether products in this category must comply with CPSC (Consumer Product Safety Commission) safety standards. Used for product onboarding validation.

attributes.name: return_window_days
attributes.description: Default number of days customers have to return products in this category. Used for RMA (Return Merchandise Authorization) policy enforcement and customer service.

attributes.name: seo_slug
attributes.description: URL-friendly lowercase hyphenated string used in category page URLs for SEO (Search Engine Optimization) and clean URL structure (e.g., electronics-smartphones).

attributes.name: taxonomy_standard
attributes.description: Industry classification standard used for this category (e.g., GS1 Global Product Classification, UNSPSC, eCl@ss). Supports multi-taxonomy mapping for B2B (Business to Business) and marketplace integration.

attributes.name: updated_by_user_code
attributes.description: Identifier of the user or system account that last modified the category record. Used for audit trail and change management.

attributes.name: updated_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the category record was last modified. Used for change tracking, cache invalidation, and ETL (Extract Transform Load) incremental processing.

products.name: attribute_definition
products.description: Master definition of a product attribute within the PIM system, forming the schema for dynamic product data. Captures attribute name, attribute code, data type (string, numeric, boolean, enum, multi-select, date, rich_text), unit of measure, validation rules (min/max values, regex pattern, allowed values list), is_required flag, is_searchable flag, is_filterable flag, is_comparable flag, display group, display order, display label, help text, and applicable product category scope. Drives dynamic attribute rendering on PDP and PLP pages, powers faceted search configuration, and governs catalog enrichment completeness scoring.

attributes.name: attribute_definition_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the attribute definition within the Product Information Management (PIM) system. Primary key.

attributes.name: allowed_values_list
attributes.description: Comma-separated or JSON list of allowed values for enum and multi-select attributes. Defines the controlled vocabulary for categorical attributes.

attributes.name: attribute_code
attributes.description: Machine-readable unique code for the attribute, used as the technical identifier in API calls and data integrations. Typically snake_case format.

attributes.name: attribute_group
attributes.description: High-level classification of the attribute for PIM governance (e.g., Core, Marketing, Technical, Compliance, Digital Asset). Used for attribute set management.

attributes.name: attribute_name
attributes.description: Human-readable name of the attribute displayed in the PIM system and administrative interfaces.

attributes.name: attribute_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the attribute definition. Active attributes are available for product enrichment; deprecated attributes are phased out; draft attributes are under review; archived attributes are retained for historical data.

attributes.name: compliance_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this attribute is required for regulatory compliance (e.g., Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) metadata, General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) consent tracking).
attributes.references: CPSC Consumer Product Safety Act, GDPR Article 5

attributes.name: compliance_standard
attributes.description: Name of the regulatory standard or governing body that mandates this attribute (e.g., CPSC, GDPR, ISO 27001, PCI DSS). Null for non-compliance attributes.
attributes.references: CPSC Consumer Product Safety Act, GDPR, ISO 27001, PCI DSS

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this attribute definition record was first created in the PIM system.

attributes.name: data_type
attributes.description: The data type that defines the structure and validation rules for attribute values. Determines how the attribute is stored, validated, and rendered on Product Detail Page (PDP) and Product Listing Page (PLP). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: string|numeric|boolean|enum|multi_select|date|rich_text — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: default_value
attributes.description: Default value automatically populated for this attribute when a new product is created in the PIM system. Null if no default is defined.

attributes.name: display_group
attributes.description: Logical grouping of attributes for organized presentation on PDP and PLP (e.g., Technical Specifications, Dimensions, Compliance). Used to structure attribute rendering.

attributes.name: display_label
attributes.description: Customer-facing label for the attribute displayed on PDP and PLP. May differ from the internal attribute name for better user experience.

attributes.name: display_order
attributes.description: Numeric sort order for attribute presentation within its display group. Lower numbers appear first.

attributes.name: effective_end_date
attributes.description: Date when this attribute definition is deprecated or retired. Null for currently active attributes with no planned end date.

attributes.name: effective_start_date
attributes.description: Date when this attribute definition becomes active and available for use in product catalog enrichment.

attributes.name: external_attribute_code
attributes.description: Identifier for this attribute in external systems or third-party integrations (e.g., vendor PIM, industry standard attribute codes). Used for cross-system mapping.

attributes.name: facet_display_type
attributes.description: UI component type used to render this attribute as a filter facet on PLP (e.g., checkbox for multi-select, slider for numeric ranges, swatch for colors).

attributes.name: help_text
attributes.description: Instructional text or tooltip displayed to catalog managers during product enrichment to guide accurate data entry.

attributes.name: is_comparable
attributes.description: Indicates whether this attribute is displayed in side-by-side product comparison views to help customers evaluate alternatives.

attributes.name: is_filterable
attributes.description: Indicates whether this attribute can be used as a facet filter on Product Listing Page (PLP) to narrow search results.

attributes.name: is_localizable
attributes.description: Indicates whether this attribute supports multi-language or region-specific values for international catalog management.
attributes.references: ISO 639 Language Codes, ISO 3166 Country Codes

attributes.name: is_required
attributes.description: Indicates whether this attribute must be populated for a product to be considered complete and publishable. Drives catalog enrichment completeness scoring.

attributes.name: is_searchable
attributes.description: Indicates whether this attribute is indexed by the Search and Recommendation Engine for product discovery and relevance ranking.

attributes.name: is_system_attribute
attributes.description: Indicates whether this attribute is a core system attribute managed by the PIM platform (e.g., SKU, UPC, ASIN) versus a custom business attribute.

attributes.name: is_unique
attributes.description: Indicates whether attribute values must be unique across all products (e.g., UPC, EAN, ASIN identifiers). Enforces uniqueness constraints during catalog enrichment.

attributes.name: is_visible_on_pdp
attributes.business_glossary_term: Is Visible on Product Detail Page (PDP) Flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this attribute is displayed on the Product Detail Page (PDP) for customer viewing.

attributes.name: last_modified_by
attributes.description: Username or user identifier of the PIM administrator who last modified this attribute definition.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this attribute definition record was last updated in the PIM system.

attributes.name: notes
attributes.description: Free-text notes or comments about this attribute definition for internal PIM governance and documentation purposes.

attributes.name: search_weight
attributes.description: Numeric weight assigned to this attribute for search relevance ranking. Higher weights increase the attributes influence on search result ordering.

attributes.name: source_system
attributes.description: Name of the upstream system or data source from which this attribute definition originated (e.g., PIM, ERP, external vendor catalog). Used for data lineage tracking.

attributes.name: unit_of_measure
attributes.description: The unit of measure for numeric attributes (e.g., kg, cm, liters, watts). Null for non-numeric attributes.

attributes.name: validation_max_value
attributes.description: Maximum allowed value for numeric attributes. Used to enforce data quality rules during catalog enrichment.

attributes.name: validation_min_value
attributes.description: Minimum allowed value for numeric attributes. Used to enforce data quality rules during catalog enrichment.

attributes.name: validation_regex_pattern
attributes.description: Regular expression pattern used to validate string attribute values. Enforces format rules such as SKU patterns, UPC format, or custom identifiers.

attributes.name: version_number
attributes.description: Version number of the attribute definition, incremented with each modification. Supports change tracking and audit trail for PIM governance.

attributes.name: created_by
attributes.description: Username or user identifier of the PIM administrator who created this attribute definition.

products.name: attribute_value
products.description: Stores the actual attribute values assigned to a specific SKU or catalog item as managed in the PIM system. Captures the SKU or catalog item reference, attribute definition reference, raw value (string), typed value (numeric, boolean, date as applicable), unit of measure, locale/language code for localized values, source system, enrichment status, and last enrichment timestamp. Enables faceted search, product comparison, and PDP attribute display.

attributes.name: attribute_value_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the product attribute value record. Primary key.

attributes.name: attribute_definition_id
attributes.description: Reference to the attribute definition that describes the type and metadata of this attribute.

attributes.name: catalog_item_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.catalog_item. Business justification: The attribute_value table description explicitly states values are 'assigned to a specific SKU or catalog item.' Currently only sku_id exists as a FK. Adding catalog_item_id allows PIM attribute value

attributes.name: sku_id
attributes.description: Reference to the SKU or catalog item to which this attribute value is assigned.

attributes.name: compliance_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this attribute value meets regulatory compliance requirements such as Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) standards, GDPR data accuracy, or industry-specific regulations.
attributes.references: Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC), General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)

attributes.name: compliance_notes
attributes.description: Additional notes or documentation related to compliance status, including references to certifications, test results, or regulatory submissions.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: The date and time when this attribute value record was first created in the system.

attributes.name: data_quality_score
attributes.description: A numeric score (0-100) representing the completeness and accuracy of the attribute value. Used to prioritize enrichment efforts and ensure high-quality Product Detail Page (PDP) content.

attributes.name: display_order
attributes.description: The sequence order in which this attribute value should be displayed on the Product Detail Page (PDP) relative to other attributes.

attributes.name: effective_end_date
attributes.description: The date after which this attribute value is no longer effective. Supports time-based attribute changes such as seasonal specifications or regulatory updates.

attributes.name: effective_start_date
attributes.description: The date from which this attribute value becomes effective and should be displayed on Product Detail Page (PDP) and used in search and filtering.

attributes.name: enrichment_status
attributes.description: The current status of the attribute value in the enrichment workflow. Tracks whether the value has been validated, enriched, or requires further action.

attributes.name: enrichment_timestamp
attributes.description: The date and time when the attribute value was last enriched or validated in the PIM system.

attributes.name: is_active
attributes.description: Indicates whether this attribute value is currently active and should be used in product display, search, and analytics.

attributes.name: is_comparable
attributes.description: Indicates whether this attribute value should be displayed in product comparison tools to help customers evaluate similar products.

attributes.name: is_searchable
attributes.description: Indicates whether this attribute value is indexed for search and faceted navigation on Product Listing Page (PLP) and search results.

attributes.name: is_variant_defining
attributes.description: Indicates whether this attribute value defines a product variant (e.g., size, color) that creates a distinct SKU within a product family.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: The date and time when this attribute value record was last updated or modified.

attributes.name: locale_code
attributes.description: The locale or language code for localized attribute values, following ISO 639-1 language and ISO 3166-1 country format (e.g., en_US, fr_FR, de_DE). Supports multi-language Product Detail Page (PDP) and Product Listing Page (PLP) content.

attributes.name: raw_value
attributes.description: The raw string representation of the attribute value as captured from the source system or enrichment process.

attributes.name: source_system
attributes.description: The system of record from which this attribute value originated, such as PIM, ERP, or third-party data provider.

attributes.name: typed_value_boolean
attributes.description: The attribute value when the attribute type is boolean. Used for yes/no or true/false product characteristics.

attributes.name: typed_value_date
attributes.description: The attribute value when the attribute type is date. Used for time-based product attributes such as release date or expiration date.

attributes.name: typed_value_numeric
attributes.description: The attribute value when the attribute type is numeric. Enables range filtering and comparison operations.

attributes.name: typed_value_string
attributes.description: The attribute value when the attribute type is string or text. Used for faceted search and filtering.

attributes.name: unit_of_measure
attributes.description: The unit of measure for numeric attribute values, such as kg, cm, liters, watts, etc. Enables consistent product comparison.

products.name: digital_asset
products.description: Unified content and media asset entity serving as the single source of truth for ALL product presentation content on PDP and PLP pages. Manages both digital media (hero images, lifestyle images, videos, 360-degree spins, AR/3D models, size charts, PDFs) and all textual marketing content (product titles, short descriptions, long descriptions with HTML/rich text, bullet points, SEO meta titles, SEO meta descriptions, SEO canonical URLs, SEO keywords, structured data markup/JSON-LD). Captures asset type, content type, file/CDN URL, resolution, alt text, locale/language code, content status (draft, approved, published, archived), sort order, is_primary flag, rights/license metadata, content author, publishing timestamps, and enrichment completeness score. Supports multi-locale content for international catalog syndication. Governed by PIM/DAM systems for enrichment quality and brand consistency. This is the SSOT for all product content — no other entity in this domain stores product titles, descriptions, or SEO metadata.

attributes.name: digital_asset_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the product digital asset record. Primary key for this entity.

attributes.name: bundle_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.bundle. Business justification: Bundles are distinct sellable units with their own presentation requirements — bundle hero images, promotional videos, assembly instruction visuals, and packaging images are all digital assets that be

attributes.name: catalog_item_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.catalog_item. Business justification: product_digital_asset is described as the 'single source of truth for ALL product presentation.' Digital assets such as hero images, brand videos, and compliance documents are frequently associated at

attributes.name: sku_id
attributes.description: Reference to the SKU this digital asset belongs to. Links asset to product master data.

attributes.name: accessibility_compliance_flag
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the asset meets WCAG accessibility standards (alt text, captions, transcripts). Required for regulatory compliance.

attributes.name: asset_type
attributes.description: Classification of the digital asset media type. Determines rendering and display logic on PDP and PLP pages.

attributes.name: content_type
attributes.description: Specific content classification within the asset type. Distinguishes between hero images, lifestyle images, product titles, SEO metadata, and other content elements for PDP/PLP presentation. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: hero_image|lifestyle_image|thumbnail|product_video|size_chart|instruction_manual|warranty_document|product_title|short_description|long_description|bullet_points|seo_meta_title|seo_meta_description|seo_canonical_url|seo_keywords|structured_data_markup — 16 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the digital asset record was first created in the system. Audit trail for content lifecycle tracking.

attributes.name: enrichment_completeness_score
attributes.description: Percentage score (0-100) measuring content enrichment quality and completeness. Calculated based on presence of required attributes, SEO metadata, and multi-locale coverage.

attributes.name: external_asset_code
attributes.description: Unique identifier from the source system or external DAM platform. Enables cross-system reconciliation and integration.

attributes.name: is_active
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the digital asset is currently active and available for use. Supports soft-delete and content lifecycle management.

attributes.name: locale_code
attributes.description: Language and region code for multi-locale content support (e.g., en_US, fr_FR, de_DE). Enables international catalog syndication.

attributes.name: modified_timestamp
