attributes.description: Date and time when the digital asset record was last modified. Tracks content update activity for governance and audit purposes.

attributes.name: source_system
attributes.description: Name of the upstream system that provided the digital asset (e.g., PIM, DAM, vendor portal). Used for data lineage and integration tracking.

attributes.name: tags_metadata
attributes.description: Comma-separated list of descriptive tags for asset categorization and search. Supports content discovery and filtering in DAM systems.

attributes.name: usage_rights_notes
attributes.description: Free-text notes describing usage restrictions, attribution requirements, or special licensing terms. Supports legal compliance and rights management.

attributes.name: version_number
attributes.description: Sequential version number for the digital asset. Increments with each update to support version control and rollback capabilities.

products.name: bundle
products.description: Defines product bundles and kits offered as a single sellable unit composed of multiple SKUs. Captures bundle code, bundle name, bundle type (fixed bundle, configurable bundle, gift set, kit), bundle description, bundle status, pricing strategy (fixed price, sum-of-parts, discounted), bundle price, minimum quantity, maximum quantity, is_virtual flag, and effective date range. Enables cross-sell and upsell mechanics, promotional bundling, and FBA-style fulfillment of multi-item packages.

attributes.name: bundle_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the product bundle. Primary key.

attributes.name: brand_id
attributes.description: Reference to the brand or manufacturer of the bundle. Used for brand-specific merchandising, reporting, and vendor management.

attributes.name: category_id
attributes.description: Reference to the product taxonomy category this bundle belongs to. Used for navigation, search filtering, and merchandising.

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Bundle kitting/assembly cost tracking: e-commerce fulfillment centers allocate bundle assembly labor and packaging costs to specific cost centers. Bundle P&L reporting requires cost center assignment

attributes.name: legal_entity_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.legal_entity. Business justification: Cross-border bundle compliance: bundles sold across jurisdictions require legal entity assignment for VAT/GST treatment, intercompany accounting, and marketplace facilitator tax obligations. E-commerc

attributes.name: revenue_general_ledger_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.general_ledger. Business justification: Bundle sales are posted to a specific revenue GL account; linking ensures correct revenue recognition for bundled offerings.

attributes.name: seller_profile_id
attributes.description: Reference to the marketplace seller offering this bundle. Supports multi-seller marketplace models and Fulfillment By Amazon (FBA)-style operations.

attributes.name: approved_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the bundle was approved for publication by merchandising or compliance teams. Supports governance workflows and Sarbanes-Oxley (SOX) audit requirements.

attributes.name: bundle_code
attributes.description: Externally-known unique business identifier for the bundle, used in catalog systems, order management, and fulfillment. Typically alphanumeric SKU-style code.

attributes.name: bundle_description
attributes.description: Detailed marketing description of the bundle, including value proposition, contents summary, and usage scenarios. Displayed on PDP for customer decision-making.

attributes.name: bundle_name
attributes.description: Human-readable name of the bundle displayed on Product Detail Pages (PDP) and Product Listing Pages (PLP).

attributes.name: bundle_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the bundle in the catalog. Controls visibility and sellability across channels.

attributes.name: bundle_type
attributes.description: Classification of the bundle structure: fixed bundle (pre-defined items), configurable bundle (customer selects components), gift set (curated collection), kit (assembly required), promotional bundle (limited-time offer), subscription box (recurring delivery).

attributes.name: compliance_certifications
attributes.description: Comma-separated list of regulatory certifications and compliance standards the bundle meets (e.g., Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC), CE, RoHS, FDA). Required for cross-border trade and marketplace listing approval.

attributes.name: component_count
attributes.description: Total number of distinct Stock Keeping Units (SKUs) included in the bundle. Used for fulfillment complexity scoring and customer messaging.

attributes.name: country_of_origin
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code indicating where the bundle is manufactured or assembled. Required for customs, tariffs, and World Trade Organization (WTO) compliance.

attributes.name: created_by_user_code
attributes.description: Reference to the user or system account that created the bundle record. Supports audit trails and General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) data lineage requirements.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 30 - Records of Processing Activities

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the bundle record was first created in the Product Information Management (PIM) system. Used for catalog audit trails and data lineage.

attributes.name: cross_sell_bundle_ids
attributes.description: Comma-separated list of bundle IDs recommended for cross-sell on PDP. Supports recommendation engine and Average Order Value (AOV) optimization.

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the bundle price (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).

attributes.name: discontinued_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the bundle was marked as discontinued. Used for product lifecycle reporting and inventory liquidation planning.

attributes.name: discount_percentage
attributes.description: Percentage discount applied to the bundle compared to sum-of-parts or list price. Used for promotional messaging and Return on Ad Spend (ROAS) calculations.

attributes.name: effective_end_date
attributes.description: Date when the bundle is no longer available for sale. Nullable for evergreen bundles. Used for limited-time offers and seasonal discontinuation.

attributes.name: effective_start_date
attributes.description: Date when the bundle becomes available for sale. Used for seasonal launches, promotional campaigns, and catalog planning.

attributes.name: harmonized_tariff_code
attributes.description: International trade classification code for customs and duty calculation. Required for cross-border e-commerce and Electronic Data Interchange (EDI) with customs authorities.

attributes.name: image_url
attributes.description: URL of the primary product image for the bundle, hosted on Content Delivery Network (CDN). Used for PDP, PLP, and digital marketing assets.

attributes.name: is_configurable
attributes.description: Indicates whether customers can customize bundle components (select variants, add-ons, or substitutions) at purchase time.

attributes.name: is_returnable
attributes.description: Indicates whether the bundle is eligible for return under the standard Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA) policy. Some bundles (e.g., personalized, perishable) may be non-returnable.

attributes.name: is_subscription_eligible
attributes.description: Indicates whether the bundle can be purchased as a recurring subscription with automated replenishment.

attributes.name: is_virtual
attributes.description: Indicates whether the bundle is virtual (components shipped separately) or physical (pre-packaged as single unit). Impacts fulfillment strategy and Warehouse Management System (WMS) pick-pack-ship logic.

attributes.name: list_price
attributes.description: Manufacturer's suggested retail price (MSRP) or original price before discounts. Used to calculate savings and display strikethrough pricing.

attributes.name: maximum_quantity
attributes.description: Maximum number of bundle units a customer can purchase in a single order. Used to prevent inventory depletion and manage promotional limits.

attributes.name: minimum_quantity
attributes.description: Minimum number of bundle units a customer must purchase in a single order. Supports bulk-buy and wholesale scenarios.

attributes.name: modified_by_user_code
attributes.description: Reference to the user or system account that last modified the bundle record. Supports change management and SOX compliance.

attributes.name: modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp of the most recent update to the bundle record. Supports change data capture (CDC) and incremental Extract Transform Load (ETL) processes.

attributes.name: package_dimensions_cm
attributes.description: Physical dimensions of the bundle package in LxWxH format (centimeters). Used for warehouse slotting, cartonization, and Less Than Truck Load (LTL) / Full Truck Load (FTL) planning.

attributes.name: price
attributes.description: Selling price of the bundle in the base currency. For sum-of-parts strategy, this may be calculated; for fixed price, this is the set amount.

attributes.name: pricing_strategy
attributes.description: Method used to calculate bundle price: fixed price (single price regardless of components), sum-of-parts (total of individual SKU prices), discounted (percentage off sum-of-parts), tiered (price varies by quantity), dynamic (algorithmic pricing).

attributes.name: return_window_days
attributes.description: Number of days from delivery date during which the bundle can be returned. Supports Customer Lifetime Value (CLTV) and Net Promoter Score (NPS) optimization.

attributes.name: search_keywords
attributes.description: Comma-separated list of keywords and phrases for Search Engine Optimization (SEO) and internal site search relevance ranking. Improves Click-Through Rate (CTR) and Conversion Rate (CVR).
attributes.references: SEO and Search Engine Marketing (SEM) Best Practices

attributes.name: shipping_class
attributes.description: Shipping method classification for the bundle. Determines carrier eligibility, Service Level Agreement (SLA) targets, and last-mile delivery options.

attributes.name: short_description
attributes.description: Concise summary of the bundle for display on PLP, search results, and mobile views. Typically 150-200 characters.

attributes.name: tax_code
attributes.description: Tax classification code for the bundle, used to determine applicable sales tax, VAT, or GST rates. Integrates with Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) tax engines.

attributes.name: total_weight_kg
attributes.description: Combined shipping weight of all bundle components in kilograms. Used for carrier selection, freight cost calculation, and Transportation Management System (TMS) route optimization.

attributes.name: upsell_bundle_ids
attributes.description: Comma-separated list of higher-value bundle IDs recommended for upsell. Supports Gross Merchandise Value (GMV) growth and Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC) recovery.

products.name: bundle_component
products.description: Association entity defining the individual SKU components that make up a product bundle. Captures bundle reference, component SKU reference, component quantity, component role (primary, accessory, optional), is_substitutable flag, substitution group code, display order, and component-level pricing override. Supports bundle assembly in fulfillment, component-level inventory reservation, and bundle configurator UI logic.

attributes.name: bundle_component_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the bundle component association record. Primary key.

attributes.name: bundle_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.bundle. Business justification: Bundle component must reference its parent bundle to establish hierarchy; existing model only links component SKUs, missing bundle reference.

attributes.name: component_general_ledger_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.general_ledger. Business justification: Component-level COGS posting: e-commerce bundle profitability analysis requires each component's cost to post to a specific GL account (raw material vs. packaging vs. labor). Finance teams run bundle

attributes.name: primary_bundle_sku_id
attributes.description: Reference to the parent bundle product SKU that contains this component.

attributes.name: supplier_id
attributes.description: Reference to the primary supplier for this component. Used for procurement, vendor management, and supply chain traceability.

attributes.name: assembly_instruction_text
attributes.description: Textual instructions for warehouse staff on how to assemble or package this component within the bundle. Used during pick-pack-ship operations.

attributes.name: component_price_override
attributes.description: Optional component-level pricing override for this SKU within the bundle context. Used when the component has a different price when sold as part of the bundle versus standalone. Null if standard component pricing applies.

attributes.name: component_quantity
attributes.description: The quantity of this component SKU required in the bundle. Supports fractional quantities for items sold by weight or volume.

attributes.name: component_role
attributes.description: The functional role of this component within the bundle (e.g., primary product, accessory, optional add-on, complementary item, replacement part, or sample).

attributes.name: component_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of this component within the bundle. Active components are available for sale, inactive are temporarily unavailable, discontinued are permanently removed, and pending are awaiting approval.

attributes.name: component_volume_m3
attributes.description: The volume of this component in cubic meters. Used for calculating total bundle volume for warehouse space planning and shipping container optimization.

attributes.name: component_weight_kg
attributes.description: The weight of this component in kilograms. Used for calculating total bundle weight for shipping cost estimation and carrier selection.

attributes.name: country_of_origin
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code indicating where this component was manufactured or produced. Used for customs declarations and trade compliance.

attributes.name: cpsc_compliance_flag
attributes.business_glossary_term: Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) Compliance Flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this component meets Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) safety standards and compliance requirements. True if compliant, False otherwise.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: The date and time when this bundle component association record was first created in the system. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.

attributes.name: display_sequence
attributes.description: The order in which this component should be displayed in the bundle configurator UI, Product Detail Page (PDP), and fulfillment documentation. Lower numbers appear first.

attributes.name: effective_end_date
attributes.description: The date after which this component is no longer part of the bundle. Null for components with no planned end date. Used for time-bound bundle configurations and product lifecycle management.

attributes.name: effective_start_date
attributes.description: The date from which this component becomes part of the bundle. Used for time-bound bundle configurations and seasonal product changes.

attributes.name: hs_code
attributes.description: Harmonized System code for this component used for international trade classification, customs duties, and tariff determination.

attributes.name: inventory_reservation_priority
attributes.description: Priority level for reserving inventory for this component during bundle order processing. Lower numbers indicate higher priority. Used by Warehouse Management System (WMS) for allocation logic.

attributes.name: is_hazmat
attributes.description: Indicates whether this component is classified as hazardous material requiring special handling, packaging, and shipping compliance. True if hazardous, False otherwise.

attributes.name: is_required
attributes.description: Indicates whether this component is mandatory for the bundle. True if the component must be included, False if it is optional or can be removed by the customer.

attributes.name: is_substitutable
attributes.description: Indicates whether this component can be substituted with an alternative SKU during fulfillment if out of stock. True if substitution is allowed, False otherwise.

attributes.name: is_visible_to_customer
attributes.description: Indicates whether this component is visible to the customer on the Product Detail Page (PDP) and Product Listing Page (PLP). False for hidden components like packaging materials or promotional inserts.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: The date and time when this bundle component association record was last updated. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.

attributes.name: lead_time_days
attributes.description: The number of days required to procure or manufacture this component from the time an order is placed. Used for inventory replenishment planning and bundle availability forecasting.

attributes.name: minimum_order_quantity
attributes.description: The minimum quantity of this component that must be ordered from the supplier. Used for procurement planning and supplier contract compliance.

attributes.name: modified_by_user
attributes.description: The username or identifier of the user who last modified this bundle component record. Used for audit trail and data governance.

attributes.name: substitution_group_code
attributes.description: Code identifying the substitution group for this component. Components with the same substitution group code can be interchanged during fulfillment. Null if component is not substitutable.

products.name: relation
products.description: Defines curated product-to-product relationships between catalog items to power recommendation widgets, accessory suggestions, and replacement/spare part lookups on PDP and cart pages. Stores source catalog item reference, target catalog item reference, relation type (cross_sell, upsell, frequently_bought_together, accessory, replacement, spare_part, compatible_with), relation strength score, display position, effective date range, is_active flag, and relation source (manual_curation, algorithmic, seller_submitted). Integrates with the recommendation engine for personalized suggestions and supports merchandising team curation workflows.

attributes.name: relation_id
attributes.description: Primary key for relation

attributes.name: seller_profile_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the marketplace seller who submitted or owns this product relationship. Applicable for seller-submitted relations in marketplace models. Nullable for platform-curated relationships.

attributes.name: source_sku_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the source catalog item (SKU) from which the relationship originates. This is the product displayed on the PDP or cart page that triggers the recommendation.

attributes.name: target_sku_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the target catalog item (SKU) being recommended or related. This is the product suggested to the customer based on the source SKU.

attributes.name: approval_status
attributes.description: Current approval state of the product relationship in the merchandising workflow. Applicable for seller-submitted or algorithmically-generated relations requiring manual review before activation.

attributes.name: approved_by
attributes.description: Username or identifier of the merchandising team member who approved the product relationship for activation. Supports audit trail and accountability for manual curation decisions.

attributes.name: approved_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the product relationship was approved by the merchandising team. Supports audit trail and Service Level Agreement (SLA) tracking for approval workflows.

attributes.name: click_through_rate
attributes.description: Percentage of customers who clicked on the related product recommendation when displayed, calculated as clicks divided by impressions. Used to measure recommendation effectiveness and optimize display logic.

attributes.name: conversion_rate
attributes.description: Percentage of customers who purchased the related product after clicking the recommendation, calculated as purchases divided by clicks. Key performance indicator (KPI) for recommendation quality and revenue impact.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the product relationship record was first created in the system. Supports audit trail and data lineage tracking.

attributes.name: display_position
attributes.description: Ordinal position in which the related product should appear in the recommendation widget on the Product Detail Page (PDP) or cart page. Lower numbers indicate higher priority placement.

attributes.name: effective_end_date
attributes.description: Date after which the product relationship is no longer active and should not be displayed. Nullable for open-ended relationships. Supports time-bound merchandising campaigns and product lifecycle management.

attributes.name: effective_start_date
attributes.description: Date from which the product relationship becomes active and eligible for display in recommendation widgets. Supports time-bound merchandising campaigns and seasonal promotions.

attributes.name: is_active
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the product relationship is currently active and should be displayed in recommendation widgets. True means active, False means inactive or suppressed.

attributes.name: last_performance_update_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the performance metrics (impressions, clicks, conversions, revenue) were last refreshed from the analytics pipeline. Supports data freshness monitoring and Extract Transform Load (ETL) orchestration.

attributes.name: merchandising_notes
attributes.description: Free-text notes from merchandising team explaining the rationale for the product relationship, special handling instructions, or campaign context. Supports manual curation workflows and knowledge transfer.

attributes.name: modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the product relationship record was last modified. Supports audit trail, change tracking, and incremental Extract Transform Load (ETL) processing.

attributes.name: priority_rank
attributes.description: Business priority ranking assigned by merchandising team to override algorithmic display position. Lower numbers indicate higher priority. Used for strategic product placement and promotional campaigns.

attributes.name: relation_source
attributes.description: Origin or method by which the product relationship was created. Indicates whether the relation was manually curated by merchandising team, generated algorithmically by recommendation engine, submitted by marketplace seller, or derived from specific ML techniques (collaborative filtering, content-based, hybrid).

attributes.name: relation_type
attributes.description: Type of product-to-product relationship. Defines the nature of the recommendation: cross_sell (complementary product), upsell (higher-value alternative), frequently_bought_together (bundle suggestion), accessory (add-on item), replacement (substitute product), spare_part (component or part).

attributes.name: revenue_attributed
attributes.description: Total revenue in base currency generated from purchases of the related product that were attributed to this recommendation relationship. Used to measure Return on Ad Spend (ROAS) and recommendation engine effectiveness.

attributes.name: strength_score
attributes.description: Numeric score representing the strength or confidence of the product relationship, typically ranging from 0.0000 to 1.0000. Higher scores indicate stronger associations and higher likelihood of conversion. Used by recommendation algorithms to rank suggestions.

attributes.name: total_clicks
attributes.description: Cumulative count of times customers clicked on the related product recommendation. Used to calculate Click-Through Rate (CTR) and Conversion Rate (CVR).

attributes.name: total_conversions
attributes.description: Cumulative count of times customers purchased the related product after clicking the recommendation. Used to calculate Conversion Rate (CVR) and measure revenue attribution.

attributes.name: total_impressions
attributes.description: Cumulative count of times the related product recommendation was displayed to customers. Used to calculate Click-Through Rate (CTR) and assess recommendation reach.

products.name: brand
products.description: Master record for product brands represented in the catalog. Captures brand name, brand code, brand logo URL, brand description, brand website URL, brand country of origin, brand tier (luxury, premium, standard, private_label), is_verified flag, is_exclusive flag, brand owner type (manufacturer, distributor, marketplace_seller, private_label), brand status, and brand registration date. Serves as the SSOT for brand identity referenced by catalog items and used in brand-filtered search and PLP brand pages.

attributes.name: brand_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the brand. Primary key for the brand master record.

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Brand marketing spend tracking: e-commerce brand managers allocate advertising, co-op marketing, and brand development costs to brand-specific cost centers. Brand P&L reporting requires cost center as

attributes.name: legal_entity_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.legal_entity. Business justification: Brand trademark ownership and intercompany royalty accounting: in multi-entity e-commerce, brands are legally owned by a specific entity. Royalty payments between entities require brand→legal_entity l

attributes.name: owner_seller_profile_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to seller.seller_profile. Business justification: Brand Registry is a named e-commerce business process where a seller claims ownership of a brand for counterfeit protection, enhanced content rights, and enforcement actions. Linking brand to the owni

attributes.name: parent_brand_id
attributes.description: Foreign key reference to the parent brand if this brand is a sub-brand or brand extension. Null for top-level brands. Enables brand hierarchy modeling for conglomerates and brand families.
attributes.references: Product Information Management (PIM) System - Brand Master

attributes.name: primary_category_id
attributes.description: Foreign key reference to the primary product category or taxonomy node most commonly associated with this brand. Used for brand-filtered Product Listing Pages (PLP) and merchandising.
attributes.references: Product Information Management (PIM) System - Taxonomy Management

attributes.name: profit_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Brand‑level profitability reporting requires linking each brand to a profit center to aggregate revenue and expenses per brand.

attributes.name: approval_date
attributes.description: The date when the brand was approved for use in the catalog by the merchandising or brand governance team. Null if brand is still pending approval. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.
attributes.references: Product Information Management (PIM) System - Brand Master

attributes.name: average_rating
attributes.description: Aggregated average customer rating for all products under this brand, on a scale of 0.00 to 5.00. Calculated from product reviews. Used for brand reputation scoring and search ranking.

attributes.name: brand_code
attributes.description: Short alphanumeric code used as a business identifier for the brand in internal systems, reporting, and integrations. Typically 2-20 uppercase characters.
attributes.references: Product Information Management (PIM) System - Brand Master

attributes.name: brand_description
attributes.description: Marketing description of the brand, including brand story, heritage, and value proposition. Used for brand pages and Search Engine Optimization (SEO).
attributes.references: Product Information Management (PIM) System - Brand Master

attributes.name: brand_name
attributes.description: The official registered name of the brand as it appears in the catalog and on Product Detail Pages (PDP) and Product Listing Pages (PLP).
attributes.references: Product Information Management (PIM) System - Brand Master

attributes.name: brand_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the brand in the catalog. Active brands are visible in search and Product Listing Pages (PLP). Inactive and discontinued brands are hidden. Pending approval brands are under review. Suspended brands are temporarily blocked.
attributes.references: Product Information Management (PIM) System - Brand Master

attributes.name: compliance_certification
attributes.description: Comma-separated list of compliance certifications held by the brand (e.g., ISO 9001, Fair Trade, Organic, GOTS, B-Corp). Used for compliance filtering and regulatory reporting.
attributes.references: International Organization for Standardization (ISO) - ISO 27001, Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC)

attributes.name: country_of_origin
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code representing the country where the brand was founded or is headquartered. Used for country-of-origin filtering and compliance reporting.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the brand record was first created in the Product Information Management (PIM) system. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX. Used for audit trail and data lineage.
attributes.references: ISO 8601 Timestamp Format, Sarbanes-Oxley Act (SOX) - Financial Reporting and Internal Controls

attributes.name: discontinuation_date
attributes.description: The date when the brand was discontinued and removed from active catalog merchandising. Null for active brands. Used for historical reporting and compliance. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.
attributes.references: Product Information Management (PIM) System - Brand Master

attributes.name: featured_rank
attributes.description: Merchandising rank used to determine the display order of brands on featured brand pages and promotional campaigns. Lower numbers indicate higher priority. Null if not featured.

attributes.name: is_exclusive
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the brand is sold exclusively on this e-commerce platform. Exclusive brands are featured in marketing campaigns and receive preferential merchandising.
attributes.references: Product Information Management (PIM) System - Brand Master

attributes.name: is_verified
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the brand has been verified by the platform as an authentic, authorized brand. Verified brands receive trust badges on Product Detail Pages (PDP) and higher search ranking.
attributes.references: Product Information Management (PIM) System - Brand Master

attributes.name: manufacturer_country
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code representing the primary country where products under this brand are manufactured. Used for tariff classification and World Trade Organization (WTO) compliance.
attributes.references: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 Country Codes, World Trade Organization (WTO) Trade Regulations

attributes.name: manufacturer_name
attributes.description: Legal name of the manufacturing entity that produces products under this brand. Used for Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) compliance reporting and product recall management.
attributes.references: Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) - Product Safety Standards

attributes.name: meta_description
attributes.description: Search Engine Optimization (SEO) meta description tag for the brand landing page. Used for search engine result snippets and Click-Through Rate (CTR) optimization.

attributes.name: meta_title
attributes.description: Search Engine Optimization (SEO) meta title tag for the brand landing page. Used for organic search ranking and Click-Through Rate (CTR) optimization.

attributes.name: owner_type
attributes.description: Classification of the entity that owns and controls the brand. Values: manufacturer (brand owned by product manufacturer), distributor (brand owned by distribution partner), marketplace_seller (brand owned by third-party seller), private_label (brand owned by the e-commerce platform).
attributes.references: Product Information Management (PIM) System - Brand Master

attributes.name: registration_date
attributes.description: The date when the brand was first registered in the Product Information Management (PIM) system and made available for catalog association. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.
attributes.references: Product Information Management (PIM) System - Brand Master

attributes.name: search_keywords
attributes.description: Comma-separated list of search keywords and synonyms associated with the brand. Used by the Search and Recommendation Engine for query expansion and Search Engine Optimization (SEO).
attributes.references: Search and Recommendation Engine - Product Discovery

attributes.name: sustainability_score
attributes.description: Numeric sustainability rating for the brand on a scale of 0.00 to 5.00, based on environmental and social governance criteria. Used for eco-conscious customer filtering and Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) reporting.
attributes.references: General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) - EU Data Privacy, ISO 27001

attributes.name: tier
attributes.description: Market positioning tier of the brand. Used for pricing strategy, merchandising, and customer segmentation. Values: luxury (high-end designer), premium (aspirational quality), standard (mainstream), value (budget-friendly), private_label (retailer-owned).
attributes.references: Product Information Management (PIM) System - Brand Master

attributes.name: total_reviews
attributes.description: Total count of customer reviews submitted for all products under this brand. Used for brand trust signals and Net Promoter Score (NPS) analysis.

attributes.name: total_skus
attributes.description: Total count of active Stock Keeping Units (SKU) associated with this brand in the catalog. Used for brand breadth analysis and merchandising planning.
attributes.references: Product Information Management (PIM) System - Catalog Management

attributes.name: trademark_country
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code representing the jurisdiction where the trademark is registered. Format: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3.

attributes.name: trademark_number
attributes.description: Official trademark registration number issued by the national trademark office. Used for intellectual property verification and counterfeit prevention.
attributes.references: International Organization for Standardization (ISO) - ISO 27001 Information Security Management

attributes.name: updated_by
attributes.description: User identifier or system account that last modified the brand record. Used for audit trail and accountability in compliance with Sarbanes-Oxley Act (SOX) and General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
attributes.references: Sarbanes-Oxley Act (SOX) - Financial Reporting and Internal Controls, General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) - EU Data Privacy

attributes.name: updated_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the brand record was last modified in the Product Information Management (PIM) system. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX. Used for audit trail and change tracking.
attributes.references: ISO 8601 Timestamp Format, Sarbanes-Oxley Act (SOX) - Financial Reporting and Internal Controls

attributes.name: website_url
attributes.description: Official website URL of the brand. Used for external brand reference links and customer research.
attributes.references: Product Information Management (PIM) System - Brand Master

products.name: product_listing
products.description: Represents a marketplace or channel-specific product listing that maps a SKU to a specific sales channel (website, mobile app, marketplace, B2B portal, BOPIS). Captures SKU reference, channel code, channel-specific listing ID (e.g., ASIN for Amazon-style marketplace), listing status (active, suppressed, pending, inactive), listing title override, listing description override, listing price, buy box eligibility flag, listing quality score, suppression reason, and listing created/updated timestamps. Distinct from catalog_item as it models channel-specific presentation and eligibility.

attributes.name: product_listing_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the product listing record. Primary key for the product listing entity.

attributes.name: agreement_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to seller.seller_agreement. Business justification: Compliance audits and listing governance require knowing which seller agreement version was in effect when a listing was created — governing allowed categories, return policy terms, and max SKU count.

attributes.name: brand_id
attributes.description: FK to product.brand

attributes.name: bundle_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.bundle. Business justification: A product listing can represent either an individual SKU or a bundle being offered on a marketplace channel. Currently product_listing only has sku_id, meaning bundles cannot be listed on channels thr

attributes.name: campaign_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to marketing.campaign. Business justification: REQUIRED: Listings can be part of a marketing campaign; linking enables listing‑level spend and conversion attribution.

attributes.name: category_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.category. Business justification: product_listing currently stores category_path as a STRING — a denormalized, free-text representation of the category hierarchy. This violates normalization principles and creates data quality risks (

attributes.name: commission_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to seller.commission. Business justification: Marketplace fee settlement and audit processes require knowing exactly which commission schedule governs each listing. Linking product_listing to the seller.commission record enables accurate fee calc

attributes.name: delivery_zone_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to logistics.delivery_zone. Business justification: In e-commerce, a product listing's shipping eligibility, SLA promise, and surcharge applicability are determined by its assigned delivery zone. Zone-based listing management drives buy-box eligibility

attributes.name: legal_entity_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.legal_entity. Business justification: Marketplace facilitator tax compliance: each product listing must be associated with the legal entity responsible for the sale to determine VAT/sales tax collection obligations. Multi-country e-commer

attributes.name: revenue_general_ledger_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.general_ledger. Business justification: Channel-level revenue recognition: each listing channel posts revenue to a specific GL account. E-commerce finance teams run channel P&L reports requiring listing→GL linkage for marketplace fee vs. di

attributes.name: seller_profile_id
attributes.description: Reference to the seller or merchant account that owns this listing. Relevant for marketplace channels where multiple sellers can list the same SKU. For first-party (1P) listings, this references the company's own seller account.

attributes.name: sku_id
attributes.description: Reference to the master SKU in the product catalog that this listing represents.

attributes.name: age_restriction
attributes.description: The minimum age required to purchase this product, if applicable. Common values: 18 (alcohol, tobacco), 21 (certain regulated products), 13 (COPPA compliance for digital products). Null indicates no age restriction.
attributes.references: Federal Trade Commission (FTC) Consumer Protection Standards

attributes.name: average_rating
attributes.description: The average customer rating for this listing on a scale of 0.00 to 5.00. Aggregated from customer reviews and used to calculate listing quality score, influence buy box eligibility, and impact conversion rate. Null if no reviews exist.

attributes.name: buy_box_eligible_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this listing is eligible to compete for the buy box on marketplace channels. The buy box is the prominent 'Add to Cart' section on a product page. Eligibility is determined by factors such as price competitiveness, fulfillment method, seller performance metrics, and inventory availability.

attributes.name: channel_code
attributes.description: The sales channel where this product listing is published. Examples: WEB (website), MOBILE (mobile app), MARKETPLACE (third-party marketplace), B2B (business-to-business portal), BOPIS (Buy Online Pick Up In Store), SOCIAL (social commerce platform).

attributes.name: channel_listing_code
attributes.description: The unique identifier assigned by the sales channel for this listing. For Amazon-style marketplaces, this would be the ASIN (Amazon Standard Identification Number). For other channels, this is the channel's native product identifier.

attributes.name: compare_at_price
attributes.description: The original or suggested retail price shown for comparison purposes to highlight discounts. Used to calculate savings percentage displayed on PDP and Product Listing Page (PLP). Null if no comparison pricing is used.

attributes.name: condition_type
attributes.description: The physical condition of the product being sold through this listing. New: brand new in original packaging; Refurbished: restored to working condition; Used: previously owned; Open Box: new but packaging opened; Damaged: functional but with cosmetic or minor defects.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp when this product listing record was first created in the system. Used for audit trail, data lineage tracking, and compliance with SOX (Sarbanes-Oxley Act) and GDPR (General Data Protection Regulation) requirements.

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the listing price. Examples: USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, CAD.

attributes.name: ean_code
attributes.description: The 13-digit European Article Number barcode identifier for the product. Commonly used in international markets. Equivalent to UPC but with an additional digit for country code.

attributes.name: end_date
attributes.description: The date when this listing will be or was deactivated and removed from the channel. Null indicates no planned end date. Used for seasonal products, limited-time offers, or product lifecycle management.

attributes.name: featured_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this listing is featured or promoted on the channel's homepage, category pages, or marketing campaigns. Featured listings receive higher visibility and priority in search and recommendation algorithms.

attributes.name: fulfillment_method
attributes.description: The fulfillment strategy for orders placed through this listing. FBM: Fulfilled By Merchant (seller ships); FBA: Fulfillment By Amazon-style (marketplace fulfillment center ships); 3PL: Third-Party Logistics provider; DROPSHIP: direct from manufacturer; BOPIS: Buy Online Pick Up In Store.

attributes.name: hazmat_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the product is classified as hazardous material requiring special handling, labeling, and shipping restrictions. Examples include batteries, flammable liquids, aerosols, and chemicals. Compliance with Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) and transportation regulations is required.

attributes.name: inventory_quantity
attributes.description: The current available inventory quantity allocated to this listing on the channel. This may be a subset of total warehouse inventory based on channel allocation rules and safety stock policies. Used to determine Out of Stock (OOS) status and listing suppression.

attributes.name: last_sold_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp of the most recent order placed for this listing. Used to identify slow-moving inventory, calculate Daily Sales Rate (DSR), and trigger automated repricing or suppression rules.

attributes.name: listing_status
attributes.description: Current operational status of the product listing on the channel. Active: live and purchasable; Suppressed: hidden due to quality or compliance issues; Pending: awaiting approval or activation; Inactive: manually disabled; Suspended: temporarily blocked; Archived: permanently removed.

attributes.name: manufacturer_part_number
attributes.description: The manufacturer's unique part number for the product. Used for product identification, catalog matching, and compliance reporting. Distinct from SKU, UPC, and EAN.

attributes.name: maximum_order_quantity
attributes.description: The maximum number of units a customer can purchase in a single order for this listing. Used to prevent overselling, manage high-demand products, or enforce promotional limits. Null indicates no maximum limit.

attributes.name: minimum_order_quantity
attributes.description: The minimum number of units a customer must purchase in a single order for this listing. Commonly used in B2B channels or bulk purchase scenarios. Null or 1 for standard retail listings.

attributes.name: price
attributes.description: The current selling price for this product listing on the channel, in the channel's default currency. This is the price displayed to customers and may differ from the master catalog price due to channel-specific pricing strategies, promotions, or marketplace fees.

attributes.name: promotional_badge
attributes.description: A marketing badge or label displayed on the listing to highlight special offers or features. Examples: 'Best Seller', 'Limited Time Offer', 'Free Shipping', 'New Arrival', 'Exclusive'. Used to increase Click-Through Rate (CTR) and Conversion Rate (CVR).

attributes.name: quality_score
attributes.description: A calculated score (0-100) representing the overall quality of the listing based on factors such as content completeness, image quality, keyword optimization, customer reviews, conversion rate (CVR), and compliance with channel guidelines. Higher scores improve search ranking and buy box eligibility.

attributes.name: review_count
attributes.description: The total number of customer reviews submitted for this listing. Higher review counts increase customer trust and improve search ranking. Used in conjunction with average rating for social proof.

attributes.name: search_keywords
attributes.description: Channel-specific search keywords and tags used to optimize product discoverability in the channel's search and recommendation engine. Supports SEO (Search Engine Optimization) and SEM (Search Engine Marketing) strategies. Comma-separated or space-separated list.

attributes.name: shipping_dimensions
attributes.description: The package dimensions in format 'Length x Width x Height' with unit (e.g., '30x20x10 cm'). Used for shipping cost calculation, warehouse space planning, and carrier compatibility checks.

attributes.name: shipping_weight_kg
attributes.description: The total weight of the product including packaging, measured in kilograms. Used for shipping cost calculation, carrier selection, and logistics planning by the Transportation Management System (TMS).

attributes.name: start_date
attributes.description: The date when this listing was first activated and made available for purchase on the channel. Used for lifecycle tracking and performance analysis.

attributes.name: suppression_reason
attributes.description: Explanation for why the listing status is 'suppressed'. Common reasons include: missing required attributes, policy violations, quality issues, pricing errors, inventory unavailability, restricted product category, or failed compliance checks (e.g., CPSC safety standards, PCI DSS for payment-related products).

attributes.name: total_units_sold
attributes.description: The cumulative number of units sold through this listing since activation. Used for Best Seller Rank (BSR) calculation, inventory forecasting, and performance reporting.

attributes.name: upc_code
attributes.description: The 12-digit Universal Product Code barcode identifier for the product. Required for many retail and marketplace channels. Used for inventory tracking, point-of-sale scanning, and catalog integration.

attributes.name: updated_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp when this product listing record was last modified. Tracks changes to listing attributes such as price, status, inventory, or content. Used for change data capture (CDC), audit trail, and synchronization with downstream systems.

products.name: category_attribute_scope
products.description: This association product represents the schema governance contract between attribute_definition and category in the PIM system. It captures which attributes are assigned to which categories, along with per-scope overrides for requiredness, display ordering, and lifecycle dates. Each record defines one attribute's applicability to one category, enabling merchandising teams to manage catalog completeness rules at the category level. Replaces the denormalized applicable_category_scope STRING field on attribute_definition.. Existence Justification: In PIM systems, merchandising and catalog governance teams explicitly manage which attributes apply to which categories — this is a core operational function called 'attribute scope assignment' or 'category attribute schema'. An attribute_definition (e.g., 'Screen Size') applies to multiple categories (e.g., Smartphones, Tablets, Monitors), and a category (e.g., Electronics > Smartphones) requires many attribute definitions (Screen Size, Battery Life, OS, RAM). This is not derivable from transactional data — it is a schema governance record that humans actively create, update, and retire.

attributes.name: category_attribute_scope_id
attributes.business_glossary_term: Category Attribute Scope - Category Attribute Scope Id
attributes.description: Primary key for the category_attribute_scope association

attributes.name: attribute_definition_id
attributes.business_glossary_term: Category Attribute Scope - Attribute Definition Id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to the attribute definition that is scoped to this category

attributes.name: category_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to the category to which this attribute definition is assigned

attributes.name: applicable_category_scope
attributes.description: Comma-separated list of product category codes or taxonomy nodes to which this attribute applies. Defines the scope of attribute applicability across the catalog. [Moved from attribute_definition: This denormalized STRING field stores a comma-separated list of category codes representing the M:N relationship. It must be removed from attribute_definition and replaced by proper FK records in this association table, enabling per-category overrides, efficient querying, and lifecycle management.]

attributes.name: display_order
attributes.description: Category-specific sort order for rendering this attribute on PDP and PLP pages within this category context, overriding the global display_order on attribute_definition.

attributes.name: effective_end_date
attributes.description: Date when this category-attribute scope assignment is retired. Null for currently active assignments. Enables lifecycle management of individual scopes without affecting other category assignments.

attributes.name: effective_start_date
attributes.description: Date when this category-attribute scope assignment becomes active and the attribute begins applying to products in this category.

attributes.name: is_required
attributes.description: Indicates whether this attribute is mandatory for products in this specific category, overriding the global is_required flag on attribute_definition. Enables category-level completeness rules.

domains.name: order
domains.description: Core transactional domain managing the full order lifecycle from cart submission through confirmed delivery. Owns order capture, OMS orchestration, order status tracking, cancellations, delivery confirmation, and order-level SLA management across B2C, B2B, and marketplace channels. Tracks AOV, CVR, and GMV at the order level.
domains.references: Order Management System (OMS), EDI X12, ISO 20022

products.name: cart
products.description: Represents a customers active shopping cart prior to order submission. Captures session context, channel origin (B2C, B2B, marketplace, mobile app), cart creation and expiry timestamps, applied coupon codes, estimated totals, saved-for-later flag, and cart abandonment signals (last activity timestamp, abandonment email trigger status). Serves as the SSOT for pre-purchase intent and cart-to-order conversion tracking. This is the entry point of the order lifecycle — cart submission triggers order_header creation. Line-item details are held in the related cart_item product.

attributes.name: cart_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the cart (primary key).

attributes.name: campaign_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to marketing.campaign. Business justification: Abandoned cart recovery and cart-creation attribution require linking each cart to the originating campaign (email, paid ad). Enables campaign-level cart conversion rate reporting and marketing ROI an

attributes.name: channel_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to marketing.channel. Business justification: Cart channel attribution (email, social, paid search, organic) drives channel-level conversion funnel analysis. The existing plain-text 'channel' column is a denormalized string; replacing it with cha

attributes.name: contact_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to customer.contact. Business justification: In B2B e-commerce, a specific contact (buyer) initiates and owns a cart. This FK enables contact-level purchase attribution, approval workflow routing, and B2B procurement reporting — standard B2B mar

attributes.name: customer_profile_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the customer who owns the cart.

attributes.name: header_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to order.header. Business justification: When a cart is converted to a confirmed order, the resulting header record should be traceable from the originating cart. This FK enables cart-to-order conversion rate (CVR) analysis, abandoned cart r

attributes.name: price_list_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to pricing.price_list. Business justification: CART PRICING CONTEXT: The cart calculates totals using a selected price list; persisting the list ID enables seamless order conversion.

attributes.name: shipping_customer_address_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to customer.customer_address. Business justification: Cart currently stores shipping address as denormalized plain columns violating 3NF. Linking to customer_address enables address pre-fill from saved addresses, address validation during checkout, and c

attributes.name: wishlist_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to customer.wishlist. Business justification: Wishlist-to-cart conversion is a primary e-commerce funnel metric. Linking cart to the originating wishlist enables conversion rate reporting, abandoned cart recovery campaigns tied to wishlist intent

attributes.name: abandonment_email_sent_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether a cart abandonment email has been sent.

attributes.name: abandonment_reason
attributes.description: Free‑text reason captured (if any) for why the cart was abandoned.

attributes.name: cart_number
attributes.description: Business-facing cart identifier shown to customers and used in support.

attributes.name: cart_source
attributes.description: System or integration source that created the cart.

attributes.name: cart_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the cart.

attributes.name: coupon_code
attributes.description: Promotional coupon applied to the cart, if any.

attributes.name: coupon_discount_amount
attributes.description: Monetary value of the coupon discount.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the cart was initially created (business event time).

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: Three‑letter ISO currency code for monetary values.

attributes.name: device_type
attributes.description: Type of device used to create the cart.

attributes.name: discount_total_amount
attributes.description: Aggregate discount amount from coupons, promotions, and cart-level discounts.

attributes.name: estimated_delivery_date
attributes.description: Projected delivery date based on shipping method and inventory.

attributes.name: expiry_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the cart is scheduled to expire if not converted.

attributes.name: gift_message
attributes.description: Optional message entered by the shopper for the gift recipient.

attributes.name: ip_address
attributes.description: IP address of the client at cart creation.

attributes.name: is_gift
attributes.description: Indicates whether the cart is marked as a gift purchase.

attributes.name: item_count
attributes.business_glossary_term: Number of Distinct Items in Cart
attributes.description: Count of unique product SKUs in the cart.

attributes.name: last_activity_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp of the most recent interaction with the cart.

attributes.name: loyalty_points_applied
attributes.description: Number of loyalty points redeemed against the cart.

attributes.name: record_created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the cart record was first persisted in the data lake (audit).

attributes.name: record_updated_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp of the most recent update to the cart record (audit).

attributes.name: saved_for_later_flag
attributes.description: Indicates if the cart is marked as saved for later purchase.

attributes.name: shipping_fee_estimated_amount
attributes.description: Estimated shipping cost for the cart.

attributes.name: subtotal_amount
attributes.description: Sum of line-item prices before discounts, taxes, and shipping.

attributes.name: tax_estimated_amount
attributes.description: Estimated tax calculated for the cart based on jurisdiction.

attributes.name: total_estimated_amount
attributes.description: Final estimated amount payable after discounts, tax, and shipping.

attributes.name: total_quantity
attributes.business_glossary_term: Total Quantity of Items in Cart
attributes.description: Sum of quantities across all cart items.

attributes.name: total_volume_cm3
attributes.description: Aggregate volume of all items, used for logistics planning.

attributes.name: total_weight_kg
attributes.description: Aggregate weight of all items in the cart, used for shipping calculations.

attributes.name: user_agent
attributes.description: Browser or app user-agent string for the session.

attributes.name: version
attributes.description: Optimistic concurrency version number for the cart record.

products.name: cart_item
products.description: Individual line-level SKU entries within a shopping cart. Tracks SKU identifier, quantity requested, unit price at time of add-to-cart, seller ID for marketplace items, product variant details, and item-level promotional flags. Supports cart-to-order conversion analysis and CVR optimization.

attributes.name: cart_item_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the cart line item.

attributes.name: bundle_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the bundle to which this line belongs.

attributes.name: cart_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the shopping cart that contains this item.

attributes.name: marketplace_listing_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to marketplace.marketplace_listing. Business justification: When a buyer adds a marketplace listing to cart, the specific listing (seller, price, condition, buy-box winner) must be captured for price-lock integrity, listing-level conversion analytics, and aban

attributes.name: price_list_item_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to pricing.price_list_item. Business justification: Price audit and abandoned cart analysis require knowing which specific price_list_item was presented to the customer. Enables detection of price changes between cart creation and checkout, and support

attributes.name: primary_cart_sku_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.sku. Business justification: Required for real‑time inventory, pricing and fulfillment; cart item must map to the definitive SKU record used in downstream order processing.

attributes.name: seller_profile_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the marketplace seller offering the product.

attributes.name: stock_position_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to inventory.stock_position. Business justification: Real-time cart availability check: when a customer adds an item, the system queries stock_position for ATP qty, backorder status, and lot availability. E-commerce experts expect cart_item to reference

attributes.name: added_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the item was added to the cart.

attributes.name: backorder_estimate_date
attributes.description: Estimated date when the back‑ordered item will be available.

attributes.name: coupon_applied
attributes.description: True if a coupon was applied to this line.

attributes.name: coupon_code
attributes.description: Code of the coupon applied, if any.

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: Three‑letter ISO currency code for monetary values.

attributes.name: device_type
attributes.description: Type of device used during the add‑to‑cart action.

attributes.name: discount_amount
attributes.description: Monetary discount applied to this line item.

attributes.name: fulfillment_method
attributes.description: Chosen shipping or pickup method for the item.

attributes.name: gift_message
attributes.description: Optional message entered for the gift recipient.

attributes.name: ip_address
attributes.description: IP address of the client at the time of add‑to‑cart.

attributes.name: is_backorder
attributes.description: True if the item is currently back‑ordered.

attributes.name: is_bundle
attributes.description: True if the item is part of a product bundle.

attributes.name: is_gift
attributes.description: True if the item is marked as a gift.

attributes.name: is_preorder
attributes.description: True if the item is a preorder.

attributes.name: is_promotional
attributes.description: True if the item is part of a promotion.

attributes.name: is_tax_exempt
attributes.description: True if the line is exempt from tax.

attributes.name: item_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the cart line.

attributes.name: last_updated_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time of the most recent update to this cart line.

attributes.name: line_sequence
attributes.description: Ordinal position of the item within the cart.

attributes.name: line_total

products.name: header
products.description: The authoritative master record for a confirmed customer order within the OMS. Captures the full order header including order number, channel (B2C, B2B, marketplace, BOPIS, DTC), order placement timestamp, customer reference, billing address, total GMV, AOV contribution, tax amount, discount amount, currency, order status, SLA tier, and payment reference. This is the SSOT for order-level identity and lifecycle management across all channels.

attributes.name: header_id
attributes.description: Primary key for header

attributes.name: account_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to customer.account. Business justification: Required for B2B order processing: links each order to the corporate account used for billing and credit checks, enabling account‑level revenue and risk reporting.

attributes.name: audience_segment_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to marketing.audience_segment. Business justification: Required for Audience Segment ROI analysis: associates each order with the targeted audience segment, supporting segment‑level conversion and spend efficiency reports.

attributes.name: billing_address_order_address_id
attributes.description: Reference to the address used for billing purposes.

attributes.name: campaign_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to marketing.campaign. Business justification: Required for Campaign‑Order Performance tracking: directly ties an order to the originating marketing campaign (e.g., email or ad) for conversion and revenue attribution.

attributes.name: channel_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to marketing.channel. Business justification: Required for Order‑Channel Attribution Report: links each order to the marketing channel that drove it, enabling ROI calculations and channel performance dashboards.

attributes.name: contact_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to customer.contact. Business justification: Captures the B2B contact person responsible for the order, essential for order support, invoicing, and compliance audit trails.

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: REQUIRED: Allocate order fulfillment costs to a cost center for expense tracking and budgeting.

attributes.name: customer_profile_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to customer.customer_profile. Business justification: Guest checkout orders have no account_id but must still reference a customer profile for order history, GDPR data subject requests, and post-purchase communications. A direct header→customer_profile F

attributes.name: fulfillment_center_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the warehouse or fulfillment center assigned to the order.

attributes.name: header_order_address_id
attributes.description: Reference to the address where the order will be shipped.

attributes.name: legal_entity_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.legal_entity. Business justification: In multi-entity e-commerce operations, each order must be attributed to a legal entity for revenue recognition, intercompany accounting, VAT filing, and regulatory reporting. A finance domain expert w

attributes.name: loyalty_enrollment_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to customer.loyalty_enrollment. Business justification: Loyalty points accrual requires knowing the exact enrollment active at order placement — not just the program. This FK drives points-earn calculations, tier qualification spend tracking, and loyalty a

attributes.name: marketplace_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to marketplace.marketplace. Business justification: Orders must be attributed to a specific marketplace for GMV reporting, marketplace-level SLA compliance, regulatory jurisdiction enforcement, and seller fee structures. order_source is a plain-text de

attributes.name: merchant_account_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to payment.merchant_account. Business justification: REQUIRED: Reconciliation reports need the merchant account that processed each order; linking order_header to merchant_account enables accurate financial statements and audit trails.

attributes.name: payment_gateway_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to payment.gateway. Business justification: REQUIRED: Operational dashboards track which payment gateway handled each order for SLA monitoring and compliance; a FK from order_header to gateway provides this linkage.

attributes.name: payment_method_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to payment.payment_method. Business justification: REQUIRED: Storing the tokenized payment method used for an order enables refunds, recurring billing, and fraud analysis; the FK links order_header to payment_method.

attributes.name: price_list_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to pricing.price_list. Business justification: ORDER PRICING AUDIT: Each order is priced using a specific price list; storing price_list_id enables price source traceability for compliance reports.

attributes.name: price_zone_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to pricing.price_zone. Business justification: REGIONAL PRICING: Orders are assigned to a price zone to apply region‑specific pricing rules; FK required for zone‑based revenue analysis.

attributes.name: profit_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: REQUIRED: Assign each order to a profit center for profit‑center performance reporting.

attributes.name: segment_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to customer.segment. Business justification: Needed for segment‑based order analytics and targeted marketing, allowing each order to be attributed to the customer segment at time of purchase.

products.name: line
products.description: Individual SKU-level line items within a confirmed order. Captures SKU/ASIN/UPC, product name, quantity ordered/fulfilled, unit selling price, line-level discount, line total, seller ID for marketplace orders, fulfillment node assignment, line status, promised delivery date, and line-level tax details (jurisdiction, rate, amount, exemption status). Supports GMV decomposition, line-level fulfillment tracking, returns attribution, and tax compliance reporting.

attributes.description: Unique identifier for the order_order_line data product (auto-inserted pre-linking).

products.name: status_history
products.description: Immutable audit log of all order lifecycle state transitions for a sales order. Records each status change event (e.g., PLACED → CONFIRMED → ALLOCATED → SHIPPED → DELIVERED → CANCELLED), the timestamp of transition, the actor or system that triggered the change, and any associated reason codes. Enables SLA breach detection, order lifecycle analytics, and OMS orchestration tracing.
products.reference: Order Status Log / OMS Event Trail

attributes.name: status_history_id
attributes.description: Unique surrogate identifier for each status transition record.

attributes.name: account_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier of the actor (user, system, seller, etc.) that performed the transition.

attributes.name: header_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the order to which this status transition belongs.

attributes.name: support_case_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to service.service_support_case. Business justification: Order status changes triggered by service actions (RMA approvals, fraud holds, case-driven cancellations) require case linkage for audit trails, regulatory compliance reporting, and customer dispute r

attributes.name: actor_type
attributes.description: Category of the entity that triggered the status change.

attributes.name: comment
attributes.description: Free‑form text providing additional context for the status change.

attributes.name: is_system_generated
attributes.description: Indicates whether the transition was automatically generated by the system (true) or manually entered (false).

attributes.name: reason_code
attributes.description: Standardized code explaining why the status changed (e.g., payment_failed, inventory_allocated).

attributes.name: record_audit_created
attributes.description: Timestamp when this status history record was first inserted into the lakehouse.

attributes.name: record_audit_updated
attributes.description: Timestamp of the most recent update to this record (e.g., correction of comment).

attributes.name: sla_actual_seconds
attributes.description: Actual elapsed time between the previous status and this transition, in seconds.

attributes.name: sla_breach_flag
attributes.description: True if the actual duration exceeded the SLA target, otherwise false.

attributes.name: sla_target_seconds
attributes.description: Configured service‑level‑agreement target time for this status transition, expressed in seconds.

attributes.name: status_from
attributes.description: The order status before the transition occurred.

attributes.name: status_to
attributes.description: The order status after the transition occurred.

attributes.name: transition_timestamp
attributes.description: Exact date‑time when the status change was recorded.

products.name: order_address
products.description: Shipping and billing address records associated with a sales order. Stores address type (shipping/billing/pickup), recipient name, address lines, city, state/province, postal code, country, geolocation coordinates, address validation status, and residential vs. commercial flag. Supports last-mile delivery routing, tax jurisdiction determination, and fraud screening.

products.name: order_payment
products.description: Order-level payment allocation records linking a sales order to one or more payment transactions. Captures payment method type, payment reference from the payment gateway, amount allocated to this order, currency, payment status (authorized, captured, failed, refunded), split-payment flags, and gift card or store credit redemption amounts. This is the order domains local reference to payment events — it does NOT own gateway integration, PCI-scoped card data, or settlement processing (those belong to the payment domain). Enables order-level payment reconciliation, refund eligibility checks, and revenue recognition without crossing domain boundaries.

attributes.name: order_payment_id
attributes.description: Surrogate primary key for the order payment allocation record.

attributes.name: authorization_id

attributes.name: gateway_id

attributes.name: merchant_account_id

attributes.name: primary_payment_transaction_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the payment transaction from the payment gateway.

products.name: order_promotion

Captures promotion code, promotion type (percentage discount, fixed amount, BOGO, free shipping), discount amount applied, promotion source (marketing campaign, loyalty program, seller-funded), eligibility validation status, and stacking rules applied. Supports GMV-net-of-discount reporting and ROAS attribution.

attributes.name: promotion_rule_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to pricing.promotion_rule. Business justification: Compliance and audit processes require verifying the correct promotion_rule was applied to each order (correct discount value, stacking rules, max redemption limits). Without this FK, auditors cannot

attributes.name: promotional_campaign_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to pricing.promotional_campaign. Business justification: Promotion redemption reconciliation and promotional spend financial reporting require order_promotion to reference the specific pricing.promotional_campaign that authorized the discount. Pricing analy

attributes.name: seller_profile_id

attributes.name: applied_by

attributes.name: applied_timestamp

attributes.name: compliance_check_timestamp

attributes.name: discount_percentage

attributes.name: eligibility_status

attributes.name: end_date

attributes.name: is_refunded

attributes.name: max_uses_per_customer

attributes.name: max_uses_per_order

attributes.name: net_discount_amount

attributes.name: created_by
