attributes.description: Human‑readable name of the seller tier such as Bronze, Silver, Gold.

attributes.name: tier_rank
attributes.description: Ordinal rank of the tier; lower number indicates a higher tier.

attributes.name: tier_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the tier.

attributes.name: updated_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp of the most recent update to the tier record.

products.name: seller_bank_account
products.description: Stores verified bank account and payment disbursement method records for each seller. Captures account holder name, bank name, account type (checking/savings/business), account number (tokenized/masked per PCI DSS), routing number, IBAN, SWIFT/BIC code, currency, country, verification status (pending/verified/failed), primary payout flag, and date verified. A seller may have multiple bank accounts across currencies. Directly referenced by seller_payout for disbursement routing. PCI DSS-compliant storage with tokenization.

attributes.name: seller_bank_account_id
attributes.description: System-generated unique identifier for the seller bank account record.

attributes.name: finance_bank_account_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.finance_bank_account. Business justification: Seller bank accounts receive payouts disbursed from the platform's finance bank accounts. Treasury cash management and payout routing processes track which platform bank account disburses to each sell

attributes.name: seller_profile_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to seller.seller_profile. Business justification: Bank account records belong to a seller; linking enables aggregation of payouts, compliance tracking, and eliminates orphan bank account records.

attributes.name: account_holder_name
attributes.description: Legal name of the individual or organization that owns the bank account.

attributes.name: account_nickname
attributes.description: User‑defined friendly name for the bank account (e.g., "US‑USD Account").

attributes.name: account_number
attributes.description: Tokenized or masked bank account number stored in PCI‑DSS compliant vault.

attributes.name: account_type
attributes.description: Classification of the bank account (e.g., checking, savings, business).

attributes.name: bank_name
attributes.description: Name of the financial institution where the account is held.

attributes.name: compliance_status
attributes.description: Indicates whether the account meets PCI‑DSS and regulatory compliance requirements.

attributes.name: country_code
attributes.description: Three‑letter ISO country code where the bank account is domiciled.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the bank account record was first created in the system.

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: Three‑letter ISO currency code of the account (e.g., USD, EUR).

attributes.name: data_retention_period_days
attributes.description: Number of days the bank account data must be retained per regulatory policy.

attributes.name: date_verified
attributes.description: Calendar date on which the bank account was successfully verified.

attributes.name: disbursement_limit
attributes.description: Maximum monetary amount that can be disbursed to this account per transaction or period.

attributes.name: disbursement_limit_currency
attributes.description: Currency of the disbursement limit amount.

attributes.name: iban
attributes.description: Standardized international account identifier per ISO 13616.

attributes.name: last_used_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp of the most recent payout made to this bank account.

attributes.name: primary_payout_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this account is the default payout method for the seller.

attributes.name: routing_number
attributes.description: Domestic routing identifier for the bank (e.g., ABA routing number in the US).

attributes.name: seller_bank_account_status
attributes.description: Overall lifecycle state of the bank account record.

attributes.name: swift_bic
attributes.description: Bank Identifier Code used for international transfers.

attributes.name: tokenization_method
attributes.description: Method used to protect the account number (e.g., vault, detokenize, none).

attributes.name: updated_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp of the most recent update to the bank account record.

attributes.name: verification_status
attributes.description: Current verification state of the bank account (pending, verified, or failed).

attributes.name: verification_status_date
attributes.description: Date and time when the verification status was last updated.

domains.name: fulfillment
domains.description: Manages pick-pack-ship operations, warehouse workflows, order allocation, packing slips, shipping labels, and fulfillment SLA tracking. Supports FBA-style fulfillment center operations, 3PL partner coordination, BOPIS orchestration, and proof-of-delivery records. Integrates with WMS and TMS for end-to-end fulfillment execution.

products.name: center
products.description: Master record for each physical fulfillment center (FC) or warehouse node in the fulfillment network. Captures FC identity, type (FBA-style, 3PL, BOPIS hub, dark store), geographic location, operational capacity, supported fulfillment methods, WMS integration identifiers, and SLA tier assignments. SSOT for all warehouse facility master data within the fulfillment domain.

attributes.name: center_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the fulfillment center. Primary key for the center entity.

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Maps each fulfillment center to its operational cost center, essential for budgeting, cost allocation, and expense tracking.

attributes.name: default_carrier_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to logistics.carrier. Business justification: Default carrier per fulfillment center drives automated carrier selection in the 'Shipment Creation' workflow.

attributes.name: manager_agent_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to service.agent. Business justification: Each fulfillment center is overseen by a manager agent responsible for operations; linking enables manager‑level performance dashboards and incident escalation.

attributes.name: operator_supplier_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to procurement.supplier. Business justification: 3PL-operated fulfillment centers must be linked to their supplier record for contract management, performance scoring, and invoice reconciliation. partner_operator_name is a denormalized text field th

attributes.name: price_zone_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to pricing.price_zone. Business justification: Fulfillment centers operate within geographic price zones that govern regional shipping rates and delivery cost structures. E-commerce domain experts expect each fulfillment center to be mapped to a p

attributes.name: profit_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Fulfillment centers are managed as profit centers in e-commerce operations — each center's revenue, cost, and margin are tracked separately for management reporting. center has cost_center_id but no p

attributes.name: vendor_contract_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to procurement.vendor_contract. Business justification: Each 3PL-operated fulfillment center is governed by a specific vendor contract covering capacity commitments, service levels, and fees. Direct FK enables contract renewal tracking, expiry alerts, and

attributes.name: warehouse_node_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to inventory.warehouse_node. Business justification: Maps each fulfillment center to its physical warehouse node, essential for inventory balance reports and location‑based replenishment.

attributes.name: address_line_1
attributes.description: Primary street address line for the fulfillment center physical location, including street number and name.

attributes.name: address_line_2
attributes.description: Secondary address line for additional location details such as building, suite, or floor number.

attributes.name: automation_level
attributes.description: Degree of automation in fulfillment operations: manual (human-driven), semi-automated (mix of manual and automated processes), fully automated (end-to-end automation), or robotic (advanced robotics and AI).

attributes.name: available_capacity_units
attributes.description: Current available storage capacity in the fulfillment center, representing unused storage units available for new inventory allocation.

attributes.name: capacity_unit_of_measure
attributes.description: Unit of measurement used to quantify storage capacity: pallets, bins, cubic feet, cubic meters, square feet, or square meters.

attributes.name: center_code
attributes.description: Externally-known unique alphanumeric code for the fulfillment center, used in operational systems and partner integrations.

attributes.name: center_name
attributes.description: Human-readable name of the fulfillment center, used for display and reporting purposes.

attributes.name: center_type
attributes.description: Classification of the fulfillment center based on operational model: FBA-style (Fulfillment By Amazon-style), 3PL (Third-Party Logistics), BOPIS (Buy Online Pick Up In Store) hub, dark store, micro-fulfillment center, or returns processing center.

attributes.name: city
attributes.description: City or municipality where the fulfillment center is located.

attributes.name: closed_date
attributes.description: Date when the fulfillment center ceased operations, applicable only if the center has been decommissioned or permanently closed.

attributes.name: contact_email
attributes.description: Primary contact email address for the fulfillment center operations team, used for internal coordination and partner communication.

attributes.name: contact_phone
attributes.description: Primary contact phone number for the fulfillment center operations team, used for internal coordination and partner communication.

attributes.name: country_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO country code identifying the country where the fulfillment center is located.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this fulfillment center record was first created in the system, used for audit trail and data lineage tracking.

attributes.name: cutoff_time_local
attributes.description: Daily cutoff time in local time zone (HH:MM format) by which orders must be received to qualify for same-day processing and shipment.

attributes.name: daily_throughput_capacity
attributes.description: Maximum number of orders or units the fulfillment center can process per day under normal operating conditions, used for capacity planning and order allocation.

attributes.name: erp_site_code
attributes.description: Site or plant code in the ERP system (e.g., SAP S/4HANA) that corresponds to this fulfillment center, used for financial and supply chain integration.

attributes.name: latitude
attributes.description: Geographic latitude coordinate of the fulfillment center location, used for distance calculations and route optimization.

attributes.name: longitude
attributes.description: Geographic longitude coordinate of the fulfillment center location, used for distance calculations and route optimization.

attributes.name: notes
attributes.description: Free-text field for additional operational notes, special handling instructions, or facility-specific information relevant to fulfillment operations.

attributes.name: opened_date
attributes.description: Date when the fulfillment center commenced operations and began processing orders.

attributes.name: operates_24_7
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the fulfillment center operates continuously (true) or has scheduled operating hours (false).

attributes.name: operating_hours
attributes.description: Standard operating hours for the fulfillment center if not 24/7, formatted as day ranges and time ranges (e.g., Mon-Fri 08:00-18:00, Sat 09:00-15:00).

attributes.name: operational_status
attributes.description: Current operational state of the fulfillment center in its lifecycle: active (fully operational), inactive (not processing orders), under construction (pre-launch), temporarily closed (planned downtime), decommissioned (permanently closed), or seasonal (operates during peak periods only).

attributes.name: ownership_model
attributes.description: Ownership and operational model of the fulfillment center: owned (company-owned and operated), leased (company-operated but leased facility), third-party operated (3PL partner), or hybrid (shared operations).

attributes.name: postal_code
attributes.description: Postal or ZIP code for the fulfillment center address, used for shipping and logistics routing.

attributes.name: sla_tier
attributes.description: Service level tier assigned to this fulfillment center, defining performance commitments for order processing and delivery speed: premium (fastest), standard, economy, regional, express, or custom.
attributes.references: ITIL (Information Technology Infrastructure Library) Service Management

attributes.name: standard_processing_time_hours
attributes.description: Standard time in hours from order receipt to shipment dispatch under normal operating conditions, used for SLA calculations and customer promise dates.

attributes.name: state_province
attributes.description: State, province, or administrative region where the fulfillment center is located.

attributes.name: supported_fulfillment_methods
attributes.description: Comma-separated list of fulfillment methods supported by this center: standard_shipping, expedited_shipping, same_day_delivery, next_day_delivery, bopis, ship_from_store, white_glove, etc.

attributes.name: supports_cold_storage
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the fulfillment center has refrigerated or frozen storage capabilities for temperature-sensitive products.

attributes.name: supports_hazmat
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the fulfillment center is certified and equipped to handle hazardous materials shipments.
attributes.references: DOT (Department of Transportation) Hazardous Materials Regulations

attributes.name: supports_returns_processing
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the fulfillment center is equipped to receive, inspect, and process customer returns and RMA (Return Merchandise Authorization) requests.

attributes.name: time_zone
attributes.description: IANA time zone identifier for the fulfillment center location, used for scheduling and SLA calculations.

attributes.name: tms_integration_reference
attributes.description: External system identifier used to integrate with the Transportation Management System (TMS) for carrier selection and shipment tracking.

attributes.name: total_capacity_units
attributes.description: Maximum storage capacity of the fulfillment center measured in storage units (pallets, bins, or cubic feet), representing the total inventory holding capacity.

attributes.name: updated_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this fulfillment center record was last modified, used for audit trail and change tracking.

attributes.name: wms_integration_reference
attributes.description: External system identifier used to integrate with the WMS for real-time inventory synchronization and order orchestration.

attributes.name: wms_system_name
attributes.description: Name of the Warehouse Management System (WMS) software deployed at this fulfillment center for inventory and operations management.

products.name: fulfillment_order
products.description: Core operational record representing a fulfillment instruction issued to a warehouse or 3PL partner for a specific customer order or sub-order. Tracks fulfillment order status (received, allocated, picking, packed, shipped, delivered, cancelled), assigned fulfillment center, fulfillment method (standard, expedited, BOPIS, FBA-style, 3PL), promised SLA window, actual pick/pack/ship timestamps, and WMS/OMS reference identifiers. Central entity for pick-pack-ship orchestration.

attributes.name: fulfillment_order_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the fulfillment order. Primary key for the fulfillment order entity.

attributes.name: account_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to customer.account. Business justification: B2B e-commerce fulfillment orders are placed against a customer account for credit limit validation, account-level order history, and B2B invoicing. A domain expert expects fulfillment_order to refere

attributes.name: accounts_receivable_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.accounts_receivable. Business justification: AR is created upon fulfillment completion in e-commerce. Finance teams reconcile AR aging against fulfilled orders to confirm cash application. accounts_receivable.header_id links to order header, but

attributes.name: bundle_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.bundle. Business justification: Bundle fulfillment is a distinct e-commerce process requiring kit assembly, multi-SKU picking coordination, and bundle-level SLA tracking. Operations teams need to identify which fulfillment orders ar

attributes.name: campaign_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to marketing.campaign. Business justification: Required for order‑to‑campaign ROI attribution report; e‑commerce analysts need to trace each fulfillment order back to the marketing campaign that generated it.

attributes.name: carrier_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to logistics.carrier. Business justification: Order‑level carrier assignment is used in the 'Order Fulfillment Planning' process and carrier performance dashboards.

attributes.name: carrier_service_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to logistics.carrier_service. Business justification: Tracking the specific carrier service (e.g., Express, Ground) per order supports SLA compliance reporting and rate calculations.

attributes.name: customer_address_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to customer.customer_address. Business justification: Links fulfillment orders to the structured customer address record for carrier serviceability checks (serviceable_by_carrier), BOPIS eligibility validation, and address-level fulfillment analytics. Sn

attributes.name: customer_profile_id
attributes.description: Reference to the customer who placed the order being fulfilled. Links to the Customer master data entity.

attributes.name: fulfillment_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to fulfillment.center. Business justification: A fulfillment order is issued to a specific fulfillment center for execution. This is a core operational relationship — every fulfillment instruction must be assigned to a physical FC node. No center_

attributes.name: header_id
attributes.description: Reference to the originating sales order in the Order Management System (OMS) that triggered this fulfillment instruction.

attributes.name: product_listing_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.product_listing. Business justification: Fulfillment orders originate from a specific product listing (channel, condition, seller). Marketplace sellers track fulfillment performance per listing for SLA compliance, buy-box eligibility, and ch

attributes.name: profit_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Enables order‑level profit attribution, allowing profitability analysis per profit center in financial statements.

attributes.name: promotional_campaign_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to pricing.promotional_campaign. Business justification: Fulfillment orders generated during promotional campaigns (flash sales, event-driven surges) must reference the pricing promotional_campaign for SLA prioritization, cost allocation, and campaign perfo

attributes.name: sla_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to fulfillment.fulfillment_sla. Business justification: Each fulfillment order is governed by a specific SLA definition (fulfillment_sla) that determines pick/pack/ship time targets and breach thresholds based on fulfillment method, carrier service level,

attributes.name: warehouse_node_id
attributes.description: Reference to the fulfillment center or warehouse node assigned to execute this fulfillment order. Links to the warehouse node master data.

attributes.name: allocated_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp when inventory was successfully allocated to this fulfillment order in the WMS. Marks transition from received to allocated status.

attributes.name: cancellation_reason
attributes.description: The business reason why this fulfillment order was cancelled. Used for root cause analysis and process improvement.

attributes.name: cancelled_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp when the fulfillment order was cancelled. Triggers inventory de-allocation and order management system notification.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp when this fulfillment order record was first created in the system. Used for audit trail and data lineage tracking.

attributes.name: delivered_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp when the package was successfully delivered to the customer destination address. Sourced from carrier proof-of-delivery records.

attributes.name: fulfillment_method
attributes.description: The fulfillment execution strategy for this order. Determines Service Level Agreement (SLA) targets, routing logic, and carrier selection. BOPIS = Buy Online Pick Up In Store, FBA = Fulfillment By Amazon-style, 3PL = Third-Party Logistics. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: standard|expedited|same_day|next_day|bopis|fba|3pl — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]
attributes.references: Council of Supply Chain Management Professionals (CSCMP) - Supply Chain Terminology

attributes.name: fulfillment_order_number
attributes.description: Human-readable business identifier for the fulfillment order, typically displayed on packing slips, shipping labels, and in Warehouse Management System (WMS) interfaces.
attributes.references: ISO/IEC 15459 - Unique Identifiers for Transport Units

attributes.name: fulfillment_order_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the fulfillment order. Tracks progression through warehouse workflow stages from receipt to delivery. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: received|allocated|picking|packed|shipped|delivered|cancelled — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: gift_message
attributes.description: Optional personalized message to be included with gift orders. Printed on packing slip or gift card insert.

attributes.name: is_gift
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this order is a gift. When true, pricing information is excluded from packing slip and gift wrapping may be applied.

attributes.name: order_type
attributes.description: Classification of the order based on business context. B2C = Business to Consumer, B2B = Business to Business. Determines packing requirements, documentation, and invoicing rules.
attributes.references: Council of Supply Chain Management Professionals (CSCMP) - Supply Chain Terminology

attributes.name: package_count
attributes.description: The number of individual packages or parcels created for this fulfillment order. Orders may be split into multiple packages based on size, weight, or inventory location.

attributes.name: packing_completed_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp when all items were packed, shipping label applied, and the package was ready for carrier pickup.

attributes.name: packing_slip_url
attributes.description: URL to the generated packing slip document that accompanies the shipment. Contains itemized order details for customer reference.

attributes.name: packing_started_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp when packing operations began for this fulfillment order at the packing station.

attributes.name: picking_completed_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp when all items for this fulfillment order were successfully picked from warehouse locations.

attributes.name: picking_started_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp when warehouse personnel began picking items for this fulfillment order. Marks start of physical fulfillment execution.

attributes.name: priority_level
attributes.description: Priority classification for warehouse pick-pack-ship sequencing. High and urgent priorities are expedited through the fulfillment workflow.

attributes.name: promised_delivery_date
attributes.description: The date by which the order is promised to be delivered to the customer. Used for SLA tracking and customer communication.

attributes.name: promised_ship_date
attributes.description: The date by which the fulfillment center committed to ship this order to meet customer Service Level Agreement (SLA) expectations.

attributes.name: received_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp when the fulfillment order was received by the Warehouse Management System (WMS) from the Order Management System (OMS).

attributes.name: recipient_name
attributes.description: The full name of the person or business receiving the shipment. Printed on shipping label for carrier delivery verification.

attributes.name: recipient_phone
attributes.description: Contact phone number for the shipment recipient. Used by carriers for delivery coordination and customer notification.

attributes.name: shipped_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp when the package was handed over to the carrier and departed the fulfillment center. Triggers customer shipment notification.

attributes.name: shipping_address_line1
attributes.description: The primary street address line for the delivery destination. Contains street number, street name, and unit/apartment number if applicable.
attributes.references: Universal Postal Union (UPU) S42 - International Postal Address Components

attributes.name: shipping_address_line2
attributes.description: Secondary address line for additional delivery instructions, building name, or suite information.
attributes.references: Universal Postal Union (UPU) S42 - International Postal Address Components

attributes.name: shipping_city
attributes.description: The city or municipality name for the delivery destination address.
attributes.references: Universal Postal Union (UPU) S42 - International Postal Address Components

attributes.name: shipping_country_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO country code for the delivery destination. Determines customs requirements and international shipping regulations.

attributes.name: shipping_label_url
attributes.description: URL to the generated shipping label document stored in the Content Delivery Network (CDN) or document management system.

attributes.name: shipping_postal_code
attributes.description: The postal code or ZIP code for the delivery destination address. Used for carrier routing and delivery zone determination.
attributes.references: Universal Postal Union (UPU) S42 - International Postal Address Components

attributes.name: shipping_state_province
attributes.description: The state, province, or administrative region for the delivery destination address.

attributes.name: special_instructions
attributes.description: Free-text field for special handling requirements, delivery instructions, or customer notes. Examples: fragile, signature required, leave at door.

attributes.name: total_item_quantity
attributes.description: The total number of individual units (across all Stock Keeping Units or SKUs) included in this fulfillment order.

attributes.name: total_volume_m3
attributes.description: The total packed volume of the fulfillment order in cubic meters. Used for warehouse space planning and transportation optimization.
attributes.references: ISO 80000-3 - Quantities and Units - Space and Time

attributes.name: total_weight_kg
attributes.description: The total packed weight of the fulfillment order in kilograms. Used for carrier rate calculation and capacity planning.
attributes.references: ISO 80000-3 - Quantities and Units - Space and Time

attributes.name: tracking_number
attributes.description: The carrier-provided tracking number for this shipment. Used for customer self-service tracking and proof-of-delivery verification.
attributes.references: ISO 15459 - Unique Identifiers for Transport Units

attributes.name: updated_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp when this fulfillment order record was last modified. Tracks the most recent change to any field in the record.

products.name: order_line
products.description: Line-level detail for each SKU within a fulfillment order, serving as the unified pick-and-allocate record. Captures SKU identifier, ordered/allocated/picked/packed quantities, unit of measure, bin/slot location at time of pick, substitution flags, line-level fulfillment status, assigned picker (associate ID or robot unit), pick zone, pick method (single-order, batch, zone, wave), pick start/completion timestamps, pick exceptions (short pick, mispick), and confirmation status. SSOT for SKU-level fulfillment execution including pick task assignment and completion within the WMS workflow.
products.reference: Pick List Line / Order Line Item

attributes.name: order_line_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for each line item within a fulfillment order. Primary key for the order line entity.

attributes.name: bin_location_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to fulfillment.bin_location. Business justification: During the pick operation, each fulfillment order line is picked from a specific physical bin location within the fulfillment center. Linking fulfillment_order_line to bin_location enables pick-path o

attributes.name: bundle_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.bundle. Business justification: Bundle assembly picking requires each order line to know which parent bundle it belongs to. Warehouse systems use this to group component picks, enforce bundle completeness before packing, and report

attributes.name: catalog_item_id
attributes.description: Internal product master identifier linking this line to the product catalog. Used for product attribute enrichment and reporting.

attributes.name: fulfillment_order_id
attributes.description: Reference to the parent fulfillment order that contains this line item. Links line-level detail to the order header.

attributes.name: line_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to order.order_line. Business justification: Line-level fulfillment traceability: each fulfillment_order_line must map to its originating order_line for partial fulfillment tracking, returns eligibility, revenue recognition per line, and fulfill

attributes.name: listing_offer_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to marketplace.listing_offer. Business justification: Supports Offer Performance Analytics by linking each order line to the specific listing offer purchased, enabling pricing and conversion analysis.

attributes.name: po_line_item_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to procurement.po_line_item. Business justification: Each sales order line is sourced from a specific PO line item; linking enables cost allocation, inventory traceability, and three‑way matching.

attributes.name: price_list_item_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to pricing.price_list_item. Business justification: Traceability of the exact price list item used for each order line; needed for the Line‑Level Price Audit report.

attributes.name: price_override_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to pricing.price_override. Business justification: Individual fulfillment order lines may carry price overrides (manual discounts, B2B negotiated prices, CS adjustments). Linking to price_override enables audit trails and approval workflow tracking fo

attributes.name: sku_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.sku. Business justification: Required for the 'Pick and Pack' process to map each order line to the exact SKU for inventory allocation and performance reporting.

attributes.name: stock_position_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to inventory.stock_position. Business justification: In e-commerce WMS pick operations, each order line resolves to a specific stock_position (lot, condition, location) for ATP validation, inventory deduction, and lot traceability. fulfillment_order_lin

attributes.name: warehouse_location_id
attributes.description: Identifier for the specific bin, slot, or location within the warehouse where the item was picked from. Critical for inventory accuracy and replenishment.

attributes.name: allocated_quantity
attributes.description: Quantity of inventory allocated to this order line from warehouse stock. May differ from ordered quantity due to availability constraints.

attributes.name: confirmation_status
attributes.description: Status indicating whether the pick has been confirmed and validated. Used for quality control and accuracy verification.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this order line record was first created in the system. Marks the beginning of the line item lifecycle.

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO currency code for the line item pricing. Supports multi-currency fulfillment operations.

attributes.name: expiration_date
attributes.description: Expiration or best-before date of the picked item. Critical for perishable goods and FEFO inventory rotation.

attributes.name: gift_message
attributes.description: Customer-provided gift message to be included with this line item. Contains personal message content for gift orders.

attributes.name: gift_wrap_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether gift wrapping service was requested for this line item. True if gift wrap required, false otherwise.

attributes.name: hazmat_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this line item contains hazardous materials requiring special handling and shipping compliance. True if hazardous, false otherwise.

attributes.name: line_status
attributes.description: Current fulfillment status of this order line. Tracks the line through the pick-pack-ship workflow lifecycle. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: PENDING|ALLOCATED|PICKING|PICKED|PACKED|SHIPPED|CANCELLED|SHORT_PICK — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: line_total_amount
attributes.description: Total monetary value for this line item calculated as unit price multiplied by packed quantity. Represents the line-level revenue.

attributes.name: lot_number
attributes.description: Manufacturing lot or batch number of the picked item. Critical for traceability, recalls, and expiration management.

attributes.name: ordered_quantity
attributes.description: Quantity of the SKU originally ordered by the customer. Represents the demand that must be fulfilled.

attributes.name: pack_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this line item was packed into a shipping container. Indicates readiness for shipment.

attributes.name: packed_quantity
attributes.description: Quantity successfully packed into shipping containers. Represents the final quantity being shipped to the customer.

attributes.name: pick_completion_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the pick task for this line item was completed. Marks the end of the picking phase for this line.

attributes.name: pick_exception_code
attributes.description: Code indicating any exception or issue encountered during the pick process. Used for root cause analysis and process improvement.

attributes.name: pick_exception_notes
attributes.description: Free-text notes providing additional context about pick exceptions or issues. Captured by warehouse associates for investigation.

attributes.name: pick_method
attributes.description: The picking strategy used for this line item. Determines how the pick task was organized and executed within the WMS workflow.

attributes.name: pick_start_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the pick task for this line item was initiated. Used for calculating pick duration and SLA compliance.

attributes.name: picked_quantity
attributes.description: Actual quantity picked by warehouse associate or automation system. May differ from allocated quantity due to short picks or inventory discrepancies.

attributes.name: return_eligible_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this line item is eligible for return based on product category and business rules. True if returnable, false otherwise.

attributes.name: serial_number
attributes.description: Unique serial number of the individual item picked. Used for high-value or serialized inventory tracking.

attributes.name: source_system
attributes.description: The operational system that originated or last updated this order line record. Used for data lineage and integration troubleshooting.

attributes.name: special_handling_instructions
attributes.description: Any special handling requirements or instructions for this line item such as fragile, keep refrigerated, or this side up.

attributes.name: substituted_sku
attributes.description: The SKU of the substitute product that was picked in place of the originally ordered SKU. Null if no substitution occurred.

attributes.name: substitution_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether a product substitution was made for this line item due to stockout or customer preference. True if substituted, false otherwise.

attributes.name: unit_of_measure
attributes.description: The unit in which quantities are measured for this line item. Defines how the product is counted and handled in the warehouse.

attributes.name: unit_price
attributes.description: Price per unit for this line item at the time of order placement. Used for order value calculation and financial reconciliation.

attributes.name: updated_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this order line record was last modified. Used for change tracking and data synchronization.

attributes.name: volume_cubic_meters
attributes.description: Total volume of the picked quantity for this line item in cubic meters. Used for cartonization and space optimization.

attributes.name: weight_kg
attributes.description: Total weight of the picked quantity for this line item in kilograms. Used for shipping cost calculation and carrier selection.

products.name: packing_slip
products.description: Consolidated operational record and SSOT for the full packing lifecycle of a fulfillment order — from pack station assignment and carton selection through QC verification and packing slip document generation. Stores pack station ID, packer associate, carton/box type, dimensional and actual weight, packing materials, QC scan results, packed SKUs with quantities, special handling instructions, gift message and branded insert flags, pack start/end timestamps, and generation timestamp. Serves as both the operational pack execution record (replacing standalone pack task) and the customer-facing documentation reference for shipment contents and returns processing.

attributes.name: packing_slip_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the packing slip record. Primary key for the packing slip entity.

attributes.name: carrier_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to logistics.carrier. Business justification: Carrier assignment for packing slips is required for carrier billing and performance reporting; linking provides authoritative carrier data.

attributes.name: fulfillment_order_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to fulfillment.fulfillment_order. Business justification: A packing slip is the operational document for the packing lifecycle of a fulfillment order. The direct link to fulfillment_order (the instruction) is essential for packing workflow management and ord

attributes.name: fulfillment_shipment_id
attributes.description: Reference to the shipment record associated with this packing slip. Links the packed carton to the outbound shipment.

attributes.name: header_id
attributes.description: Reference to the parent fulfillment order that this packing slip belongs to. Links the packing slip to the originating customer order.

attributes.name: warehouse_node_id
attributes.description: Reference to the fulfillment center or warehouse where the packing operation was performed.

attributes.name: actual_weight_kg
attributes.description: Actual measured weight of the packed carton in kilograms, including all contents and packing materials. Captured at the pack station scale.

attributes.name: branded_insert_included
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether branded marketing inserts, promotional materials, or catalog cards were included in the shipment.

attributes.name: carton_code
attributes.description: Unique identifier or barcode of the specific carton or container used for this shipment. Used for tracking and inventory management of packing materials.

attributes.name: carton_type
attributes.description: Type or size classification of the shipping carton or box used for packing. Examples include small box, medium box, large box, envelope, poly mailer.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the packing slip record was first created in the system. Represents the initial record creation for audit and tracking purposes.

attributes.name: customer_notes
attributes.description: Free-text field containing any customer-provided delivery instructions or notes that should be visible to the packer or carrier. Examples include gate codes, delivery preferences, or special requests.

attributes.name: dimensional_weight_kg
attributes.description: Calculated dimensional weight of the packed carton in kilograms, based on carton dimensions. Used for carrier billing and rate calculation.

attributes.name: document_generation_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the packing slip document was generated and printed. Represents the official creation time of the customer-facing packing slip.

attributes.name: gift_message_included
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether a gift message was included in the shipment. True if a gift message card or note was packed with the order.

attributes.name: gift_wrap_applied
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether gift wrapping was applied to the items in this shipment. True if gift wrap service was requested and applied.

attributes.name: hazmat_flag
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the shipment contains hazardous materials requiring special handling, labeling, or carrier compliance. True if any packed item is classified as hazmat.

attributes.name: height_cm
attributes.description: Height dimension of the packed carton in centimeters. Used for dimensional weight calculation and carrier compliance.

attributes.name: invoice_included
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether a printed invoice or receipt was included in the shipment. Typically false for B2C gift orders, true for B2B orders.

attributes.name: length_cm
attributes.description: Length dimension of the packed carton in centimeters. Used for dimensional weight calculation and carrier compliance.

attributes.name: modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the packing slip record was last modified or updated. Used for audit trail and change tracking.

attributes.name: pack_end_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the packing operation was completed and the carton was sealed. Used for cycle time analysis and productivity tracking.

attributes.name: pack_start_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the packing operation began at the pack station. Used for cycle time analysis and productivity tracking.

attributes.name: packing_exception_code
attributes.description: Code indicating any exception or issue encountered during the packing process, such as damaged item, missing item, substitution made, or oversized package. Null if no exceptions occurred.

attributes.name: packing_exception_notes
attributes.description: Free-text description of any packing exceptions or issues, providing additional context beyond the exception code. Null if no exceptions occurred.

attributes.name: packing_materials_used
attributes.description: Comma-separated list or description of packing materials used in the shipment, such as bubble wrap, air pillows, packing peanuts, paper fill, or dunnage. Used for cost tracking and sustainability reporting.

attributes.name: packing_slip_number
attributes.description: Human-readable business identifier for the packing slip document. Printed on the physical packing slip and used for customer service reference.

attributes.name: packing_slip_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the packing slip record. Tracks the progression from draft through completion and any subsequent actions like reprinting or voiding.

attributes.name: qc_scan_result
attributes.description: Result of the quality control scan or verification performed during or after packing. Indicates whether the packed contents match the order requirements.

attributes.name: qc_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the quality control scan or verification was completed. Null if QC was not performed.

attributes.name: return_label_included
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether a prepaid return shipping label was included in the shipment for customer convenience.

attributes.name: service_level
attributes.description: Shipping service level or speed selected for this shipment. Examples include standard ground, two-day, next-day, same-day, or economy.

attributes.name: shipping_label_printed
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the shipping label has been printed for this packing slip. True once the label is generated and printed at the pack station.

attributes.name: signature_required
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether a delivery signature is required for this shipment. True for high-value or restricted items.

attributes.name: special_handling_instructions
attributes.description: Free-text field containing any special handling instructions for the packing operation, such as fragile item handling, temperature control, or hazmat requirements.

attributes.name: total_item_quantity
attributes.description: Total count of individual items (units) packed in this carton across all SKUs. Sum of quantities for all line items in the packing slip.

attributes.name: total_sku_count
attributes.description: Total count of distinct SKUs packed in this carton. Represents the variety of products in the shipment.

attributes.name: tracking_number
attributes.description: Carrier-provided tracking number for the shipment. Used by customers and customer service to track package delivery status.

attributes.name: width_cm
attributes.description: Width dimension of the packed carton in centimeters. Used for dimensional weight calculation and carrier compliance.

products.name: shipping_label
products.description: Master record and SSOT for each shipping label generated for an outbound shipment, incorporating the full carrier selection, rate-shopping, and label generation lifecycle. Stores carrier SCAC code, tracking number, label format (ZPL, PDF), service level (ground, 2-day, overnight, same-day), origin and destination address snapshots, label generation timestamp, carrier rate quoted, rate basis (weight, dimensional weight, zone), carrier selection method (cheapest, fastest, preferred, TMS-optimized), manual override flag, selection timestamp, label void status, and TMS reference identifier. Unified record for carrier assignment decision and physical label artifact; integrates with TMS for carrier selection and rate shopping.

attributes.name: shipping_label_id
attributes.description: Unique system-generated identifier for the shipping label record.

attributes.name: carrier_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to logistics.carrier. Business justification: Shipping label generation needs carrier reference for tracking, customs, and cost allocation; FK ensures consistency with carrier master.

attributes.name: carrier_rate_card_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to logistics.carrier_rate_card. Business justification: Carrier cost reconciliation and rate audit: each shipping label is generated using a specific rate card. Finance and ops teams run carrier invoice reconciliation reports that require tracing which rat

attributes.name: carrier_service_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to logistics.carrier_service. Business justification: Label rate selection and SLA compliance reporting: a shipping label is generated for a specific carrier service (e.g., overnight, ground). Carrier performance dashboards and SLA breach analysis requir

attributes.name: fulfillment_order_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to fulfillment.fulfillment_order. Business justification: A shipping label is generated for a fulfillment order's outbound shipment. The direct in-domain link to fulfillment_order enables label-to-order traceability without requiring a join through fulfillme

attributes.name: fulfillment_shipment_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the outbound shipment associated with this label.

attributes.name: header_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the order associated with this shipping label.

attributes.name: adjustment_amount
attributes.description: Any surcharge, discount, or fee applied to the base carrier rate.

attributes.name: carrier_rate_amount
attributes.description: Base rate quoted by the carrier before adjustments.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the shipping label record was first created in the system.

attributes.name: customs_declaration_flag
attributes.description: True if a customs declaration is required for the shipment.

attributes.name: customs_value
attributes.description: Declared monetary value for customs purposes.

attributes.name: destination_address_snapshot
attributes.description: Serialized snapshot of the destination address at label generation time.

attributes.name: dimensions_cm
attributes.description: Package dimensions formatted as LxWxH in centimeters.

attributes.name: generated_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the shipping label was generated.

attributes.name: insurance_amount
attributes.description: Monetary value of the insurance coverage for the shipment.

attributes.name: insurance_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the shipment is insured.

attributes.name: label_format
attributes.description: File format of the generated shipping label.

attributes.name: label_number
attributes.description: Business identifier assigned to the shipping label, used for tracking and reference.

attributes.name: manual_override_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether a user manually overrode the automated carrier selection.

attributes.name: origin_address_snapshot
attributes.description: Serialized snapshot of the origin address at label generation time.

attributes.name: package_type
attributes.description: Physical packaging type used for the shipment.

attributes.name: rate_basis
attributes.description: Basis used for carrier rate calculation (weight, dimensional weight, or zone).

attributes.name: rate_currency
attributes.description: Three‑letter ISO currency code for the carrier rate.

attributes.name: selection_method
attributes.description: Algorithm or rule used to select the carrier for this label.

attributes.name: selection_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the carrier selection (automated or manual) occurred.

attributes.name: shipping_label_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle state of the shipping label.

attributes.name: tms_reference_code
attributes.business_glossary_term: Transportation Management System Reference ID (TMS Ref)
attributes.description: Identifier linking this label to the TMS transaction or batch.

attributes.name: total_amount
attributes.description: Final cost of the shipping label after adjustments, in the specified currency.

attributes.name: tracking_number
attributes.description: Tracking number assigned by the carrier for shipment visibility.

attributes.name: updated_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp of the most recent update to the shipping label record.

attributes.name: void_flag
attributes.description: True if the label has been voided or cancelled.

attributes.name: void_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the label was voided, if applicable.

attributes.name: weight_kg
attributes.description: Weight of the package in kilograms used for rate calculation.

products.name: fulfillment_shipment
products.description: Core transactional record representing a physical outbound shipment dispatched from a fulfillment center to a customer or intermediate hub. Tracks shipment status (manifested, in-transit, out-for-delivery, delivered, exception, returned), carrier, tracking number, ship date, estimated delivery date, actual delivery date, shipment weight, dimensions, declared value, and proof-of-delivery reference. Bridges fulfillment execution and last-mile logistics; integrates with TMS for carrier tracking events.

attributes.name: fulfillment_shipment_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the shipment record.

attributes.name: accounts_payable_id

attributes.name: carrier_contract_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to logistics.carrier_contract. Linking each shipment to it

Finance teams require this link to

attributes.name: carrier_service_id

attributes.name: customer_address_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to customer.customer_address. Business justification: Links shipments to the structured customer address for failed delivery tracking (failed_delivery_count on customer_address), carrier serviceability reporting, and address-level shipment performance an

attributes.description: Identifier of the customer who will receive the shipment.

attributes.name: fulfillment_center_id

attributes.name: fulfillment_order_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to fulfillment.fulfillment_order. Business justification: A fulfillment shipment is the physical execution of a fulfillment order. This direct in-domain link is essential for end-to-end fulfillment traceability — connecting the instruction (fulfillment_order

attributes.name: header_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to order.order_header. Business justification: Order‑to‑Shipment association needed for shipping status dashboard and carrier billing reconciliation.

attributes.name: payment_transaction_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to payment.payment_transaction. Business justification: Required for shipment‑payment reconciliation report linking each shipment to the payment transaction that funded it.

attributes.name: price_list_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to pricing.price_list. Business justification: Shipping cost calculations reference a price list; required for the Shipment Cost Allocation process.

attributes.name: price_zone_id

attributes.name: tax_record_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.tax_record. Business justification: Shipping tax (shipping_cost_tax) must be linked to a tax_record for marketplace facilitator tax compliance and remittance reporting. E-commerce tax nexus rules require shipment-level tax tracking. No

attributes.name: warehouse_node_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the warehouse from which the shipment originated.

attributes.name: actual_delivery_date
attributes.description: Date when the shipment was actually delivered.

attributes.name: carrier_tracking_url
attributes.description: Web URL to the carrier's tracking page for this shipment.

attributes.name: created_timestamp

attributes.name: declared_value

attributes.name: declared_value_currency

attributes.name: delivery_attempts

attributes.name: freight_class

attributes.name: freight_terms

attributes.name: fulfillment_shipment_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the shipment.

attributes.name: hazardous_material_flag

products.name: shipment_event
products.description: Immutable event log capturing carrier-reported and internal tracking milestones for a shipment throughout its transit lifecycle. Each record represents a discrete tracking event: event type (picked up, in-transit, out-for-delivery, delivered, exception, attempted delivery), event timestamp, event location (city, state, country), carrier event code, raw carrier scan message, and data source (carrier API, TMS webhook, EDI 214). Enables SLA breach detection and customer-facing tracking updates.

attributes.name: shipment_event_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the shipment tracking event record. Primary key for the shipment event log.

attributes.name: carrier_id
attributes.description: Reference to the transportation carrier (e.g., FedEx, UPS, USPS, DHL) that reported this tracking event. Links to carrier master data.

attributes.name: center_id
attributes.description: Reference to the warehouse, fulfillment center, or carrier facility where the event occurred. Links to facility master data for internal events.

attributes.name: fulfillment_shipment_id
attributes.description: Reference to the parent shipment container that this event belongs to. Links this tracking event to the overall shipment record.
attributes.references: EDI 214 Transportation Carrier Shipment Status Message

attributes.name: header_id
attributes.description: Reference to the customer order associated with this shipment event. Enables order-level tracking and SLA monitoring.
attributes.references: ISO 20022 - Universal Financial Industry Message Scheme

attributes.name: carrier_event_code
attributes.description: The carrier-specific status code or event identifier from the carrier's tracking system. Raw code as provided by carrier API or EDI message.

attributes.name: carrier_event_description
attributes.description: The human-readable description of the tracking event as provided by the carrier. Raw scan message or status text from carrier system.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp when this shipment event record was first created in the system. Immutable audit field for data governance and compliance.

attributes.name: delivery_location_type
attributes.description: The specific location where the package was left upon delivery. Applicable only to delivered events. Provides proof-of-delivery detail for customer service and claims. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: front_door|back_door|side_door|mailroom|reception|neighbor|parcel_locker|carrier_facility — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: estimated_delivery_date
attributes.description: The carrier's current estimated delivery date for the shipment as of this event. Updated dynamically as the shipment progresses. Used for customer communication and SLA tracking.

attributes.name: event_location_city
attributes.description: The city where the tracking event was recorded by the carrier. May be null for certain event types that do not have precise location data.
attributes.references: UN/LOCODE - United Nations Code for Trade and Transport Locations

attributes.name: event_location_country
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO country code where the tracking event occurred (e.g., USA, CAN, MEX). Supports international shipment tracking.

attributes.name: event_location_postal_code
attributes.description: The postal or ZIP code of the location where the tracking event was recorded. Enables geographic analysis of shipment flow.
attributes.references: Universal Postal Union - Postal Addressing Standards

attributes.name: event_location_state
attributes.description: The state or province where the tracking event occurred. Uses standard postal abbreviations (e.g., CA, NY, TX).

attributes.name: event_source
attributes.description: The system or channel through which the tracking event was received: carrier_api (direct carrier integration), tms_webhook (Transportation Management System callback), edi_214 (Electronic Data Interchange shipment status), manual_entry (operator input), wms_scan (Warehouse Management System scan).

attributes.name: event_timestamp
attributes.description: The precise date and time when the tracking event occurred in the carrier's system. This is the real-world event time, not the system ingestion time.

attributes.name: event_type
attributes.description: The category of tracking event representing the shipment milestone: picked_up (carrier collected package), in_transit (package moving through network), out_for_delivery (on vehicle for final delivery), delivered (successfully received), exception (delay or issue), attempted_delivery (delivery tried but failed).
attributes.references: EDI 214 Transportation Carrier Shipment Status Message

attributes.name: exception_reason
attributes.description: Detailed explanation of the exception condition if is_exception is True. Describes the nature of the delay, damage, or delivery issue. Null for non-exception events.

attributes.name: ingestion_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp when this event record was ingested into the data platform. Distinct from event_timestamp (when the event actually occurred). Used for data lineage and latency monitoring.

attributes.name: is_customer_visible
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this event should be displayed to the customer in tracking interfaces. False for internal-only events (warehouse scans, carrier facility transfers).

attributes.name: is_exception
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this event represents an exception or problem condition (delay, damage, lost package, address issue, weather delay, etc.). True if exception, False for normal milestone events.

attributes.name: is_sla_breach
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this event represents or contributes to an SLA breach. True if the event timestamp exceeds the SLA target, False otherwise.

attributes.name: latitude
attributes.description: Geographic latitude coordinate of the event location in decimal degrees. Enables precise geospatial analysis and mapping of shipment routes.

attributes.name: longitude
attributes.description: Geographic longitude coordinate of the event location in decimal degrees. Used with latitude for route optimization and delivery zone analysis.

attributes.name: raw_payload
attributes.description: The complete raw JSON or XML payload received from the carrier API, TMS webhook, or EDI message. Preserved for audit, troubleshooting, and reprocessing. May contain additional carrier-specific metadata.

attributes.name: signature_name
attributes.description: Name of the person who signed for the delivery. Captured for delivered events requiring proof of delivery. Null for events that do not involve signature capture.

attributes.name: sla_target_delivery_timestamp
attributes.business_glossary_term: Service Level Agreement (SLA) Target Delivery Timestamp
attributes.description: The promised delivery date and time per the service level agreement. Used to detect SLA breaches by comparing against actual delivery timestamp.

attributes.name: temperature_celsius
attributes.description: Ambient or package temperature in degrees Celsius recorded at the time of the event. Critical for cold-chain shipments (pharmaceuticals, perishables). Null for non-temperature-controlled shipments.

attributes.name: tracking_number
attributes.description: The carrier-assigned tracking number for the shipment. Used for customer-facing tracking and carrier API queries.

attributes.name: weight_actual_kg
attributes.description: The actual measured weight of the shipment in kilograms as recorded during this event. May be captured at pickup, in-transit weighing, or delivery. Used for freight cost reconciliation.
attributes.references: ISO 80000-3 - Quantities and Units of Space and Time

products.name: proof_of_delivery
products.description: Transactional record capturing confirmed delivery evidence for a shipment. Stores confirmation type (signature, photo, GPS, OTP), recipient name, delivery timestamp, location coordinates, photo/signature asset references, carrier confirmation code, and exception notes. Critical for dispute resolution, chargeback defense, RMA initiation, and last-mile SLA compliance.

attributes.name: proof_of_delivery_id

attributes.description: Foreign key linking to customer.customer_address. Business justification: POD records must reference the structured customer address to update failed_delivery_count, validate delivery confirmation against the registered address, and support address-level delivery success ra

Business justification: POD reconciliation: proof_of_delivery (carrier-side record) must be reconciled against delivery_confirmation (order-side record) for customer dispute resolution, SLA compliance audits, and chargeback

attributes.name: fulfillment_order_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to fulfillment.fulfillment_order. Business justification: A proof of delivery confirms the delivery of a fulfillment order. The direct in-domain link to fulfillment_order provides clean order-level delivery confirmation traceability and supports SLA complian

attributes.description: Reference to the shipment that this proof of delivery belongs to.

Marketplace ops teams need direct POD-to-transaction traceab

Auditors require a direct audit trail from POD to reve

attributes.description: Identifier code of the carrier that performed the final delivery.

attributes.description: Timestamp when the proof of delivery record was first created in the system.

attributes.name: delivery_country_code
attributes.description: Three‑letter ISO country code of the delivery location. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: USA|CAN|MEX|GBR|FRA|DEU|JPN|CHN|IND|BRA — promote to reference product]

attributes.name: delivery_method
attributes.description: Mode of delivery used for the order.

attributes.name: delivery_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the delivery was confirmed (actual event time).

attributes.name: exception_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether an exception occurred during delivery (e.g., failed attempt, damage).

attributes.name: exception_notes
attributes.description: Free‑text notes describing any delivery exception details.

attributes.name: gps_accuracy_meters
attributes.description: Reported accuracy of the GPS coordinate in meters.

attributes.name: is_bopis
attributes.description: True if the delivery was part of a Buy‑Online‑Pick‑Up‑In‑Store fulfillment.

attributes.name: latitude
attributes.description: Geographic latitude coordinate of the delivery location.

attributes.name: longitude
attributes.description: Geographic longitude coordinate of the delivery location.

attributes.name: otp_verified
attributes.description: True if a one‑time password was successfully verified at delivery.

attributes.name: photo_captured
attributes.description: True if a photo of the delivered package was captured.

attributes.name: pod_version
attributes.description: Version identifier of the proof‑of‑delivery data format.

attributes.name: proof_asset_url
attributes.description: Link to the digital asset (image, signature file, etc.) that serves as proof.

attributes.name: proof_of_delivery_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the delivery proof record.

attributes.name: proof_type

products.name: bin_location
products.description: Master record for each physical storage location (bin, slot, shelf, pallet position) within a fulfillment center. Captures location code, zone classification (pick, bulk, staging, returns, hazmat, cold chain), aisle/bay/level/position coordinates, location type, capacity constraints (units, weight, volume), temperature zone, hazmat flag, and active status. SSOT for warehouse slotting and zone-based pick path optimization.

domains.name: logistics
domains.description: Owns transportation planning and carrier execution across the supply chain. Manages last-mile delivery, carrier selection, route optimization, FTL/LTL shipment planning, shipment tracking, delivery confirmation, EDI carrier integrations, cross-border WTO-compliant customs documentation, and transportation cost management. Integrates with TMS for real-time tracking.

products.name: carrier

Captures carrier identity (SCAC, DOT number), service capabilities, EDI integration status, compliance certifications (C-TPAT, IATA, WTO), carrier tier classification, performance SLA thresholds, and active contract references. SSOT for carrier identity across TMS and logistics operations.

products.name: logistics_shipment
products.description: Core transactional entity representing a physical shipment dispatched from a fulfillment node to a destination. Captures shipment reference number, origin/destination addresses, carrier assignment, service level, tracking number, weight, dimensions, declared value, shipment status (derived from tracking_event stream), estimated and actual ship/delivery dates, FTL/LTL indicator, and TMS shipment ID. Central logistics record linking orders to physical movement. SSOT for shipment identity and carrier assignment. Status is derived from tracking_event — this entity owns the shipment header, not the event history.

products.name: tracking_event
products.description: Unified event stream recording all shipment lifecycle events from carrier integrations (EDI 214, carrier APIs). Event types include: pickup scan, in-transit scan, out-for-delivery, delivery attempt (with attempt sequence, outcome, and reattempt scheduling), exception (address correction, customs hold, damage, carrier delay — with exception reason code, responsible party, resolution action, and resolution timestamp), and proof-of-delivery confirmation (recipient name, signature capture, delivery photo URL, GPS coordinates). Captures event timestamp, event type code, scan location, carrier facility code, GPS coordinates, and raw carrier event description. SSOT for ALL shipment status derivation, last-mile visibility, exception management, delivery confirmation, and SLA compliance monitoring. No other entity in this domain records shipment events or delivery outcomes.

attributes.name: tracking_event_id
attributes.description: Globally unique surrogate key for each shipment tracking event.

attributes.name: carrier_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to logistics.carrier. Business justification: Link tracking_event to carrier for carrier reference; carrier_code becomes redundant.

attributes.name: logistics_shipment_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to logistics.logistics_shipment. Business justification: tracking_event records all shipment lifecycle events (EDI 214, carrier integrations). Each tracking event belongs to a specific logistics shipment. Currently tracking_event only has carrier_id FK — th

attributes.name: shipment_package_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to logistics.shipment_package. Business justification: In e-commerce multi-package shipments, each package has its own tracking number and generates its own tracking events. tracking_event needs a package-level FK to support package-granularity event trac

attributes.name: carrier_facility_code
attributes.description: Identifier of the carrier's hub or facility where the event occurred.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the tracking event record was first ingested into the lakehouse.
attributes.references: Transportation Management System – Record Creation Timestamp

attributes.name: delivery_attempt_outcome

attributes.references: Transportation Management System – Exception Reason Code

attributes.references: Transportation Management System – Exception Resolution Timestamp

attributes.name: exception_responsible_party

attributes.references: Transportation Management System – Exception Responsible Party

attributes.name: gps_latitude

attributes.name: gps_longitude
attributes.description: Longitude coordinate of the event location in decimal degrees.

attributes.name: proof_of_delivery_photo_url
attributes.description: Link to the delivery confirmation photo.
attributes.references: Transportation Management System – Proof‑of‑Delivery Photo URL

attributes.description: Name of the person who received the shipment.
attributes.references: Transportation Management System – Proof‑of‑Delivery Recipient Name

attributes.name: proof_of_delivery_signature_url
attributes.description: Link to the captured signature image for the delivery.
attributes.references: Transportation Management System – Proof‑of‑Delivery Signature URL

attributes.name: proof_of_delivery_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when proof of delivery was captured.

attributes.name: raw_event_description
attributes.description: Original free‑text payload received from the carrier.

attributes.name: reattempt_scheduled_timestamp
attributes.description: Planned date and time for the next delivery attempt after a failure.
attributes.references: Transportation Management System – Re‑attempt Scheduled Timestamp

attributes.name: scan_location
attributes.description: Physical address or location description where the scan was performed.

attributes.name: sla_met_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the shipment met the SLA delivery time (true) or missed it (false).

attributes.name: sla_target_timestamp

attributes.name: updated_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time of the most recent update to the tracking event record.
attributes.references: Transportation Management System – Record Update Timestamp

products.name: carrier_rate_card
products.description: Contracted rate structures negotiated with carriers for specific lanes, service levels, and weight breaks. Captures rate card version, effective/expiry dates, origin-destination lane, service level code, weight tier, base rate, fuel surcharge percentage, accessorial rate schedule, currency, and negotiation reference. SSOT for freight cost estimation and carrier selection optimization in TMS.

attributes.name: carrier_rate_card_id
attributes.description: Unique system-generated identifier for the carrier rate card record.

attributes.name: carrier_contract_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to logistics.carrier_contract. Business justification: Rate cards are negotiated and governed under carrier contracts. carrier_rate_card has negotiation_reference (STRING) and rate_card_reference (STRING on carrier_contract) as loose text references. Addi

attributes.name: carrier_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier of the carrier organization that owns this rate card.

attributes.name: carrier_service_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to logistics.carrier_service. Business justification: A carrier rate card defines contracted rates for a specific carrier service (e.g., FedEx Ground rates for lane X). carrier_rate_card currently stores service_level_code (STRING) and service_level_desc

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Rate‑card charges are allocated to cost centers for chargeback and profitability reporting.

attributes.name: general_ledger_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.general_ledger. Business justification: Carrier rate cards drive freight cost postings to specific GL freight expense accounts. Finance teams reconcile carrier spend against GL during period-end close. Rate card charges must map to GL accou

attributes.name: price_list_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to pricing.price_list. Business justification: In e-commerce, carrier rate cards map to customer-facing price lists for shipping fee pass-through at checkout. This link enables shipping cost pricing reports, dynamic shipping fee calculation by zon

attributes.name: seller_profile_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to seller.seller_profile. Business justification: Seller‑specific rate cards are used in the 'Rate Card Assignment' workflow for volume‑based pricing and discount calculations.

attributes.name: accessorial_charges_included
attributes.description: Flag indicating whether standard accessorial fees are bundled into the base rate.

attributes.description: Fundamental freight charge per kilogram before surcharges, expressed in the specified currency.

products.name: delivery_zone
products.description: Geographic delivery zone definitions used for carrier assignment, rate calculation, and SLA determination. Captures zone code, zone name, country/region/state coverage, postal code ranges, carrier-specific zone mapping, delivery day SLA, surcharge applicability (remote area, residential), and zone tier classification. Reference entity supporting route optimization and last-mile planning.

attributes.name: delivery_zone_id

attributes.description: Human‑readable name of the delivery zone.

attributes.name: zone_tier
attributes.description: Tier classification used for pricing and service level differentiation.

products.name: carrier_contract
products.description: Master records of commercial contracts with transportation carriers. Captures contract number, carrier reference, contract type (master, spot, dedicated), effective and expiry dates, contracted volume commitments, rate card references, SLA terms, penalty clauses, auto-renewal flag, and contract status. Distinct from carrier_rate_card which holds rate structures — this entity holds the legal and commercial agreement metadata.

attributes.description: Foreign key linking to seller.seller_agreement. Business justification: When a platform negotiates a carrier contract on behalf of a seller, the carrier contract must reference the seller agreement governing shipping obligations, SLA commitments, and termination condition
