attributes.description: Indicates whether the entity is acting as principal (recognizes gross revenue) or agent (recognizes net commission) for this transaction. Critical for marketplace revenue recognition and GMV-to-net-revenue waterfall. Determined per ASC 606 B34-B38.
attributes.references: ASC 606 B34-B38 Principal vs Agent; IFRS 15.B34-B38; FTC Consumer Protection

attributes.name: promotional_discount_amount
attributes.description: The value of promotional discounts, coupons, or price reductions applied to this transaction that reduce the recognized revenue amount. Part of the GMV-to-net-revenue waterfall adjustment. Sourced from Pricing and Promotions Management.

attributes.name: recognition_event_number
attributes.description: Externally referenceable business identifier for this revenue recognition event, used in financial reporting, audit correspondence, and reconciliation with SAP S/4HANA journal entries.

attributes.name: recognition_method
attributes.description: The accounting method used to measure progress toward complete satisfaction of the performance obligation for over-time recognition. Output methods measure results achieved; input methods measure effort expended. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: output_method|input_method|straight_line|usage_based|milestone_based|residual_approach — promote to reference product]

attributes.name: recognition_period_end_date
attributes.description: End date of the accounting period over which revenue is recognized. For point-in-time recognition, this equals the event date. For over-time recognition (e.g., subscription ARR), this is the end of the service period.
attributes.references: ASC 606 Step 5; IFRS 15.35; GAAP Matching Principle

attributes.name: recognition_period_start_date
attributes.description: Start date of the accounting period over which revenue is recognized. For point-in-time recognition, this equals the event date. For over-time recognition (e.g., subscription MRR), this is the start of the service period.
attributes.references: ASC 606 Step 5; IFRS 15.35; GAAP Matching Principle

attributes.name: recognition_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle state of the revenue recognition event. 'pending' = awaiting trigger; 'recognized' = revenue fully recognized; 'deferred' = revenue deferred to future period; 'partially_recognized' = portion recognized; 'reversed' = recognition reversed; 'cancelled' = event voided.

attributes.name: recognition_trigger
attributes.description: The business event that triggered this revenue recognition. Examples: delivery confirmation from TMS/WMS, subscription billing period elapsed, customer acceptance, refund/return window expiry, or manual finance override. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: delivery_confirmed|subscription_period_elapsed|milestone_achieved|customer_acceptance|refund_period_expired|manual_override|partial_shipment|contract_modification — promote to reference product]

attributes.name: recognition_type
attributes.description: Indicates whether revenue is recognized at a single point in time (e.g., product delivery) or over time (e.g., subscription MRR/ARR, service contracts), per ASC 606 / IFRS 15 criteria.

attributes.name: recognized_amount
attributes.description: The gross revenue amount recognized in this event or for this period. For partial recognition, this is the portion recognized in the current period. Core field in the GMV-to-net-revenue waterfall.
attributes.references: ASC 606 Step 5; IFRS 15; SEC Revenue Disclosure

attributes.name: refund_adjustment_amount
attributes.description: The amount of revenue reversed or adjusted due to customer returns, refunds, or Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA) events. Reduces recognized revenue in the GMV-to-net-revenue waterfall. Negative values indicate revenue reduction.
attributes.references: ASC 606 Step 3 — Variable Consideration; IFRS 15.56; RMA Process

attributes.name: revenue_category
attributes.description: Business classification of the revenue stream being recognized. Covers GMV-to-net-revenue waterfall components: direct product sales, marketplace seller commissions, subscription MRR/ARR, advertising revenue, fulfillment fees, and other. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: product_sale|marketplace_commission|subscription|advertising|fulfillment_fee|data_licensing|other — promote to reference product]
attributes.references: ASC 606 Step 2; IFRS 15; SEC Revenue Disclosure Requirements

attributes.name: source_system
attributes.description: The operational system of record that originated this revenue recognition event. Supports data lineage and reconciliation across OMS, SAP S/4HANA, Payment Gateway, Seller Portal, and Subscription Platform.
attributes.references: SOX Section 302 — Data Lineage; ISO 27001; NIST Cybersecurity Framework

attributes.name: source_transaction_reference
attributes.description: The native transaction identifier from the originating source system (e.g., OMS order number, payment gateway transaction ID, SAP document number). Enables end-to-end reconciliation and audit trail across systems.
attributes.references: SOX Section 302/404; ISO 27001; NIST Cybersecurity Framework

attributes.name: sox_control_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this revenue recognition record is subject to SOX internal control review and audit. True = SOX-controlled record requiring documented approval and audit trail; False = non-SOX-controlled record.

attributes.name: standalone_selling_price
attributes.description: The price at which the entity would sell this performance obligation separately to a customer. Used as the basis for allocating the transaction price across multiple performance obligations per ASC 606 Step 4.
attributes.references: ASC 606 Step 4 — Standalone Selling Price; IFRS 15.77-80

attributes.name: subscription_mrr_amount
attributes.description: The Monthly Recurring Revenue (MRR) amount recognized for subscription-based services in this period. Applicable when revenue_category = 'subscription'. Used for MRR/ARR tracking and SaaS revenue reporting.
attributes.references: ASC 606 Over-Time Recognition; IFRS 15.35; SaaS Revenue Metrics

attributes.name: transaction_price
attributes.description: The total transaction price allocated to this performance obligation per ASC 606 Step 4. Represents the amount of consideration the business expects to receive in exchange for satisfying this performance obligation, before adjustments.
attributes.references: ASC 606 Step 3 — Determine Transaction Price; IFRS 15.47

attributes.name: updated_timestamp
attributes.description: The date and time when this revenue recognition record was last modified. Tracks changes to recognition status, amounts, or approvals for SOX audit trail and data lineage.
attributes.references: SOX Section 302/404; ISO 27001; NIST Cybersecurity Framework

attributes.name: variable_consideration_estimate
attributes.description: The estimated amount of variable consideration (e.g., volume discounts, rebates, returns allowance, performance bonuses) included in the transaction price per ASC 606 Step 3. Subject to the constraint that a significant revenue reversal is not probable.

products.name: tax_record
products.description: SSOT for all tax obligations, filings, and tax line-item records across transactions. Captures tax type (VAT, GST, sales tax, withholding tax), tax jurisdiction, tax rate applied, taxable amount, tax amount, tax period, and filing status. Supports compliance with FTC, GDPR, and international tax regulations. Integrates with SAP S/4HANA tax determination.

attributes.name: tax_record_id
attributes.description: Unique surrogate identifier for each tax record entry in the enterprise financial system. Primary key for the tax_record data product.

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Tax records are attributed to cost centers for internal cost allocation and reporting. tax_record.cost_center_code is a denormalized string; adding cost_center_id provides a proper FK to the cost_cent

attributes.name: customer_profile_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to customer.customer_profile. Business justification: Sales tax nexus reporting, customer tax exemption certificate management, and marketplace facilitator compliance (is_marketplace_facilitator flag on tax_record) require linking tax records to the cust

attributes.name: general_ledger_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.general_ledger. Business justification: Tax obligations post to specific GL accounts. tax_record.gl_account_code is a denormalized string; adding general_ledger_id provides a proper FK to the GL account master. gl_account_code is removed as

attributes.name: header_id
attributes.description: Reference to the e-commerce order associated with this tax record. Enables reconciliation of tax obligations back to the originating Order Management System (OMS) order.

attributes.name: legal_entity_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.legal_entity. Business justification: Tax obligations are filed by specific legal entities. tax_record.company_code is a denormalized code; adding legal_entity_id provides a proper FK to the legal_entity master for entity-level tax report

attributes.name: line_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to order.order_line. Business justification: Tax records must be traceable to specific order lines for itemized tax audit, multi-jurisdiction compliance, and line-level tax exemption verification. The existing tax_record.header_id covers order-l

attributes.name: payment_transaction_id
attributes.description: Reference to the originating financial transaction (order, invoice, payment, or settlement) that generated this tax obligation. Links tax record to its source transaction.

attributes.name: settlement_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to payment.settlement. Business justification: Marketplace facilitator tax remittances are funded from and tied to settlement batches. Tax compliance reporting requires linking tax records to the settlement from which tax was withheld and remitted

attributes.name: supplier_invoice_id
attributes.description: Reference to the accounts receivable invoice document associated with this tax record. Supports invoice-level tax reconciliation in SAP S/4HANA AR module.

attributes.name: company_code
attributes.description: SAP S/4HANA company code identifying the legal entity responsible for this tax obligation. Enables multi-entity tax consolidation and statutory reporting across the enterprise group.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI Company Code (BUKRS); SOX Section 302/404; GAAP Consolidation

attributes.name: country_code
attributes.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 three-letter country code of the tax jurisdiction country. Used for international tax compliance, GDPR territorial scoping, and cross-border transaction reporting.
attributes.references: ISO 3166-1 Alpha-3; GDPR Article 3; WTO International Trade Regulations

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this tax record was first captured in the enterprise data platform. Used for audit trail, SOX compliance, and data lineage tracking.

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the transaction currency in which taxable_amount, tax_amount, and net_amount are denominated (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP). Required for multi-currency tax reconciliation and international financial reporting.
attributes.references: ISO 4217 Currency Codes; SAP S/4HANA FI-TX Currency; GDPR Article 5

attributes.name: due_date
attributes.description: The statutory deadline by which the tax must be remitted to the tax authority. Used for cash flow planning, penalty risk monitoring, and compliance SLA tracking.
attributes.references: FTC Tax Compliance; SAP S/4HANA FI-AP Payment Due Date; SOX Section 302/404

attributes.name: exchange_rate
attributes.description: Foreign currency exchange rate applied to convert transaction currency amounts to local reporting currency at the time of the taxable event. Sourced from SAP S/4HANA exchange rate tables.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI Exchange Rate; GAAP ASC 830; SOX Section 302/404

attributes.name: exemption_certificate_number
attributes.description: Reference number of the tax exemption certificate provided by the buyer or seller to justify a zero or reduced tax rate. Required for audit substantiation when is_tax_exempt is True. Confidential business document reference.
attributes.references: FTC Tax Exemption Documentation; SAP S/4HANA FI-TX Exemption Certificate; SOX Section 302/404

attributes.name: filing_date
attributes.description: The date on which the tax return or remittance was filed with the relevant tax authority. Null if not yet filed. Used to track compliance with filing deadlines and SLA obligations.
attributes.references: FTC Tax Filing Requirements; SAP S/4HANA FI-TX Filing Date; SOX Section 302/404

attributes.name: filing_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the tax record within the filing workflow. Tracks progression from pending obligation through filed, accepted by authority, rejected, amended, or voided. Drives compliance monitoring and SOX audit controls.
attributes.references: SOX Section 302/404; FTC Tax Compliance; SAP S/4HANA FI-TX

attributes.name: fiscal_period
attributes.description: The fiscal period number within the fiscal year (1–12 for monthly, 1–4 for quarterly) to which this tax record is attributed. Used for period-end close, tax accrual, and financial consolidation in SAP S/4HANA.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI Posting Period; SOX Section 302/404

attributes.name: fiscal_year
attributes.description: The fiscal year (e.g., 2024) to which this tax record is attributed for financial reporting and tax filing purposes. Aligns with SAP S/4HANA fiscal year variant configuration.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI Fiscal Year; SOX Section 302/404; GAAP Periodicity Principle

attributes.name: is_marketplace_facilitator
attributes.description: Indicates whether the tax was collected and remitted by the e-commerce platform acting as a marketplace facilitator (True) rather than by the individual seller (False). Relevant for US marketplace facilitator tax laws and similar international regulations.
attributes.references: FTC Marketplace Facilitator Tax Laws; Seller Management Portal; Electronic Commerce Directive (EU)

attributes.name: is_tax_exempt
attributes.description: Indicates whether the transaction or customer is tax-exempt (True), resulting in a zero tax amount. Requires a valid exemption certificate on file. Used for B2B tax exemption processing and audit compliance.
attributes.references: FTC Tax Exemption Rules; SAP S/4HANA FI-TX Tax Exemption; CCPA; GDPR

attributes.name: local_currency_code
attributes.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the legal entity's local reporting currency (e.g., USD for US entities). Used to denominate tax_amount_local_currency for statutory reporting.
attributes.references: ISO 4217; SAP S/4HANA Company Code Currency; SOX Section 302/404

attributes.name: net_amount
attributes.description: The total net amount inclusive of tax (taxable_amount + tax_amount), expressed in the transaction currency. Represents the gross total component of the MONETARY_TRIPLET. Used for revenue recognition, GMV-to-revenue reconciliation, and financial reporting.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-GL General Ledger; SOX Section 302/404; GAAP Revenue Recognition ASC 606

attributes.name: notes
attributes.description: Free-text field for tax analyst or compliance officer annotations, adjustment explanations, audit findings, or correspondence references related to this tax record. Supports SOX audit documentation requirements.
attributes.references: SOX Section 302/404 Audit Documentation; SAP S/4HANA FI-TX Text Field

attributes.name: remittance_date
attributes.description: The actual date on which the tax amount was remitted (paid) to the tax authority. Null if not yet remitted. Used to confirm payment completion and calculate late payment penalties.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AP Payment Clearing; SOX Section 302/404; FTC Tax Compliance

attributes.name: source_system
attributes.description: Identifies the operational system of record that originated this tax record (e.g., SAP S/4HANA ERP, Order Management System, Payment Gateway). Supports data lineage, reconciliation, and audit trail requirements.
attributes.references: SOX Section 302/404 Data Lineage; ISO 27001 Information Asset Management; SAP S/4HANA Integration

attributes.name: tax_amount
attributes.description: The calculated tax amount charged or withheld on the transaction, expressed in the transaction currency. Represents the tax adjustment component of the MONETARY_TRIPLET. May differ from taxable_amount × tax_rate due to rounding rules or tax authority adjustments.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-TX Tax Amount; SOX Section 302/404; PCI DSS Requirement 3

attributes.name: tax_amount_local_currency
attributes.description: Tax amount converted to the local reporting currency of the legal entity, using the exchange rate at the time of the taxable event. Required for statutory financial reporting, SOX compliance, and SAP S/4HANA parallel ledger reconciliation.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-TX Local Currency; SOX Section 302/404; GAAP ASC 830 Foreign Currency

attributes.name: tax_authority_name
attributes.description: Name of the government tax authority to which the tax is owed or has been filed (e.g., 'IRS', 'HMRC', 'EU VAT Authority', 'California CDTFA'). Used for filing routing and regulatory correspondence.
attributes.references: FTC; SAP S/4HANA FI-TX Tax Authority; WTO International Trade Regulations

attributes.name: tax_code
attributes.description: SAP S/4HANA tax condition code (e.g., 'A1', 'V5') that encapsulates the tax type, rate, and jurisdiction configuration. Used for tax determination, GL account assignment, and tax reporting in the ERP system.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-TX Tax Code (MWSKZ); OECD VAT/GST Guidelines

attributes.name: tax_document_number
attributes.description: Externally-known tax document reference number assigned by SAP S/4HANA FI-TX module or the tax authority. Used for audit trails, tax filings, and cross-referencing with regulatory submissions. Serves as the BUSINESS_IDENTIFIER for this transaction.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-TX Tax Document; SOX Section 302/404 Audit Trail

attributes.name: tax_event_timestamp
attributes.description: The principal real-world timestamp when the taxable event occurred (e.g., point of sale, invoice issuance, payment settlement). Distinct from record audit timestamps. Determines the applicable tax period and rate under tax authority rules.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-TX Tax Point Date; ISO 8601; GDPR Article 5 (accuracy)

attributes.name: tax_jurisdiction_code
attributes.description: Standardized code identifying the tax jurisdiction (country, state, province, county, or municipality) where the tax obligation arises. Follows ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 for country-level and ISO 3166-2 for sub-national jurisdictions. Drives tax rate lookup and filing routing.
attributes.references: ISO 3166-1 Alpha-3; ISO 3166-2; SAP S/4HANA FI-TX Jurisdiction Code; GDPR Article 3 (territorial scope)

attributes.name: tax_jurisdiction_level
attributes.description: Hierarchical level of the tax jurisdiction at which the tax is levied. Supports multi-level tax stacking (e.g., federal + state + county + city sales tax in the US) and jurisdiction hierarchy reporting.
attributes.references: FTC Sales Tax Nexus Rules; NIST Cybersecurity Framework; SAP S/4HANA FI-TX Jurisdiction Level

attributes.name: tax_jurisdiction_name
attributes.description: Human-readable name of the tax jurisdiction (e.g., 'California', 'United Kingdom', 'European Union VAT Area'). Complements the jurisdiction code for reporting and business user readability.
attributes.references: ISO 3166; SAP S/4HANA FI-TX Jurisdiction Description

attributes.name: tax_period_end_date
attributes.description: End date of the tax reporting period to which this tax record belongs. Together with tax_period_start_date, defines the fiscal period boundary for tax filing and financial consolidation.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-TX Tax Period; SOX Section 302/404; GAAP Periodicity Principle

attributes.name: tax_period_start_date
attributes.description: Start date of the tax reporting period (month, quarter, or year) to which this tax record belongs. Determines the filing period for tax authority submissions and financial period-end close.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-TX Tax Period; SOX Section 302/404; GAAP Periodicity Principle

attributes.name: tax_rate
attributes.description: The applicable tax rate expressed as a decimal fraction (e.g., 0.085000 for 8.5%). Sourced from SAP S/4HANA tax condition records for the applicable jurisdiction and tax type at the time of the taxable event.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-TX Tax Condition Record; OECD VAT/GST Guidelines

attributes.name: tax_registration_number
attributes.description: The company's tax registration or identification number with the relevant tax authority (e.g., VAT registration number, EIN, GST registration). Required for tax invoice compliance and regulatory filings. Confidential business identifier.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 6; FTC Tax Registration; SAP S/4HANA FI-TX Company Tax Number; ISO 27001

attributes.name: tax_treatment
attributes.description: The VAT/GST tax treatment applied to the transaction line, determining how the tax is calculated and reported. Drives tax return categorization and compliance with EU VAT Directive and OECD guidelines.
attributes.references: EU VAT Directive 2006/112/EC; OECD VAT/GST Guidelines; SAP S/4HANA FI-TX Tax Treatment

attributes.name: tax_type
attributes.description: Classification of the tax obligation by tax regime type. Determines the applicable regulatory framework, filing requirements, and remittance rules. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: VAT|GST|sales_tax|withholding_tax|customs_duty|excise_tax|use_tax|digital_services_tax — promote to reference product]
attributes.references: OECD International VAT/GST Guidelines; FTC; WTO International Trade Regulations; SAP S/4HANA FI-TX Tax Category

attributes.name: taxable_amount
attributes.description: The gross base amount subject to taxation before tax is applied, expressed in the transaction currency. Forms the basis for tax calculation: tax_amount = taxable_amount × tax_rate. Core component of the MONETARY_TRIPLET.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-TX Tax Base Amount; SOX Section 302/404; PCI DSS Requirement 3

attributes.name: transaction_type
attributes.description: Classification of the underlying business transaction that generated the tax record. Determines the direction of tax flow (payable vs. receivable) and applicable reporting treatment.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-TX Transaction Type; OECD International VAT/GST Guidelines; WTO

attributes.name: updated_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this tax record was last modified in the enterprise data platform. Supports change tracking, SOX audit controls, and incremental ETL processing.

products.name: finance_bank_account
products.description: Master data and complete transaction history for all corporate bank accounts used in treasury operations. Tracks bank name, account identifiers (masked account number, IBAN/SWIFT), currency, account type (operating, payroll, escrow, concentration), account status, and owning legal entity. Includes electronic bank statement records with statement dates, opening/closing balances, individual transaction lines (credits and debits), value dates, and reconciliation status. Supports automated bank reconciliation, daily cash position reporting, cash flow management, and liquidity forecasting in SAP S/4HANA treasury.

attributes.name: finance_bank_account_id
attributes.description: Unique surrogate identifier for each corporate bank account record in the treasury master data. Primary key for the bank_account data product.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Treasury and Risk Management (TRM) — Bank Account Master

attributes.name: general_ledger_id
attributes.description: Reference to the GL clearing account in the chart of accounts that this bank account maps to for automated bank reconciliation and financial reporting.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA General Ledger (FI-GL); SOX Section 404

attributes.name: legal_entity_id
attributes.description: Reference to the owning legal entity (company code) that holds this bank account. Used for multi-entity financial consolidation and SOX entity-level reporting.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Company Code; SOX Section 302/404

attributes.name: account_name
attributes.description: Descriptive name assigned to the bank account for internal identification and treasury reporting (e.g., 'Ecommerce US Operating Account - JPMorgan'). Used in cash position dashboards and SAP S/4HANA bank account master.

attributes.name: account_number_masked
attributes.description: Masked representation of the bank account number showing only the last 4 digits (e.g., XXXXXXXX1234). Full account number is stored in a separate secrets vault per PCI DSS requirements. Used for display, reconciliation matching, and audit trail.
attributes.references: PCI DSS v4.0 Requirement 3.3; ISO 27001 A.8.2

attributes.name: account_purpose
attributes.description: Free-text description of the specific business purpose of this account (e.g., 'Marketplace seller escrow disbursements - APAC region', 'US payroll funding account'). Provides operational context beyond the account_type classification.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Treasury and Risk Management (TRM)

attributes.name: account_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the bank account. Active: fully operational. Inactive: temporarily not in use. Frozen: blocked by bank or regulatory order. Closed: permanently deactivated. Pending_activation: account opened but not yet confirmed by bank.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Bank Account Management (BAM); SOX Section 302 Internal Controls

attributes.name: account_type
attributes.description: Functional classification of the bank account within the corporate treasury structure. Operating: day-to-day business transactions. Payroll: employee salary disbursements. Escrow: held funds for marketplace seller settlements. Concentration: cash pooling/sweeping. Disbursement: outbound payments only. Collection: inbound receipts only. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: operating|payroll|escrow|concentration|disbursement|collection — promote to reference product]
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Treasury and Risk Management (TRM); SOX Section 404 Cash Controls

attributes.name: bank_branch_address
attributes.description: Full street address of the bank branch. Used for payment instructions, correspondence, and regulatory filings. Classified as confidential organizational contact data.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Bank Master Data (FI-BL); ISO 27001 A.8.2

attributes.name: bank_branch_name
attributes.description: Name of the specific bank branch where the account is held (e.g., 'New York Midtown Branch'). Used for correspondence, wire transfer instructions, and bank relationship management.

attributes.name: bank_contact_email
attributes.description: Email address of the primary bank relationship manager or contact for this account. Used for electronic correspondence, statement delivery notifications, and escalation. Classified as confidential organizational contact data.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Bank Master Data (FI-BL); GDPR Article 4

attributes.name: bank_contact_name
attributes.description: Name of the primary relationship manager or contact person at the bank for this account. Used for escalation, issue resolution, and bank relationship management.

attributes.name: bank_country_code
attributes.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code of the country where the bank branch is domiciled (e.g., USA, GBR, DEU). Drives currency controls, regulatory reporting jurisdiction, and cross-border payment rules.
attributes.references: ISO 3166-1 Alpha-3; WTO International Trade Regulations; GDPR Article 44 (cross-border transfers)

attributes.name: bank_name
attributes.description: Full legal name of the financial institution holding this account (e.g., JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.). Used for treasury reporting, bank relationship management, and counterparty risk assessment.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Bank Master Data (FI-BL); ISO 9362

attributes.name: book_balance
attributes.description: Internal GL book balance for this bank account as recorded in SAP S/4HANA general ledger, in the account's base currency. Compared against current_balance during bank reconciliation to identify timing differences and unrecorded items.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA General Ledger (FI-GL); SOX Section 404 Reconciliation Controls

attributes.name: closing_date
attributes.description: Date on which the bank account was officially closed. Null for active accounts. Used for account lifecycle management, historical reporting, and SOX audit trail.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Bank Account Management (BAM); SOX Section 404

attributes.name: company_code
attributes.description: Four-character SAP company code identifying the legal entity in SAP S/4HANA for financial consolidation, GL posting, and regulatory reporting. Aligns with the owning legal entity for SOX compliance.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI Company Code Configuration; SOX Section 302/404

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this bank account master record was first created in the data platform. Used for audit trail, data lineage, and SOX record-keeping requirements.
attributes.references: SOX Section 404 Audit Trail; ISO 27001 A.12.4 Logging

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the account's primary operating currency (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP). Determines the base currency for all statement balances, transaction amounts, and FX conversion in treasury reporting.
attributes.references: ISO 4217 Currency Codes; SAP S/4HANA Multi-Currency Accounting

attributes.name: current_balance
attributes.description: Most recent confirmed closing balance of the bank account as reported on the latest electronic bank statement, in the account's base currency. Used for daily cash position reporting and liquidity forecasting.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Cash Management (TR-CM); SOX Section 404

attributes.name: dual_control_required
attributes.description: Indicates whether this bank account requires dual authorization (two-person rule) for payment initiation per treasury policy and SOX segregation of duties controls. True: dual approval mandatory. False: single authorization permitted.
attributes.references: SOX Section 404 Segregation of Duties; NIST SP 800-53 AC-5

attributes.name: house_bank_code
attributes.description: SAP S/4HANA house bank identifier that groups bank accounts under a single banking relationship. Used for payment program configuration, bank statement import, and electronic bank reconciliation in SAP FI-BL.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Bank Accounting (FI-BL) House Bank Configuration

attributes.name: iban
attributes.description: International Bank Account Number (IBAN) assigned to this account per ISO 13616 standard. Used for cross-border payment instructions, SEPA transactions, and international treasury operations. Nullable for non-IBAN jurisdictions.
attributes.references: ISO 13616 IBAN Standard; SEPA Credit Transfer Scheme; PCI DSS v4.0 Requirement 3.3

attributes.name: interest_rate
attributes.description: Annual interest rate (as a decimal percentage, e.g., 0.0425 = 4.25%) applicable to this bank account for credit balances or overdraft facilities. Used in treasury yield analysis and cost-of-funds reporting.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Treasury and Risk Management (TRM) — Interest Rate Management

attributes.name: is_pooling_header
attributes.description: Indicates whether this account serves as the header/master account in a cash concentration or notional pooling structure. True: this is the concentration account that receives sweeps from subsidiary accounts. False: standard account.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Cash Management (TR-CM) — Cash Pooling

attributes.name: last_reconciled_date
attributes.description: Date on which the most recent successful automated bank reconciliation was completed for this account in SAP S/4HANA. Used for cash position accuracy monitoring and SOX reconciliation controls.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Bank Reconciliation (FI-BL); SOX Section 404 Reconciliation Controls

attributes.name: last_statement_date
attributes.description: Date of the most recently received and processed electronic bank statement (EBS) for this account. Used to monitor statement receipt timeliness and identify gaps in automated bank reconciliation.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Electronic Bank Statement (EBS) Processing (FI-BL); SOX Section 404

attributes.name: last_updated_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp of the most recent modification to this bank account master record. Used for change tracking, incremental ETL processing, and SOX audit trail.
attributes.references: SOX Section 404 Audit Trail; ISO 27001 A.12.4 Logging

attributes.name: opening_date
attributes.description: Date on which the bank account was officially opened and activated by the financial institution. Used for account tenure analysis, regulatory reporting, and audit trail.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Bank Account Management (BAM); SOX Section 404

attributes.name: overdraft_limit
attributes.description: Maximum overdraft facility amount authorized by the bank for this account, in the account's base currency. Used in daily cash position reporting and liquidity forecasting to determine available credit headroom.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Treasury and Risk Management (TRM) — Liquidity Management

attributes.name: payment_limit
attributes.description: Maximum amount in the account's base currency that can be authorized for a single payment transaction from this account without escalated approval. Enforces treasury payment controls and SOX segregation of duties.
attributes.references: SOX Section 404 Payment Controls; SAP S/4HANA Authorization Management

attributes.name: payment_method_codes
attributes.description: Comma-separated list of SAP payment method codes authorized for use with this bank account (e.g., 'T,U,C' for wire transfer, ACH, check). Controls which payment programs can use this account in SAP automatic payment runs.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Automatic Payment Program (F110); NACHA ACH Rules

attributes.name: reconciliation_status
attributes.description: Current reconciliation status of the bank account as of the last statement processing cycle. Reconciled: all items matched. Unreconciled: outstanding items exist. In_progress: reconciliation run is active. Exception: unresolvable discrepancies requiring manual review.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Bank Reconciliation (FI-BL); SOX Section 404 Internal Controls

attributes.name: routing_number
attributes.description: ABA routing transit number (9-digit) identifying the US financial institution for domestic ACH and wire transfers. Used in payment processing and settlement runs. Applicable for US-domiciled accounts only.
attributes.references: ABA Routing Number Standard; NACHA ACH Operating Rules

attributes.name: signatory_names
attributes.description: Comma-separated list of names of individuals authorized to sign on this bank account per the bank mandate. Used for treasury governance, audit, and SOX segregation of duties controls.
attributes.references: SOX Section 302/404 Internal Controls; ISO 27001 A.9.2 Access Management

attributes.name: source_system
attributes.description: Originating system from which this bank account master record was sourced. SAP_S4HANA: extracted from SAP S/4HANA Bank Account Management. MANUAL: manually entered by treasury team. BANK_PORTAL: imported from bank's online portal.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Integration Framework; ETL Data Lineage Standards

attributes.name: statement_delivery_method
attributes.description: Method by which electronic bank statements are delivered from the bank to the ERP system. SWIFT: via SWIFT network. SFTP: secure file transfer. API: direct bank API integration. Email: email attachment. Manual: manual upload.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Electronic Bank Statement (EBS) Import; SWIFT gpi

attributes.name: statement_format
attributes.description: Format of the electronic bank statement (EBS) received from the bank for automated import into SAP S/4HANA. MT940: SWIFT legacy format. CAMT053: ISO 20022 XML format. BAI2: US cash management format. OFX: Open Financial Exchange. CSV: flat file.
attributes.references: ISO 20022 CAMT.053; SWIFT MT940; BAI2 Cash Management Standard; SAP S/4HANA EBS Configuration

attributes.name: swift_bic
attributes.description: SWIFT/BIC code identifying the bank and branch for international wire transfers and correspondent banking. Conforms to ISO 9362 standard. Required for cross-border payment routing in the Transportation Management System and ERP payment runs.
attributes.references: ISO 9362 BIC Standard; SWIFT gpi; WTO International Trade Regulations

attributes.name: target_balance
attributes.description: Desired minimum or target cash balance for this account as set by treasury policy. Used in cash concentration/sweeping rules and liquidity forecasting to trigger inter-account transfers.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Cash Management (TR-CM); NIST SP 800-53 Financial Controls

products.name: legal_entity
products.description: Master data for all legal entities within the Ecommerce corporate group. Tracks entity name, registration number, jurisdiction, country of incorporation, functional currency, tax identification number, and consolidation group membership. Serves as the organizational anchor for intercompany transactions, regulatory filings, and consolidated financial reporting.
products.reference: Corporate Legal Entity Master / SAP Company Code

attributes.name: legal_entity_id
attributes.description: Primary key for legal_entity

attributes.name: parent_entity_legal_entity_id
attributes.description: Self-referencing identifier pointing to the immediate parent legal entity in the corporate ownership hierarchy. Null for the ultimate holding company.

attributes.name: accounting_standard
attributes.description: Financial reporting standard under which this legal entity prepares its statutory financial statements (IFRS, US GAAP, or local GAAP). Determines accounting policies, disclosure requirements, and consolidation adjustments.
attributes.references: IFRS - International Financial Reporting Standards; US GAAP - ASC; SOX Section 302/404

attributes.name: business_activity_description
attributes.description: Narrative description of the primary business activities conducted by this legal entity (e.g., marketplace operations, fulfillment services, technology platform, financial services). Used for regulatory filings and transfer pricing documentation.
attributes.references: OECD Transfer Pricing Guidelines; FTC; Electronic Commerce Directive (EU)

attributes.name: chart_of_accounts_code
attributes.description: Code identifying the chart of accounts assigned to this legal entity in SAP S/4HANA. Defines the set of general ledger accounts available for financial postings and ensures consistency in financial reporting across the group.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Finance - Chart of Accounts; IFRS; SOX Section 404

attributes.name: company_code
attributes.description: Four-character SAP S/4HANA company code assigned to this legal entity. Serves as the primary organizational unit for financial accounting in the ERP system and links to the general ledger, accounts payable, and accounts receivable modules.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Finance - Company Code Configuration; SOX Section 404

attributes.name: consolidation_method
attributes.description: Accounting method applied when consolidating this entity into the group financial statements. Drives intercompany elimination logic and ownership percentage calculations.
attributes.references: IFRS 10 - Consolidated Financial Statements; IFRS 11 - Joint Arrangements; IAS 28 - Investments in Associates

attributes.name: controlling_area_code
attributes.description: SAP S/4HANA controlling area code associated with this legal entity. Defines the organizational unit for management accounting, cost center hierarchies, and internal order management.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Controlling (CO) Module; SOX Section 404

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this legal entity master data record was first created in the system. Supports audit trail requirements under SOX and data lineage tracking in the Databricks Silver Layer.
attributes.references: SOX Section 302/404 - Audit Trail Requirements; ISO 27001 - Information Security Management

attributes.name: dissolution_date
attributes.description: Date on which the legal entity was formally dissolved, wound up, or deregistered with the relevant government authority. Null for active entities.

attributes.name: effective_from_date
attributes.description: Date from which this legal entity record is considered active and valid for financial transactions, intercompany postings, and regulatory filings within the Ecommerce corporate group.
attributes.references: IAS 1 - Presentation of Financial Statements; SAP S/4HANA Finance

attributes.name: effective_to_date
attributes.description: Date on which this legal entity record ceases to be valid for new transactions. Null for currently active entities. Populated upon dissolution, merger, or deregistration.

attributes.name: entity_name
attributes.description: Full registered legal name of the entity as recorded with the relevant government or regulatory authority in the jurisdiction of incorporation.
attributes.references: ISO 17442 - Legal Entity Identifier (LEI); GDPR Article 4; CCPA

attributes.name: entity_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the legal entity. Drives inclusion or exclusion in consolidation runs, intercompany transaction eligibility, and regulatory filing requirements.

attributes.name: entity_type
attributes.description: Classification of the legal entity by its structural role within the corporate group. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: holding_company|operating_company|subsidiary|joint_venture|branch|partnership|special_purpose_vehicle|associate — promote to reference product]

attributes.name: fiscal_year_variant
attributes.description: SAP fiscal year variant code defining the fiscal year calendar for this entity (e.g., K4 for calendar year, V3 for April–March). Determines period mapping for financial reporting and budget cycles.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Finance - Fiscal Year Variant; IAS 1 - Presentation of Financial Statements

attributes.name: functional_currency
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code representing the primary currency of the economic environment in which the entity operates. Used for local financial statement preparation and SAP S/4HANA company code currency assignment.
attributes.references: IAS 21 - Effects of Changes in Foreign Exchange Rates; ISO 4217; SAP S/4HANA Finance

attributes.name: gdpr_applicable
attributes.business_glossary_term: General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) Applicable Indicator
attributes.description: Indicates whether this legal entity is subject to GDPR data privacy obligations, either as a data controller or data processor. True for entities operating in or processing data of EU residents.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 3 - Territorial Scope; GDPR Article 4

attributes.name: gmv_to_revenue_ratio
attributes.business_glossary_term: Gross Merchandise Value (GMV) to Revenue Ratio
attributes.description: The ratio of net revenue recognized to Gross Merchandise Value (GMV) processed by this legal entity. Used for GMV-to-revenue reconciliation in consolidated financial reporting and take-rate analysis. Value between 0.0000 and 1.0000.
attributes.references: IFRS 15 - Revenue from Contracts with Customers; SOX Section 302/404

attributes.name: incorporation_country_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code representing the country in which the legal entity was incorporated or registered.
attributes.references: ISO 3166-1 Alpha-3; WTO International Trade Regulations; GDPR

attributes.name: incorporation_date
attributes.description: Date on which the legal entity was formally incorporated or registered with the relevant government authority. Used for entity age calculations and regulatory filing timelines.

attributes.name: industry_classification_code
attributes.description: Standard industry classification code (NAICS or SIC) assigned to this legal entity based on its primary business activity. Used for regulatory reporting, benchmarking, and transfer pricing comparability analysis.
attributes.references: NAICS - North American Industry Classification System; SIC - Standard Industrial Classification; FTC

attributes.name: intercompany_trading_partner_code
attributes.description: SAP S/4HANA trading partner code assigned to this legal entity for intercompany transaction identification and elimination during group consolidation. Enables automated intercompany reconciliation.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Finance - Intercompany Processing; IFRS 10; SOX Section 404

attributes.name: jurisdiction
attributes.description: Specific legal jurisdiction (state, province, or territory) within the country of incorporation where the entity is registered. Relevant for sub-national regulatory compliance (e.g., Delaware, California, Ontario).
attributes.references: CCPA; FTC - Consumer Protection Standards; Electronic Commerce Directive (EU)

attributes.name: last_updated_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp of the most recent update to this legal entity master data record. Used for change data capture (CDC), audit trail compliance, and data freshness monitoring in the Silver Layer.
attributes.references: SOX Section 302/404 - Audit Trail Requirements; ISO 27001; NIST Cybersecurity Framework

attributes.name: legal_form
attributes.description: Legal structure or form of the entity as defined by the jurisdiction of incorporation (e.g., LLC, PLC, GmbH, S.A., Pvt Ltd, Corp). Determines governance, liability, and reporting obligations.
attributes.references: ISO 20275 - Entity Legal Forms (ELF); Electronic Commerce Directive (EU)

attributes.name: lei_code
attributes.description: 20-character alphanumeric Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) code assigned by a Local Operating Unit (LOU) accredited by the Global LEI Foundation (GLEIF). Used for regulatory reporting and counterparty identification in financial transactions.

attributes.name: operating_country_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code for the primary country where the entity conducts its business operations. May differ from the country of incorporation for tax-optimized structures.
attributes.references: ISO 3166-1 Alpha-3; WTO; OECD Transfer Pricing Guidelines

attributes.name: ownership_pct
attributes.description: Percentage of the legal entity owned by the immediate parent entity in the corporate hierarchy. Used to determine consolidation scope and minority interest calculations. Value between 0.00 and 100.00.
attributes.references: IFRS 10 - Consolidated Financial Statements; SOX Section 302/404

attributes.name: pci_dss_applicable
attributes.business_glossary_term: Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard (PCI DSS) Applicable Indicator
attributes.description: Indicates whether this legal entity is subject to PCI DSS compliance requirements due to processing, storing, or transmitting payment card data. Drives scope of PCI DSS audit and certification.
attributes.references: PCI DSS v4.0 - Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard; PCI SSC

attributes.name: registered_address_city
attributes.description: City of the official registered address of the legal entity. Used for regulatory filings, tax jurisdiction determination, and legal correspondence.

attributes.name: registered_address_country_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code for the country of the entity's registered address. May differ from the country of incorporation for branch offices.

attributes.name: registered_address_line1
attributes.description: First line of the official registered address of the legal entity as recorded with the government authority. Used for regulatory correspondence, tax filings, and legal notices.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 4; CCPA; FTC - Business Registration Standards

attributes.name: registered_address_postal_code
attributes.description: Postal or ZIP code of the official registered address. Used for tax jurisdiction mapping, regulatory filings, and last-mile logistics planning for entity-level shipments.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 4; CCPA; Universal Postal Union (UPU) Standards

attributes.name: registration_number
attributes.description: Official company registration number assigned by the government authority in the jurisdiction of incorporation (e.g., Companies House number in the UK, EIN in the US).
attributes.references: ISO 17442; FTC - Business Registration Standards; Electronic Commerce Directive (EU)

attributes.name: reporting_currency
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code used for presenting the entity's financial statements in consolidated group reporting. Typically the group's presentation currency (e.g., USD for a US-listed parent).

attributes.name: revenue_recognition_standard
attributes.description: Accounting standard applied for revenue recognition by this legal entity. Determines how and when revenue from e-commerce transactions, marketplace fees, and fulfillment services is recognized.
attributes.references: IFRS 15 - Revenue from Contracts with Customers; ASC 606 - US GAAP Revenue Recognition; SOX Section 302/404

attributes.name: short_name
attributes.description: Abbreviated or trading name of the legal entity used in internal reporting, system displays, and intercompany references.

attributes.name: sox_in_scope
attributes.description: Indicates whether this legal entity is within the scope of Sarbanes-Oxley (SOX) internal controls assessment and financial reporting requirements. True for entities that are material to the consolidated group's financial statements.
attributes.references: SOX Section 302/404 - Internal Controls over Financial Reporting

attributes.name: tax_id_number
attributes.description: Government-issued Tax Identification Number (TIN) or Employer Identification Number (EIN) used for tax filings, regulatory reporting, and financial settlements. Classified as restricted due to sensitivity of tax data.
attributes.references: SOX Section 302/404; IRS EIN Standards; GDPR Article 9; CCPA

attributes.name: tax_jurisdiction_code
attributes.description: Code identifying the tax jurisdiction applicable to this legal entity for indirect tax (VAT/GST) determination, withholding tax, and transfer pricing compliance. Aligns with SAP S/4HANA tax jurisdiction configuration.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Tax Configuration; OECD Transfer Pricing Guidelines; SOX Section 404

attributes.name: vat_registration_number
attributes.description: Value Added Tax (VAT) or Goods and Services Tax (GST) registration number issued by the tax authority in the entity's operating jurisdiction. Required for cross-border e-commerce tax compliance.
attributes.references: Electronic Commerce Directive (EU); WTO International Trade Regulations; GDPR

attributes.name: voting_rights_pct
attributes.description: Percentage of voting rights held by the parent entity in this legal entity. May differ from ownership percentage in dual-class share structures. Determines control assessment under IFRS 10.
attributes.references: IFRS 10 - Consolidated Financial Statements; Corporate Governance Standards

domains.name: procurement
domains.description: Manages supplier relationships, purchase orders, vendor contracts, procurement workflows, and supplier performance monitoring. Tracks MOQ, lead times, and procurement costs. Integrates with ERP for procure-to-pay processes, supplier onboarding, and vendor compliance management.
domains.references: Enterprise Resource Planning - SAP S/4HANA, ISO 20400

products.name: supplier
products.description: Master record for all suppliers and vendors in the e-commerce procurement network. Captures supplier identity, classification, contact details (including multiple contact persons with roles and communication preferences), tax identifiers, payment terms, currency, country of origin, supplier tier (strategic/preferred/approved/transactional), onboarding status, compliance certifications (ISO/PCI/GDPR/CPSC with expiry tracking), lead time parameters per SKU-warehouse combination, and risk assessment scores. SSOT for supplier identity and supplier-level attributes across the procurement domain. Integrates with SAP S/4HANA vendor master.

attributes.name: supplier_id
attributes.description: Primary key for supplier

attributes.name: legal_entity_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.legal_entity. Business justification: Suppliers are onboarded and contracted by a specific legal entity, critical for VAT reclaim, withholding tax compliance, intercompany transaction reporting, and regulatory filings. E-commerce platform

attributes.name: primary_category_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.category. Business justification: Suppliers in e-commerce are onboarded and managed by primary product category specialization (electronics supplier, apparel supplier). Category managers use this to identify category-specialized suppl

attributes.name: bank_account_name
attributes.description: Name of the bank account holder as registered for supplier payment remittance. Used in AP payment processing to validate beneficiary identity and prevent payment fraud. Subject to PCI DSS and SOX financial controls.
attributes.references: PCI DSS Requirement 3; SOX Section 404; SAP S/4HANA Bank Details (LFBK)

attributes.name: bank_account_number
attributes.description: Supplier's bank account number for payment remittance. Stored in encrypted/tokenized form per PCI DSS requirements. Used exclusively by the AP payment processing module in SAP S/4HANA for wire transfers and ACH payments.
attributes.references: PCI DSS Requirement 3.4 (data masking); SOX Section 404; SAP S/4HANA Bank Details (LFBK-BANKN)

attributes.name: bank_routing_code
attributes.description: Bank routing identifier for payment processing — either SWIFT/BIC code for international wire transfers or ABA routing number for US domestic ACH payments. Required for accurate payment routing in the AP settlement process.
attributes.references: SWIFT BIC Standard (ISO 9362); ABA Routing Number Standard; PCI DSS Requirement 3; SAP S/4HANA (LFBK-BANKL)

attributes.name: billing_address_line1
attributes.description: First line of the supplier's registered billing address. Used for invoice processing, payment remittance, and accounts payable (AP) in SAP S/4HANA. Required for PCI DSS-compliant payment processing and SOX financial controls.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Vendor Master (LFA1-STRAS); PCI DSS Requirement 3; SOX Section 404

attributes.name: billing_city
attributes.description: City component of the supplier's registered billing address. Used in conjunction with billing_address_line1 for complete address resolution in AP payment processing and tax jurisdiction determination.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Vendor Master (LFA1-ORT01); ISO 3166-2 Subdivision Codes

attributes.name: billing_country
attributes.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code for the supplier's billing address country. Drives tax jurisdiction rules, currency defaults, and cross-border trade compliance in the ERP procure-to-pay process.
attributes.references: ISO 3166-1 Alpha-3; SAP S/4HANA (LFA1-LAND1); WTO Trade Facilitation Agreement

attributes.name: billing_postal_code
attributes.description: Postal or ZIP code of the supplier's billing address. Used for tax jurisdiction mapping, carrier rate determination, and address validation in the procure-to-pay workflow.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Vendor Master (LFA1-PSTLZ); Universal Postal Union (UPU) Standards

attributes.name: contract_end_date
attributes.description: Expiry date of the current master vendor agreement or supplier contract. Triggers contract renewal workflows and procurement alerts when approaching expiry. Nullable for open-ended evergreen contracts.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Outline Agreement (EKKO-KDATB); SOX Section 404 Contract Controls

attributes.name: contract_start_date
attributes.description: Effective start date of the current master vendor agreement or supplier contract. Defines the period during which negotiated pricing, payment terms, and SLAs are binding. Used in SAP S/4HANA outline agreements and procurement scheduling.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Outline Agreement (EKKO-KDATB); SOX Section 404 Contract Controls

attributes.name: country_of_origin
attributes.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code representing the country where the supplier is legally registered and primarily operates. Used for import/export compliance, tariff classification, and WTO trade regulation adherence.
attributes.references: ISO 3166-1 Alpha-3; WTO Rules of Origin; U.S. Customs and Border Protection

attributes.name: cpsc_certification_expiry
attributes.description: Expiry date of the supplier's CPSC product safety certification. Used to enforce product safety compliance gating in the Product Information Management System (PIM) catalog onboarding workflow.
attributes.references: CPSC Consumer Product Safety Act; CPSC 16 CFR Part 1107 (Third Party Testing)

attributes.name: cpsc_compliant
attributes.business_glossary_term: Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) Compliance Flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the supplier's products meet Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) safety standards. Required for suppliers providing consumer goods sold on the e-commerce marketplace. Non-compliant suppliers are blocked from product catalog onboarding.
attributes.references: CPSC Consumer Product Safety Act (CPSA); CPSC 16 CFR Parts 1107 and 1109

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the supplier master record was first created in the system. Provides the audit trail entry point for the supplier lifecycle. Stored in ISO 8601 format with timezone offset per platform convention.
attributes.references: ISO 8601 Date/Time Standard; SOX Section 404 Audit Trail Requirements; GDPR Article 5(2) Accountability

attributes.name: default_lead_time_days
attributes.description: Standard supplier lead time in calendar days from Purchase Order (PO) placement to goods receipt at the warehouse. Used as the default for inventory replenishment planning and MOQ calculations when no SKU-specific lead time is defined. Feeds into the WMS receiving schedule and ERP supply chain planning.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MRP Lead Time (MARC-WEBAZ); WMS Receiving Planning; Procurement SLA Management

attributes.name: gdpr_compliant
attributes.business_glossary_term: General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) Compliance Flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the supplier has signed a Data Processing Agreement (DPA) and is confirmed GDPR compliant for handling EU personal data. Mandatory for suppliers processing customer data on behalf of the e-commerce platform under GDPR Article 28.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 28 (Data Processing Agreement); GDPR Article 32 (Security of Processing); Electronic Commerce Directive (EU)

attributes.name: incoterms_code
attributes.description: International Commercial Terms (Incoterms 2020) code defining the division of costs, risks, and responsibilities between the buyer and supplier for goods delivery. Drives logistics cost allocation, insurance requirements, and customs documentation in the TMS and ERP. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: EXW|FCA|CPT|CIP|DAP|DPU|DDP|FAS|FOB|CFR|CIF — 11 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]
attributes.references: ICC Incoterms 2020; WTO Trade Facilitation Agreement; SAP S/4HANA Purchasing (EKKO-INCO1)

attributes.name: is_diversity_supplier
attributes.description: Indicates whether the supplier holds a recognized diversity certification (e.g., minority-owned, women-owned, veteran-owned, small business). Tracked for supplier diversity program reporting, ESG compliance, and government contract requirements.
attributes.references: FTC Supplier Diversity Standards; U.S. Small Business Administration (SBA) 8(a) Program; ESG Reporting Frameworks

attributes.name: is_preferred_vendor
attributes.description: Indicates whether this supplier is designated as a preferred vendor in the approved vendor list (AVL). Preferred vendors receive priority in automated PO sourcing and are eligible for blanket purchase agreements. Managed in SAP S/4HANA vendor evaluation.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Vendor Evaluation (ME61); Procurement Approved Vendor List Policy

attributes.name: iso_certification_expiry
attributes.description: Expiry date of the supplier's ISO certification. Procurement compliance workflows use this date to trigger re-certification reminders and to flag suppliers with lapsed certifications for suspension review.

attributes.name: iso_certified
attributes.description: Indicates whether the supplier holds a valid ISO certification (e.g., ISO 9001 Quality Management, ISO 27001 Information Security, ISO 14001 Environmental Management). Drives compliance gating in the supplier onboarding workflow.
attributes.references: ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management; ISO 27001:2022 Information Security; ISO 14001:2015 Environmental Management

attributes.name: last_updated_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp of the most recent modification to the supplier master record. Used for change data capture (CDC) in the ERP-to-lakehouse ETL pipeline and for audit trail compliance under SOX and GDPR accountability requirements.
attributes.references: ISO 8601 Date/Time Standard; SOX Section 404 Audit Trail; GDPR Article 5(2) Accountability; ETL CDC Pattern

attributes.name: legal_name
attributes.description: Full registered legal name of the supplier entity as recorded in official business registration documents. Used for contract execution, tax filings, and regulatory compliance. Must match the name on vendor contracts and invoices.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Vendor Master (LFA1-NAME1); FTC Consumer Protection Standards; SOX Section 404

attributes.name: moq
attributes.description: Minimum Order Quantity (MOQ) — the minimum number of units the supplier requires per purchase order line. Enforced during PO creation in the ERP to prevent under-minimum orders. Critical for inventory planning and procurement cost optimization.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Purchasing Info Record (EINA-MINBM); Procurement Best Practices

attributes.name: onboarding_date
attributes.description: Date on which the supplier was formally approved and activated in the procurement system following completion of the onboarding workflow (KYC, compliance checks, contract execution). Marks the start of the active vendor relationship.
attributes.references: Seller Management Portal Onboarding Workflow; SAP S/4HANA Vendor Master Activation

attributes.name: onboarding_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle state of the supplier in the procurement onboarding and vendor management workflow. Pending: application submitted. Under Review: compliance and due diligence in progress. Approved: cleared for procurement. Active: currently transacting. Suspended: temporarily blocked. Terminated: relationship ended.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Vendor Lifecycle Management; Seller Management Portal Onboarding Workflow

attributes.name: payment_currency
attributes.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code in which the supplier invoices and is paid (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP). Drives FX conversion in SAP S/4HANA AP and financial settlement. Essential for multi-currency procurement operations.
attributes.references: ISO 4217 Currency Codes; SAP S/4HANA Vendor Master (LFA1-WAERS); SOX Financial Reporting

attributes.name: payment_terms_code
attributes.description: Standard payment terms code agreed with the supplier, defining the payment due date and any early payment discount conditions (e.g., NET30, NET60, 2/10NET30 meaning 2% discount if paid within 10 days, net due in 30). Maps to SAP S/4HANA payment terms (ZTERM). Critical for cash flow management and AP settlement.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Payment Terms (T052-ZTERM); SOX Section 404 AP Controls; GAAP Accounts Payable Standards

attributes.name: pci_dss_compliant
attributes.business_glossary_term: Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard (PCI DSS) Compliance Flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the supplier is currently PCI DSS compliant, relevant for suppliers handling payment card data or integrated into the payment processing ecosystem. Required for suppliers in the Payment Gateway and Processing Platform integration.
attributes.references: PCI DSS v4.0 (PCI Security Standards Council); PCI SSC Compliance Requirements

attributes.name: pci_dss_expiry
attributes.description: Expiry date of the supplier's PCI DSS compliance certification. Annual re-assessment is required per PCI SSC standards. Used to trigger compliance renewal workflows and to block non-compliant suppliers from payment data integrations.
attributes.references: PCI DSS v4.0 Requirement 12.3.2; PCI Security Standards Council Annual Assessment

attributes.name: primary_contact_email
attributes.description: Business email address of the primary contact person at the supplier. Used for PO transmission, invoice correspondence, and procurement workflow notifications. Subject to GDPR legitimate interest basis for B2B processing.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 6(1)(f); CCPA Section 1798.140; SAP S/4HANA Vendor Communication (LFA1-SMTP_ADDR)

attributes.name: primary_contact_name
attributes.description: Full name of the primary business contact person at the supplier organization. Used for procurement communications, PO acknowledgments, and relationship management. Not a personal consumer — represents a B2B contact.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 6 (legitimate interest for B2B contacts); SAP S/4HANA Contact Person (KNVK)

attributes.name: primary_contact_phone
attributes.description: Business phone number of the primary contact at the supplier organization. Used for urgent procurement escalations, delivery coordination, and supplier relationship management. Stored in E.164 international format.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 6(1)(f); ITU-T E.164 International Telephone Numbering Plan; SAP S/4HANA (LFA1-TELF1)

attributes.name: primary_contact_role
attributes.description: Business role or function of the primary contact person at the supplier. Determines routing of procurement communications (e.g., POs to account manager, invoices to finance contact, shipment queries to logistics coordinator).
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Contact Person Function (KNVK-PAFKT); Procurement SLA Management

attributes.name: registration_number
attributes.description: Official government-issued business registration or incorporation number for the supplier entity. Used for legal verification, KYC (Know Your Customer) compliance, and regulatory filings. Format varies by country of registration.
attributes.references: ISO 6523; FTC Business Registration; GDPR Article 13 (data controller identification)

attributes.name: risk_category
attributes.description: Categorical risk classification derived from the supplier risk assessment process. Low: minimal supply chain risk. Medium: moderate risk requiring monitoring. High: significant risk requiring mitigation plans. Critical: immediate action required. Used to trigger procurement escalation workflows.
attributes.references: ISO 31000 Risk Management; NIST Cybersecurity Framework SP 800-161 (Supply Chain Risk)

attributes.name: risk_score
attributes.description: Composite risk assessment score for the supplier on a 0.00–100.00 scale, where higher values indicate greater risk. Incorporates financial stability, geopolitical exposure, compliance history, and delivery performance. Used by procurement to prioritize supplier audits and diversification strategies.
attributes.references: ISO 31000 Risk Management; NIST Cybersecurity Framework; Procurement Risk Management Best Practices

attributes.name: supplier_code
attributes.description: Externally-known alphanumeric code assigned to the supplier for cross-system identification. Used in Purchase Orders (POs), EDI transactions, and ERP integrations. Maps to the SAP S/4HANA vendor account number.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Vendor Master (LFA1-LIFNR); ISO 6523 Party Identification

attributes.name: supplier_tier
attributes.description: Procurement tier classification indicating the strategic importance and relationship depth with the supplier. Strategic: top-tier partners with deep integration and long-term contracts. Preferred: vetted suppliers with negotiated terms. Approved: qualified suppliers on the approved vendor list. Transactional: one-off or spot-buy suppliers.
attributes.references: Procurement Best Practices; SAP S/4HANA Vendor Classification

attributes.name: supplier_type
attributes.description: Classification of the supplier by their role in the supply chain. Manufacturer: produces goods directly. Distributor: resells from manufacturers. Wholesaler: bulk reseller. 3PL (Third-Party Logistics): logistics provider. Dropshipper: ships directly to end customer. Marketplace Seller: sells via the e-commerce marketplace platform.
attributes.references: Procurement Domain Classification; WTO Trade Facilitation Agreement

attributes.name: tax_identifier
attributes.description: Government-issued tax identification number for the supplier, such as EIN (Employer Identification Number) in the US, VAT number in the EU, or GST number in other jurisdictions. Required for tax reporting, invoice validation, and SOX-compliant financial controls.
attributes.references: IRS EIN; EU VAT Directive 2006/112/EC; SOX Section 302; SAP S/4HANA Vendor Master (LFA1-STCD1)

attributes.name: trade_name
attributes.description: Operating or trade name (Doing Business As) of the supplier, which may differ from the legal name. Used in day-to-day procurement communications, catalog displays, and seller portal references.

attributes.name: vat_number
attributes.description: VAT registration number for suppliers operating in VAT-applicable jurisdictions (primarily EU). Distinct from the general tax_id as it specifically governs VAT reclaim and cross-border EU trade compliance. Required for EU Electronic Commerce Directive compliance.
attributes.references: EU VAT Directive 2006/112/EC; Electronic Commerce Directive (EU); SAP S/4HANA (LFA1-STCD2)

products.name: purchase_order
products.description: Core transactional record representing a formal procurement commitment issued to a supplier. Captures PO number, PO type (standard/blanket/consignment/drop-ship), supplier reference, buyer, requested delivery date, ship-to warehouse, total PO value, currency, payment terms, incoterms, approval status, and PO lifecycle state (draft/approved/sent/acknowledged/partially_received/closed/cancelled). Integrates with SAP S/4HANA ME21N/ME22N and WMS receiving workflows.

attributes.name: purchase_order_id
attributes.description: Primary key for purchase_order

attributes.name: blanket_po_purchase_order_id
attributes.description: Reference to the parent blanket purchase order when this PO is a release against an open blanket agreement. Enables aggregation of spend and quantity consumed against the blanket PO ceiling.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA ME21N — Blanket PO Reference; CIPS Procurement Classification

attributes.name: buyer_account_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to customer.account. Business justification: Associates drop‑ship or direct‑to‑customer purchase orders with the buying customer.account for fulfillment and revenue reporting.

attributes.name: buyer_contact_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to customer.contact. Business justification: B2B e-commerce PO approval workflows and audit trails require knowing which buyer-side contact (procurement officer, category manager) raised or approved the purchase order. purchase_order has buyer_a

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Cost‑center allocation of PO spend is mandatory for internal budgeting and cost‑center performance reports.

attributes.name: general_ledger_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.general_ledger. Business justification: Allows automatic posting of PO amounts to the correct GL account, supporting the standard purchase‑to‑pay financial flow.

attributes.name: price_list_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to pricing.price_list. Business justification: Required for PO pricing reports: each purchase order is priced using a specific price list to compute expected cost and margin.

attributes.name: promotional_campaign_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to pricing.promotional_campaign. Business justification: E-commerce procurement teams raise POs specifically to stock inventory for promotional campaigns (flash sales, seasonal events). Linking PO to promotional_campaign enables promotional inventory planni

attributes.name: seller_profile_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to seller.seller_profile. Business justification: Business process: Seller‑initiated purchase order for inventory replenishment; reports require linking PO to the seller profile that placed it.

attributes.name: supplier_id
attributes.description: Reference to the supplier (vendor) master record to whom this purchase order is issued. Maps to the vendor master in SAP S/4HANA and the Seller Management Portal for marketplace suppliers.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Vendor Master (LFA1); Seller Management Portal — Supplier Onboarding

attributes.name: vendor_contract_id
attributes.description: Reference to the underlying vendor contract or blanket purchase agreement (outline agreement) from which this purchase order was released. Enables contract compliance tracking, spend-against-contract analysis, and contract utilization reporting.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA ME31K — Contract; CIPS Contract Management

attributes.name: warehouse_node_id
attributes.description: Reference to the destination warehouse or fulfillment center where goods are to be received. Drives WMS receiving workflow initiation, inventory allocation, and inbound logistics planning.
attributes.references: Warehouse Management System (WMS) — Receiving Location; SAP S/4HANA — Plant/Storage Location

attributes.name: actual_delivery_date
attributes.description: The date goods were physically received at the ship-to warehouse as recorded by the WMS goods receipt process. Used to calculate supplier on-time delivery performance and lead time actuals.
attributes.references: Warehouse Management System (WMS) — Goods Receipt Date; SAP S/4HANA MIGO — Goods Receipt

attributes.name: approval_status
attributes.description: Internal authorization state of the purchase order within the procurement approval workflow. Tracks whether the PO has cleared the required approval hierarchy (e.g., manager, finance controller) before transmission to the supplier. Distinct from lifecycle_status which tracks the broader PO state.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA ME28 — Release Purchase Orders; SOX Section 302 — Internal Controls

attributes.name: approved_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the purchase order received final internal approval and was authorized for transmission to the supplier. Used for approval cycle time analytics and SOX internal control evidence.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA ME28 — Release Timestamp; SOX Section 302 — Internal Controls

attributes.name: confirmed_delivery_date
attributes.description: The delivery date confirmed by the supplier upon order acknowledgement. Compared against requested_delivery_date to measure supplier on-time commitment accuracy and to trigger alerts for potential stockouts.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA — Order Acknowledgement Date; EDI X12 855 Purchase Order Acknowledgement

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: System timestamp when the purchase order record was first created in SAP S/4HANA and ingested into the Databricks Silver Layer. Used for audit trail, data lineage, and SLA compliance reporting.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA — Creation Timestamp (EKKO-AEDAT); ISO/IEC 27001 — Audit Logging

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code in which the purchase order is denominated (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP). Determines the currency for all monetary fields on this PO and drives foreign exchange conversion for consolidated spend reporting.
attributes.references: ISO 4217 — Currency Codes; SAP S/4HANA — Document Currency (EKKO-WAERS)

attributes.name: discount_amount
attributes.description: Total monetary discount applied to the purchase order, including negotiated volume discounts, promotional rebates, and early payment discounts. Reduces the gross amount to arrive at the net payable amount.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA — Condition Value (KONV); CIPS Supplier Negotiation Standards

attributes.name: exchange_rate
attributes.description: Exchange rate applied to convert the PO currency to the company code local currency at the time of PO creation. Used for multi-currency spend consolidation, financial reporting, and variance analysis.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA — Exchange Rate (EKKO-WKURS); ISO 4217; IFRS 21 — Effects of Changes in Foreign Exchange Rates

attributes.name: goods_receipt_status
attributes.description: Current status of goods receipt against this purchase order as recorded in the WMS and SAP S/4HANA MIGO. Tracks whether no goods have been received, some lines/quantities are received, or all ordered quantities have been fully received.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MIGO — Goods Receipt; WMS Receiving Workflow; ISO 15000-5

attributes.name: gross_amount
attributes.description: Total gross value of the purchase order before any discounts, taxes, or adjustments. Calculated as the sum of all line item quantities multiplied by their unit prices. Used for spend analytics, budget commitment tracking, and GMV reporting.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA — Net Order Value (EKKO-NETWR); SOX Financial Reporting

attributes.name: incoterms
