attributes.description: International Commercial Terms (Incoterms 2020) defining the transfer of risk, cost responsibility, and delivery obligations between buyer and supplier. Determines who bears freight, insurance, and customs costs. Critical for landed cost calculation and logistics planning. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: EXW|FCA|CPT|CIP|DAP|DPU|DDP|FAS|FOB|CFR|CIF — 11 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]
attributes.references: ICC Incoterms 2020; SAP S/4HANA — Incoterms (EKKO-INCO1); WTO International Trade Regulations

attributes.name: incoterms_location
attributes.description: The named place or port associated with the Incoterms condition (e.g., 'FOB Shanghai', 'DAP Los Angeles'). Specifies the exact point of risk transfer and cost responsibility as required by ICC Incoterms 2020.
attributes.references: ICC Incoterms 2020 — Named Place; SAP S/4HANA — Incoterms Location (EKKO-INCO2)

attributes.name: invoice_status
attributes.description: Status of supplier invoice matching against this purchase order in the SAP S/4HANA three-way match process (PO, goods receipt, invoice). Tracks whether invoices have been received, partially matched, fully matched, or are under dispute.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MIRO — Invoice Verification; PCI DSS — Payment Processing Controls; SOX AP Controls

attributes.name: is_drop_ship
attributes.description: Indicates whether this purchase order is a drop-ship arrangement where the supplier ships goods directly to the end customer rather than to a company warehouse. Triggers different fulfillment workflows in the OMS and WMS.
attributes.references: OMS — Drop-Ship Fulfillment Workflow; SAP S/4HANA — Third-Party Order Processing

attributes.name: is_urgent
attributes.description: Indicates whether this purchase order has been flagged as urgent, requiring expedited processing, prioritized supplier communication, and accelerated receiving. Typically set when inventory levels are critically low (OOS risk) or to fulfill a high-priority customer order.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA — Priority Flag; WMS Expedite Workflow

attributes.name: lead_time_days
attributes.description: Agreed or estimated number of calendar days from PO issuance to expected goods receipt at the destination warehouse. Used for inventory replenishment planning, safety stock calculations, and supplier performance benchmarking.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA — Planned Delivery Time (MARC-PLIFZ); CIPS Supply Chain Management

attributes.name: lifecycle_status
attributes.description: Current state of the purchase order within the procure-to-pay lifecycle. Draft = created but not yet approved; Approved = internally authorized; Sent = transmitted to supplier; Acknowledged = supplier confirmed receipt; Partially_received = some line items received in WMS; Closed = fully received and matched; Cancelled = voided before completion. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: draft|approved|sent|acknowledged|partially_received|closed|cancelled — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA ME22N — PO Status Management; ISO 15000-5 ebXML Procurement

attributes.name: moq
attributes.description: Minimum Order Quantity (MOQ) stipulated by the supplier for this purchase order. Represents the smallest quantity the supplier will accept per order. Used in replenishment planning to ensure order quantities meet supplier thresholds.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA — Minimum Order Quantity (EINE-MINBM); CIPS Supplier Terms

attributes.name: net_amount
attributes.description: Total net payable amount of the purchase order after applying discounts and adding taxes. Represents the financial commitment to the supplier and is used for accounts payable matching, budget consumption, and financial reporting.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA — Net Order Value (EKKO-NETWR); SOX Financial Reporting; IFRS 15

attributes.name: notes
attributes.description: Free-text notes and special instructions associated with the purchase order, including delivery instructions, quality requirements, packaging specifications, or buyer-supplier communication captured at PO creation or amendment.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA ME21N — Header Text; CIPS Procurement Documentation

attributes.name: order_date
attributes.description: The business date on which the purchase order was formally issued and transmitted to the supplier. Represents the principal real-world event time for this procurement transaction. Used as the baseline for lead time calculations and payment term due date computation.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA ME21N — Document Date (EKKO-BEDAT); EDI X12 850

attributes.name: payment_terms
attributes.description: Agreed payment terms between the buyer and supplier, specifying the payment due period and any early payment discount conditions (e.g., Net30, Net60, 2/10Net30). Drives accounts payable due date calculation and cash flow planning.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA — Payment Terms (EKKO-ZTERM); CIPS Payment Terms Standards

attributes.name: po_number
attributes.description: Externally visible, human-readable purchase order number assigned by SAP S/4HANA ME21N at PO creation. Used in all supplier communications, EDI transactions, and receiving workflows. Globally unique within the enterprise.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA ME21N — Purchase Order Object; EDI X12 850 Purchase Order

attributes.name: po_type
attributes.description: Classification of the purchase order by procurement strategy. Standard = one-time discrete order; Blanket = open quantity/value agreement with releases; Consignment = supplier-owned stock held at warehouse; Drop-ship = supplier ships directly to customer; Service = non-goods procurement.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA ME21N — Document Type; CIPS Procurement Classification Standard

attributes.name: purchasing_group
attributes.description: SAP S/4HANA purchasing group code identifying the buyer team or commodity group responsible for this PO. Used for spend analytics, category management, and buyer performance reporting.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA — Purchasing Group (EKKO-EKGRP); CIPS Category Management

attributes.name: purchasing_org
attributes.description: SAP S/4HANA purchasing organization code responsible for negotiating and issuing this purchase order. Determines the legal entity, currency, and terms applicable to the procurement transaction. Aligns with organizational hierarchy for spend reporting.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA — Purchasing Organization (EKKO-EKORG); ISO 20022 — Organizational Identifier

attributes.name: requested_delivery_date
attributes.description: The date by which the buyer requires the goods or services to be delivered to the ship-to location. Used for supplier SLA tracking, lead time analysis, and inventory replenishment planning. Distinct from the confirmed delivery date provided by the supplier.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA ME21N — Delivery Date (EKET-EINDT); SLA Management

attributes.name: requisition_number
attributes.description: The purchase requisition number from SAP S/4HANA ME51N that originated this purchase order. Provides the audit trail from business need (requisition) to formal commitment (PO) for SOX compliance and spend authorization tracking.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA ME51N — Purchase Requisition; SOX Section 302 — Procurement Controls

attributes.name: sent_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the purchase order was electronically transmitted to the supplier via EDI, email, or supplier portal. Marks the start of the supplier lead time clock and is used for SLA and communication audit purposes.
attributes.references: EDI X12 850 — Purchase Order Transmission; SAP S/4HANA — Output Management

attributes.name: ship_to_address
attributes.description: Full delivery address for the purchase order, including street, city, state/province, postal code, and country. Used for carrier routing, customs documentation, and inbound logistics coordination. May differ from the warehouse address for drop-ship or direct-to-store orders.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA — Delivery Address (EKKO); TMS Carrier Routing; GDPR Article 4 — Personal Data

attributes.name: source_system
attributes.description: Identifies the operational system of record from which this purchase order record was originated or last updated. Used for data lineage tracking, ETL reconciliation, and audit purposes in the Databricks Silver Layer.
attributes.references: ISO/IEC 27001 — Data Lineage; NIST SP 800-53 — Audit and Accountability

attributes.name: supplier_reference_number
attributes.description: The supplier's own order confirmation or reference number provided upon acknowledgement of the purchase order. Used for cross-referencing in supplier communications, EDI transactions, and invoice matching.
attributes.references: EDI X12 855 — Purchase Order Acknowledgement; SAP S/4HANA — Supplier Confirmation

attributes.name: tax_amount
attributes.description: Total tax amount applicable to the purchase order, including VAT, GST, import duties, and other applicable taxes. Computed based on the tax code and jurisdiction rules configured in SAP S/4HANA.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA — Tax Amount (EKKO); EU VAT Directive; WTO Customs Valuation Agreement

attributes.name: total_line_count
attributes.description: Total number of line items included in this purchase order. Used for PO complexity analysis, receiving workflow planning, and supplier performance metrics. Not a calculated aggregate — captured at PO creation from the source system.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA ME21N — Item Count; WMS Receiving Workflow

attributes.name: updated_timestamp
attributes.description: System timestamp of the most recent modification to the purchase order record, including status changes, quantity amendments, price revisions, or delivery date updates. Used for change tracking and incremental ETL processing.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA — Change Timestamp (EKKO-AEDAT); ISO/IEC 27001 — Audit Logging

products.name: po_line_item
products.description: Individual line-level detail within a purchase order. Captures line number, SKU/material number, ordered quantity, unit of measure, agreed unit price, line total, MOQ compliance flag, requested delivery date per line, confirmed delivery date, goods receipt quantity, invoice quantity, and line status. Enables granular tracking of multi-SKU POs and partial fulfillment scenarios common in e-commerce replenishment.

attributes.name: po_line_item_id
attributes.description: Unique surrogate identifier for each purchase order line item record in the Silver Layer lakehouse. Serves as the primary key for this entity. Entity role: TRANSACTION_LINE.
attributes.references: ISO/IEC 11179 — Data Element Naming and Definition

attributes.name: campaign_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to marketing.campaign. Business justification: E-commerce media buying and promotional material procurement raises PO line items against specific campaigns for granular cost allocation. Linking po_line_item to campaign enables campaign-level actua

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: PO line items carry individual cost center assignments (SAP account assignment). Line-level cost allocation is standard in procure-to-pay for departmental expense tracking and budget consumption repor

attributes.name: general_ledger_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.general_ledger. Business justification: PO line items are assigned to GL accounts (account assignment category) for expense categorization and financial reporting. gl_account_code on po_line_item is a denormalized plain attribute. Line-leve

attributes.name: price_list_item_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to pricing.price_list_item. Business justification: Needed for line‑item cost analysis: each PO line item references the exact price‑list item that supplied its unit price.

attributes.name: purchase_order_id
attributes.description: Foreign key reference to the parent purchase order header. Establishes the header-to-line relationship enabling multi-SKU PO tracking and partial fulfillment analysis. Mandatory for all line items. Aligns with TRANSACTION_LINE role category: HEADER_REFERENCE.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM Module — Purchase Order (EKPO/EKKO tables); ISO/IEC 11179

attributes.name: sku_id
attributes.description: Reference to the product/material master record for the item being procured on this line. Links to the Product Information Management System for catalog enrichment and attribute management. Aligns with TRANSACTION_LINE role category: RESOURCE_REFERENCE.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — Material Master (MARA/MARC); GS1 Global Product Classification

attributes.name: supplier_id
attributes.description: Reference to the supplier/vendor fulfilling this line item. Enables supplier-level performance analysis, lead time tracking, and vendor compliance monitoring within the procure-to-pay process.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — Vendor Master (LFA1); ISO 9001 Supplier Management

attributes.name: supplier_price_list_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to procurement.supplier_price_list. Business justification: A PO line item is priced based on the agreed supplier price list for that SKU. Linking po_line_item to supplier_price_list enables price variance analysis (po_line_item.price_variance_amount can be co

attributes.name: warehouse_location_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to inventory.warehouse_location. Business justification: PO line items specify a target storage location for putaway. storage_location_code is a denormalized reference to warehouse_location. Linking enables WMS-driven putaway routing and bin-level capacity

attributes.name: account_assignment_category
attributes.description: ERP account assignment category determining how the PO line item cost is posted in the general ledger (e.g., K=Cost Center, F=Order, P=Project, A=Asset, C=Sales Order, U=Unknown). Required for financial posting and SOX compliance.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — EKPO-KNTTP; SOX Section 302/404; IFRS IAS 16

attributes.name: actual_delivery_date
attributes.description: The actual date on which goods were received at the warehouse for this line item. Populated upon goods receipt posting in the WMS. Used for supplier on-time delivery performance measurement and lead time actuals.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — MKPF-BUDAT (Goods Receipt); WMS Receiving Module

attributes.name: confirmed_delivery_date
attributes.description: The delivery date confirmed by the supplier for this line item, as communicated via PO acknowledgement or supplier portal. Used for lead time analysis, on-time delivery KPI tracking, and logistics planning.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — EKPO-EINDT (confirmed); ANSI X12 EDI 855 PO Acknowledgement

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this PO line item record was first created in the source ERP system. Used for audit trail, data lineage, and procurement process timing analysis. Sourced from SAP S/4HANA change documents.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — CDHDR/CDPOS Change Documents; ISO 27001 Audit Logging; SOX Section 302

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the unit price and line total amount on this PO line (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP). Supports multi-currency procurement and FX reporting.
attributes.references: ISO 4217 Currency Codes; SAP S/4HANA MM — EKKO-WAERS; SOX Financial Reporting

attributes.name: delivery_lead_time_variance_days
attributes.description: Difference in calendar days between the confirmed delivery date and the actual delivery date for this line item. Positive value indicates late delivery; negative indicates early delivery. Key supplier on-time delivery (OTD) performance metric.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — Derived from EKPO dates; Supplier Performance Management (ISO 9001)

attributes.name: discount_percentage
attributes.description: Percentage discount negotiated with the supplier for this line item, applied to the gross unit price to arrive at the net unit price. Supports procurement cost analysis and vendor contract compliance monitoring.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — KONP-KBETR (Pricing Conditions); Supplier Contract Terms

attributes.name: final_delivery_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the supplier has confirmed this as the final delivery for this PO line item, closing it against further goods receipts. True = final delivery confirmed; False = further deliveries expected. Used to close open PO lines.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — EKPO-ELIKZ; Procurement Lifecycle Management

attributes.name: goods_receipt_amount
attributes.description: Total monetary value of goods received against this PO line (goods_receipt_quantity × unit_price). Used for inventory valuation, accrual accounting, and accounts payable liability recognition.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM/FI — MSEG-DMBTR; SOX Section 302/404; IFRS IAS 2 Inventories

attributes.name: goods_receipt_blocked_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether goods receipt posting is blocked for this PO line item (e.g., due to quality inspection hold, price discrepancy, or compliance issue). True = GR blocked; False = GR allowed. Used in WMS receiving workflows.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — EKPO-WEPOS/SPEME; WMS Quality Control; ISO 9001

attributes.name: goods_receipt_quantity
attributes.description: Total quantity of this line item received into the warehouse against this PO line. Populated from WMS goods receipt transactions. Used for partial fulfillment tracking, open quantity calculation, and 3-way invoice matching.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — MSEG-MENGE (Movement Type 101); WMS Receiving Module

attributes.name: incoterms_code
attributes.description: International Commercial Terms (Incoterms) code defining the delivery obligations, risk transfer point, and cost responsibilities between buyer and supplier for this line item. Critical for cross-border procurement and logistics cost allocation. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: EXW|FCA|CPT|CIP|DAP|DPU|DDP|FAS|FOB|CFR|CIF — 11 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]
attributes.references: ICC Incoterms 2020; SAP S/4HANA MM — EKKO-INCO1; WTO International Trade Regulations

attributes.name: invoice_verification_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether invoice verification (3-way match: PO vs. GR vs. invoice) has been completed for this line item. True = verified; False = pending verification. Used for accounts payable processing and payment release.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AP — EKPO-REPOS; SOX Section 302/404; PCI DSS (payment processing)

attributes.name: invoiced_amount
attributes.description: Total monetary value invoiced by the supplier for this PO line. Used for 3-way match variance analysis, accounts payable processing, and financial accrual reconciliation.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AP — RSEG-WRBTR; SOX Section 302/404; IFRS IAS 37

attributes.name: invoiced_quantity
attributes.description: Total quantity of this line item for which a supplier invoice has been received and matched. Used for 3-way match (PO quantity vs. GR quantity vs. invoice quantity), accounts payable processing, and payment settlement.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AP — RSEG-MENGE (Invoice Verification); SOX Section 302/404

attributes.name: item_description
attributes.description: Short description of the product or material being procured on this line, as captured at the time of PO creation. May differ from the current PIM catalog description if the product was updated after PO issuance.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — EKPO-TXZ01; ANSI X12 EDI 850

attributes.name: last_updated_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp of the most recent modification to this PO line item record in the source ERP system. Used for incremental data loading (ETL), change tracking, and audit compliance.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — CDHDR/CDPOS Change Documents; ISO 27001 Audit Logging; SOX Section 302

attributes.name: lead_time_days
attributes.description: Number of calendar days between PO issuance and expected delivery for this line item, as agreed with the supplier. Used for inventory replenishment planning, safety stock calculations, and supplier performance benchmarking.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — Purchase Info Record (EINE-WEBAZ); Supply Chain Planning Best Practices

attributes.name: line_number
attributes.description: Sequential line number within the parent purchase order, used to uniquely identify and order line items within a PO. Enables multi-SKU PO navigation and EDI interchange alignment. Aligns with TRANSACTION_LINE role category: LINE_SEQUENCE.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — EKPO-EBELP; ANSI X12 EDI 850 Purchase Order

attributes.name: line_status
attributes.description: Current workflow status of this purchase order line item. Tracks the lifecycle from open order through goods receipt, invoicing, and closure. Enables partial fulfillment monitoring and open PO reporting. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: open|partially_received|fully_received|invoiced|closed|cancelled — promote to reference product if additional statuses are needed]
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — EKPO-ELIKZ/EREKZ; ANSI X12 EDI 855 PO Acknowledgement

attributes.name: line_total_amount
attributes.description: Total monetary value of this line item (ordered_quantity × unit_price). Used for PO value tracking, budget commitment, accounts payable accruals, and financial reporting. Aligns with TRANSACTION_LINE role category: LINE_VALUE_OR_RESULT.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AP — EKPO-NETWR; SOX Section 302/404; ISO 21001

attributes.name: moq
attributes.description: The supplier's minimum order quantity requirement for this SKU as defined in the purchase info record or vendor contract. Used to validate moq_compliance_flag and support procurement planning decisions.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — Purchase Info Record (EINE-MINBM); Supplier Contract Terms

attributes.name: moq_compliance_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the ordered quantity on this line meets or exceeds the supplier's Minimum Order Quantity (MOQ) requirement. True = MOQ compliant; False = below MOQ threshold. Critical for supplier contract compliance and procurement workflow validation.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — Purchase Info Record (EINE-MINBM); Supplier Contract Terms

attributes.name: open_quantity
attributes.description: Remaining quantity yet to be received against this PO line (ordered_quantity minus goods_receipt_quantity). Supports open PO reporting, inventory replenishment monitoring, and supplier follow-up workflows.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — Derived from EKPO-MENGE minus EKPO-WEMNG; Procurement Analytics

attributes.name: ordered_quantity
attributes.description: Quantity of the SKU ordered on this line item as agreed with the supplier. Used for MOQ compliance validation, inventory replenishment planning, and partial fulfillment tracking. Aligns with TRANSACTION_LINE role category: LINE_QUANTITY.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — EKPO-MENGE; ISO 80000-1 Quantities and Units

attributes.name: plant_code
attributes.description: ERP plant or fulfillment center code to which this PO line item is being delivered. Identifies the receiving warehouse or distribution center in the fulfillment network. Used for inventory planning and logistics routing.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — EKPO-WERKS; WMS Facility Management

attributes.name: price_variance_amount
attributes.description: Monetary difference between the PO agreed unit price and the actual invoiced price for this line item. A key procurement KPI used for cost control, supplier negotiation analysis, and financial reporting under SOX.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA CO — Purchase Price Variance (PPV); SOX Section 302/404; IFRS IAS 2

attributes.name: rejection_reason_code
attributes.description: Standardized code indicating the reason a PO line item was rejected, cancelled, or blocked (e.g., quality failure, price discrepancy, supplier non-compliance). Used for procurement analytics and supplier performance management.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — EKPO-ABGRU; ISO 9001 Non-Conformance Management

attributes.name: requested_delivery_date
attributes.description: The date by which the buyer requests delivery of this line item from the supplier. Used for supply chain planning, inventory replenishment scheduling, and SLA monitoring. May differ from confirmed delivery date.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — EKPO-EINDT; ANSI X12 EDI 850 Purchase Order

attributes.name: source_system_code
attributes.description: Identifier of the operational source system from which this PO line item record was ingested (e.g., SAP_S4HANA_PROD, ERP_EU, ERP_US). Supports data lineage tracking, multi-system reconciliation, and Silver Layer provenance.
attributes.references: ISO 27001 Data Lineage; NIST Cybersecurity Framework — Identify Function; Databricks Lakehouse Data Governance

attributes.name: tax_amount
attributes.description: Calculated tax amount applicable to this PO line item based on the tax code and line total. Used for accounts payable tax accruals, VAT/GST reporting, and financial compliance.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AP — Tax Calculation; EU VAT Directive; SOX Section 302/404

attributes.name: tax_code
attributes.description: Tax determination code assigned to this PO line item, used to calculate applicable taxes (VAT, GST, sales tax) during invoice verification. Sourced from ERP tax configuration and required for financial compliance reporting.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI — EKPO-MWSKZ; EU VAT Directive; GDPR Article 5 (data minimization for tax records)

attributes.name: unit_of_measure
attributes.description: Standard unit of measure for the ordered quantity on this line (e.g., EA=Each, CS=Case, PK=Pack, KG=Kilogram, PAL=Pallet). Sourced from the ERP material master and used for WMS receiving and inventory allocation. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: EA|CS|PK|KG|LB|L|M|M2|M3|PAL|BOX|ROLL|SET|DOZ — 14 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — EKPO-MEINS; ISO 80000-1; UN/CEFACT Unit of Measure Codes

attributes.name: unit_price
attributes.description: Negotiated unit price for the SKU as agreed with the supplier on this PO line. Used for line total calculation, invoice matching (3-way match), and procurement cost analysis. Expressed in the PO currency.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — EKPO-NETPR; PCI DSS (financial data handling); SOX Section 302/404

products.name: vendor_contract
products.description: Master procurement contract governing the commercial relationship with a supplier, including full amendment and change order lifecycle. Captures contract type (framework/blanket/spot/consignment), contract number, effective and expiry dates, total contract value, currency, auto-renewal flag, payment terms, SLA commitments, penalty clauses, exclusivity terms, amendment history (change reason, effective date, revised terms, approver), and contract status (draft/active/amended/expired/terminated). Serves as the authoritative agreement record for procure-to-pay processes in SAP S/4HANA.

attributes.name: vendor_contract_id
attributes.description: Unique system-generated surrogate identifier for the vendor contract record in the procurement data product. Primary key for the vendor_contract entity.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM Module — Outline Agreement (ME31K/ME32K)

attributes.name: approver_agent_id
attributes.description: Reference to the employee who provided final authorization and approval for this contract or its most recent amendment. Supports SOX audit trail requirements for procurement authorization controls.
attributes.references: SOX Section 302/404 — Authorization Controls; SAP S/4HANA Workflow Approval

attributes.name: buyer_account_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to customer.account. Business justification: Required for B2B contract management reports linking each supplier contract to the buying customer.account.

attributes.name: buyer_contact_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to customer.contact. Business justification: B2B contract management requires identifying the specific buyer-side contact (procurement manager, category manager) who owns and is accountable for the vendor contract. vendor_contract has buyer_acco

attributes.name: category_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.category. Business justification: Vendor contracts in e-commerce procurement are scoped to product categories (e.g., electronics, apparel). Category managers need to identify active contracts governing their category for sourcing deci

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Vendor contracts are budget-controlled at cost center level. Procurement teams track which cost center owns contract spend for budget management, spend-against-budget reporting, and cost allocation. A

attributes.name: legal_entity_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.legal_entity. Business justification: Vendor contracts are executed by a specific legal entity — essential for legal compliance, VAT/tax obligations, intercompany accounting, and regulatory filings. In e-commerce with multi-entity structu

attributes.name: marketplace_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to marketplace.marketplace. Business justification: In multi-marketplace e-commerce platforms, vendor contracts are scoped to a specific marketplace (e.g., supplier contracted for US marketplace but not EU). This FK enables marketplace-specific contrac

attributes.name: seller_profile_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to seller.seller_profile. Business justification: Contract management: contracts are negotiated between a specific seller and a supplier; linking enables contract compliance and SLA reporting per seller.

attributes.name: supplier_id
attributes.description: Reference to the supplier/vendor party who is the counterparty to this contract. Links to the vendor master record in the procurement domain.

attributes.name: amendment_count
attributes.description: Total number of formal amendments (change orders) that have been executed against this contract since its original execution. Provides a quick indicator of contract stability and negotiation history. Incremented each time a change order is approved.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — Contract Change History; CIPS Contract Lifecycle Management

attributes.name: auto_renewal_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the contract is configured to automatically renew upon reaching its expiry date without requiring a new negotiation cycle. True = auto-renews; False = requires explicit renewal action. Critical for contract lifecycle management and budget planning.
attributes.references: CIPS Contract Lifecycle Management; SAP S/4HANA Scheduling Agreement Renewal

attributes.name: confidentiality_level
attributes.description: Data classification level assigned to this contract document indicating the sensitivity of its commercial terms and conditions. Restricted: highly sensitive strategic terms. Confidential: standard commercial terms not for external disclosure. Internal: accessible to all internal staff. Public: terms disclosed publicly (rare for vendor contracts).
attributes.references: ISO 27001 — Information Classification; GDPR Article 5 — Data Minimisation; NIST Cybersecurity Framework

attributes.name: contract_number
attributes.description: Externally-known, human-readable unique identifier for the vendor contract as assigned by the procurement or ERP system (e.g., SAP scheduling agreement or outline agreement number). Used in all vendor communications, purchase orders, and audit trails.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — Outline Agreement Number (EKKO.EBELN); ISO 9001 Procurement Documentation

attributes.name: contract_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle state of the vendor contract governing its operational validity. Draft: under internal review and not yet binding. Active: fully executed and in force. Amended: modified via change order but still active. Suspended: temporarily halted pending resolution. Expired: reached end date without renewal. Terminated: ended before expiry by either party.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — Release/Status Indicator; CIPS Contract Lifecycle Management

attributes.name: contract_title
attributes.description: Descriptive human-readable title or short name of the vendor contract (e.g., 'Annual Packaging Materials Supply Agreement FY2025'). Used for display in procurement dashboards and contract registers.
attributes.references: ISO 9001 Procurement Documentation; SAP S/4HANA EKKO.KDATB

attributes.name: contract_type
attributes.description: Classification of the procurement contract by commercial structure. Framework agreements establish terms for future orders; blanket purchase orders cover recurring purchases up to a ceiling value; spot contracts are one-time buys; consignment contracts allow inventory held at buyer premises billed on consumption; scheduled agreements define delivery schedules. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: framework|blanket|spot|consignment|scheduled — promote to reference product if additional types emerge]
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — Agreement Type (EKKO.BSART); CIPS Procurement Classification

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp when this vendor contract record was first created in the procurement system (SAP S/4HANA or data lakehouse). Represents the system-of-record creation time in ISO 8601 format with timezone offset. Used for audit trail and data lineage.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA EKKO.AEDAT; SOX Section 404 — Audit Trail; ISO 8601

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code in which the contract value, pricing, and payment obligations are denominated (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP). Required for multi-currency procurement and FX exposure reporting.
attributes.references: ISO 4217 Currency Codes; SAP S/4HANA EKKO.WAERS; PCI DSS — Financial Transaction Currency

attributes.name: delivery_location_code
attributes.description: Code identifying the designated delivery destination (warehouse, fulfillment center, or plant) where the vendor must deliver goods under this contract. Maps to the WMS facility or SAP S/4HANA plant/storage location.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — Plant (EKKO.WERKS); WMS Facility Master

attributes.name: dispute_resolution_method
attributes.description: The contractually agreed mechanism for resolving commercial disputes between the buyer and vendor (e.g., binding arbitration, mediation, or court litigation). Determines the legal process to follow in case of contract breach or disagreement.
attributes.references: ICC Arbitration Rules; WTO Dispute Settlement; UCC Article 2

attributes.name: effective_date
attributes.description: The date on which the vendor contract becomes legally binding and commercially effective. Marks the start of the contract period for SLA enforcement, payment terms, and procurement eligibility.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA EKKO.KDATB (Agreement Start Date); UCC Article 2 — Contract Formation

attributes.name: exclusivity_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this contract grants the vendor exclusive supply rights for the specified goods or services category, preventing the buyer from sourcing from competing vendors during the contract term. True = exclusive; False = non-exclusive.
attributes.references: FTC — Exclusive Dealing Arrangements; CIPS Supplier Relationship Management

attributes.name: exclusivity_scope
attributes.description: Free-text description of the scope of exclusivity when the exclusivity flag is True. Defines the product categories, geographic regions, or channels covered by the exclusive arrangement (e.g., 'Exclusive supplier of private-label packaging materials for APAC fulfillment centers').
attributes.references: FTC — Exclusive Dealing Arrangements; EU Electronic Commerce Directive

attributes.name: expiry_date
attributes.description: The date on which the vendor contract is scheduled to expire and cease to be binding, unless renewed or extended. Nullable for open-ended evergreen contracts. Used to trigger renewal workflows and compliance alerts.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA EKKO.KDATV (Agreement End Date); CIPS Contract Lifecycle Management

attributes.name: gdpr_dpa_flag
attributes.business_glossary_term: General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) Data Processing Agreement (DPA) Flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether a GDPR-compliant Data Processing Agreement (DPA) has been executed with this vendor, required when the vendor processes personal data on behalf of the company. True = DPA in place; False = DPA not required or not yet executed. Mandatory for GDPR Article 28 compliance.
attributes.references: GDPR Article 28 — Processor Obligations; CCPA Section 1798.100; ISO 27001

attributes.name: governing_law_country
attributes.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code identifying the jurisdiction whose laws govern the interpretation and enforcement of this contract (e.g., USA, GBR, DEU). Critical for cross-border procurement and dispute resolution.
attributes.references: ISO 3166-1 Alpha-3; WTO International Trade Regulations; GDPR Article 3 — Territorial Scope

attributes.name: incoterms_code
attributes.description: International Commercial Terms (Incoterms 2020) code defining the allocation of delivery costs, risks, and responsibilities between buyer and vendor. Governs logistics cost accounting and insurance obligations. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: EXW|FCA|CPT|CIP|DAP|DPU|DDP|FAS|FOB|CFR|CIF — promote to reference product]
attributes.references: ICC Incoterms 2020; SAP S/4HANA EKKO.INCO1; WTO International Trade Regulations

attributes.name: last_amendment_date
attributes.description: The date on which the most recent formal amendment or change order to this contract was executed and became effective. Null for contracts that have never been amended. Used to track contract evolution and trigger re-approval workflows.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — Contract Amendment History; SOX Section 404

attributes.name: last_amendment_reason
attributes.description: Free-text description of the business reason for the most recent contract amendment (e.g., 'Price adjustment due to raw material cost increase Q3 2025', 'Extended term by 12 months following supplier performance review'). Supports audit trail and change management documentation.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — Change Reason; SOX Section 302 — Change Documentation; CIPS Contract Management

attributes.name: lead_time_days
attributes.description: The contractually agreed number of calendar days from purchase order placement to expected delivery at the designated receiving location. Used in inventory replenishment planning, safety stock calculations, and WMS receiving scheduling.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — Planned Delivery Time (EINE.PLIFZ); APICS Supply Chain Dictionary

attributes.name: minimum_order_qty
attributes.description: The minimum quantity per purchase order that the vendor requires under this contract, as negotiated in the commercial terms. MOQ is a standard e-commerce and supply chain procurement metric used for inventory planning and replenishment decisions.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — Minimum Order Quantity (EINE.MINBM); CIPS Procurement Terms

attributes.name: moq_unit
attributes.business_glossary_term: Minimum Order Quantity (MOQ) Unit of Measure
attributes.description: Unit of measure applicable to the minimum order quantity (e.g., EA for each, CS for case, KG for kilogram, PAL for pallet). Follows ISO 80000 / UN/CEFACT unit codes as used in SAP S/4HANA.
attributes.references: UN/CEFACT Recommendation 20 — Units of Measure; SAP S/4HANA MEINS

attributes.name: nda_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether a Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) is in place with this vendor as part of or alongside this contract. True = NDA executed; False = no NDA. Relevant for IP protection, proprietary pricing, and technology sharing arrangements.
attributes.references: ISO 27001 — Confidentiality Agreements; GDPR Article 28 — Data Processing Agreements; NIST

attributes.name: payment_method
attributes.description: The agreed method by which payments to the vendor will be made under this contract. Bank transfer (ACH/wire) is most common for B2B procurement; letter of credit is used for international suppliers; open account for trusted long-term vendors.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AP — Payment Method (LFBK.ZWELS); PCI DSS — Payment Processing

attributes.name: payment_terms_code
attributes.description: Coded payment terms agreed with the vendor governing invoice due dates and early payment discounts (e.g., NET30, NET60, 2/10NET30 for 2% discount if paid within 10 days). Maps to SAP S/4HANA payment terms key (ZTERM) used in accounts payable processing.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AP — Payment Terms (T052.ZTERM); UCC Article 2 — Payment Terms

attributes.name: penalty_cap_amount
attributes.description: The maximum cumulative financial penalty amount (in contract currency) that can be levied against the vendor under this contract over its full term. Caps total liability exposure for both parties. Null when no penalty cap is defined.
attributes.references: CIPS Contract Management; UCC Article 2 — Limitation of Liability; SAP S/4HANA FI-AP

attributes.name: penalty_clause_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this contract contains financial penalty clauses for SLA breaches, late delivery, or quality failures. True = penalty clauses exist; False = no financial penalties defined. Drives penalty calculation workflows in accounts payable.
attributes.references: CIPS Contract Management; SAP S/4HANA FI-AP Penalty Processing; UCC Article 2

attributes.name: penalty_rate_pct
attributes.description: The contractually defined financial penalty rate expressed as a percentage of the affected order value or invoice amount, applied when the vendor breaches SLA commitments. Null when penalty_clause_flag is False.
attributes.references: CIPS Contract Management; SAP S/4HANA FI-AP; UCC Article 2 — Liquidated Damages

attributes.name: renewal_notice_days
attributes.description: Number of calendar days before the contract expiry date by which either party must provide written notice of intent to renew or terminate. Used to trigger automated procurement alerts and prevent unintended auto-renewals.
attributes.references: CIPS Contract Management Best Practice; SAP S/4HANA Contract Reminder Configuration

attributes.name: signed_date
attributes.description: The date on which the contract was formally executed (signed) by all authorized parties. May differ from the effective date when contracts are backdated or post-dated. Critical for legal enforceability and audit.
attributes.references: UCC Article 2; SOX Section 302 — Contract Execution Records

attributes.name: sla_defect_rate_pct
attributes.business_glossary_term: Service Level Agreement (SLA) Maximum Defect Rate Percentage
attributes.description: Contractually agreed maximum acceptable defect/rejection rate (as a percentage) for goods delivered under this contract. Exceeding this threshold constitutes an SLA breach and may trigger return merchandise authorization (RMA) processes and financial penalties.
attributes.references: CIPS SLA Framework; CPSC Product Safety Standards; ISO 9001 Quality Management

attributes.name: sla_fill_rate_pct
attributes.business_glossary_term: Service Level Agreement (SLA) Order Fill Rate Target Percentage
attributes.description: Contractually committed minimum order fill rate (as a percentage) representing the proportion of ordered quantity that the vendor must fulfill completely per shipment. A fill rate below this threshold triggers SLA breach notifications and potential penalties.
attributes.references: CIPS SLA Framework; APICS Supply Chain Dictionary — Fill Rate; ISO 9001

attributes.name: sla_on_time_delivery_pct
attributes.business_glossary_term: Service Level Agreement (SLA) On-Time Delivery Target Percentage
attributes.description: Contractually committed minimum on-time delivery rate (as a percentage) that the vendor must achieve. Measured as the percentage of purchase orders delivered on or before the agreed delivery date. Used for vendor performance scorecards and penalty clause triggers.
attributes.references: CIPS SLA Framework; SAP S/4HANA MM — Vendor Evaluation (ME61); ISO 9001 Supplier Performance

attributes.name: termination_date
attributes.description: The actual date on which the contract was terminated early, if applicable. Null for contracts that expired naturally or are still active. Distinct from expiry_date which is the scheduled end; this captures unplanned or negotiated early termination.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM — Contract Termination; UCC Article 2 — Contract Termination; CIPS

attributes.name: termination_reason
attributes.description: Coded reason for early contract termination. Mutual agreement: both parties agreed to end early. Vendor breach: vendor failed to meet contractual obligations. Buyer breach: buyer defaulted. Force majeure: unforeseeable external event. Regulatory: compliance or legal requirement. Convenience: buyer exercised termination for convenience clause.
attributes.references: UCC Article 2 — Contract Termination; CIPS Contract Management; SAP S/4HANA MM

attributes.name: total_contract_value
attributes.description: The total maximum committed monetary value of the vendor contract over its full term, expressed in the contract currency. For blanket/framework agreements this is the ceiling value; for spot contracts it is the fixed order value. Used for spend analytics, budget commitment tracking, and SOX financial controls.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA EKKO.KTWRT (Target Value); SOX Section 404 — Procurement Spend Controls; CIPS Spend Analysis

attributes.name: updated_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp of the most recent modification to this vendor contract record in the procurement system. Updated on every change including amendments, status transitions, and field updates. Used for incremental ETL processing and change data capture in the Databricks Silver layer.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA EKKO.AEDAT; SOX Section 404 — Audit Trail; ISO 8601; ETL Change Data Capture

products.name: goods_receipt
products.description: Transactional record capturing the full inbound lifecycle from supplier dispatch through physical receipt at a warehouse. Records ASN (Advance Shipment Notice) number, carrier, tracking number, origin location, destination warehouse, shipped and received quantities per SKU, unit of measure, batch/lot number, estimated and actual arrival dates, quality inspection status, discrepancy quantity, over/under delivery flag, freight cost, shipment status (in_transit/arrived/receiving_in_progress/completed/exception), and GR posting status. SSOT boundary: procurement owns inbound shipment tracking and GR posting; inventory domain owns post-receipt stock position updates. Triggers three-way match in accounts payable and inventory update in WMS.

attributes.name: goods_receipt_id
attributes.description: Unique surrogate identifier for the goods receipt record in the procurement domain. Primary key for this transactional entity. Entity Role: TRANSACTION_HEADER.
attributes.references: ISO 9001 - Quality Management Systems; SAP S/4HANA MM Module - Goods Receipt (MIGO/MIGO_GR)

attributes.name: carrier_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to logistics.carrier. Business justification: In e-commerce warehouse receiving, the carrier delivering supplier goods must be formally tracked for carrier performance scoring, freight claims, SLA compliance reporting, and dock scheduling. The ex

attributes.name: po_line_item_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to procurement.po_line_item. Business justification: A goods receipt record is tied to a specific PO line item for three-way match (PO line → GR → invoice). The existing FK to purchase_order covers the header level, but line-level traceability requires

attributes.name: purchase_order_id
attributes.description: Reference to the originating purchase order against which this goods receipt is posted. Enables three-way match (PO, GR, invoice) in accounts payable and ERP procure-to-pay workflow.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM - Purchase Order (ME21N); SOX Section 404 - Internal Controls

attributes.name: seller_profile_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to seller.seller_profile. Business justification: Inventory: goods receipt records must be tied to the seller whose inventory is being replenished for accurate stock and cost tracking.

attributes.name: sku_id
attributes.description: Reference to the specific SKU (Stock Keeping Unit) being received. Links to the product catalog for item-level identification, valuation, and inventory update in WMS.
attributes.references: PIM System - Product Master; GS1 - Global Trade Item Number (GTIN)

attributes.name: stock_position_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to inventory.stock_position. Business justification: Goods receipt directly updates a specific stock position (SKU+warehouse+lot). Inventory receiving workflow and on-hand quantity reconciliation require tracing which stock_position was incremented by e

attributes.name: supplier_id
attributes.description: Reference to the supplier (vendor) who dispatched the shipment. Used for supplier performance monitoring, compliance tracking, and accounts payable settlement. Maps to the Vendor Master in SAP S/4HANA.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM - Vendor Master (XK01); ISO 9001 - Supplier Evaluation

attributes.name: warehouse_location_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to inventory.warehouse_location. Business justification: Goods receipts are put away to a specific bin/shelf location. storage_location_code is a denormalized reference to warehouse_location. Linking enables WMS putaway routing, bin capacity validation, and

attributes.name: warehouse_node_id
attributes.description: Reference to the destination warehouse or fulfillment center where the inbound shipment is received. Drives WMS inventory allocation and put-away workflows.
attributes.references: WMS - Warehouse Master; SAP S/4HANA EWM - Storage Location

attributes.name: actual_arrival_date
attributes.description: Date the shipment physically arrived at the destination warehouse dock. Compared against estimated arrival date to calculate supplier on-time delivery performance (OTD KPI).
attributes.references: TMS - Proof of Delivery; SAP S/4HANA MM - Actual GR Date; ISO 9001 - Supplier Performance

attributes.name: asn_number
attributes.description: Advance Shipment Notice number provided by the supplier prior to dispatch. Used to pre-receive inventory in WMS, schedule dock appointments, and validate shipment contents against the PO. Format: ASN- followed by 10 digits.
attributes.references: EDI X12 856 - Ship Notice/Manifest; GS1 EDI Standards

attributes.name: batch_lot_number
attributes.description: Supplier-assigned batch or lot number for the received goods. Critical for traceability, recall management, FIFO inventory management, and quality inspection correlation. Mandatory for perishable, regulated, or serialized products.
attributes.references: ISO 9001 - Traceability; CPSC - Product Recall Traceability; SAP S/4HANA MM - Batch Management

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the goods receipt record was first created in the system. Audit trail field for data lineage, compliance reporting, and record lifecycle management.
attributes.references: ISO 27001 - Audit Logging; SOX Section 404 - Audit Trail; GDPR Article 5 - Data Integrity

attributes.name: customs_declaration_number
attributes.description: Customs entry or import declaration number assigned by customs authorities for cross-border shipments. Required for import duty reconciliation, trade compliance audit, and WTO regulatory reporting.
attributes.references: WTO - Customs Valuation Agreement; CBP - Entry Summary (CF-7501); EU Customs Code

attributes.name: delivery_note_number
attributes.description: Supplier-issued delivery note or packing slip number accompanying the physical shipment. Used for receiving verification, three-way match, and dispute resolution with the supplier.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM - Delivery Note (MIGO Reference); EDI X12 856 - Packing Slip

attributes.name: discrepancy_quantity
attributes.description: Net difference between quantity shipped (per ASN) and quantity received (physically counted). Positive value indicates shortage; negative value indicates overage. Used for supplier dispute resolution and accounts payable adjustment.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM - Goods Receipt Variance; ISO 9001 - Supplier Non-Conformance

attributes.name: estimated_arrival_date
attributes.description: Expected date of shipment arrival at the destination warehouse as communicated by the supplier or carrier via ASN. Used for dock scheduling, labor planning, and lead time performance measurement.
attributes.references: TMS - Estimated Time of Arrival (ETA); SAP S/4HANA MM - Planned Delivery Date

attributes.name: expiry_date
attributes.description: Expiration or best-before date of the received batch/lot, applicable for perishable, food, pharmaceutical, or time-sensitive products. Used for FIFO/FEFO inventory management and shelf-life compliance in WMS.
attributes.references: CPSC - Product Safety Standards; ISO 9001 - Shelf Life Management; WMS - FEFO Inventory Control

attributes.name: freight_cost
attributes.description: Total freight cost associated with the inbound shipment as invoiced by the carrier or allocated from the purchase order freight terms. Used for landed cost calculation, freight accrual in accounts payable, and procurement cost analysis.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM - Planned Delivery Costs; GAAP - Inventory Costing (ASC 330); Incoterms 2020

attributes.name: freight_currency_code
attributes.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code in which the freight cost is denominated (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP). Required for multi-currency freight reconciliation and FX conversion in SAP S/4HANA.
attributes.references: ISO 4217 - Currency Codes; SAP S/4HANA FI - Currency Management

attributes.name: gr_notes
attributes.description: Free-text notes recorded by the warehouse receiving team during the goods receipt process. Captures observations about shipment condition, packaging damage, partial delivery reasons, or special handling instructions not captured in structured fields.
attributes.references: WMS - Receiving Notes; ISO 9001 - Non-Conformance Documentation

attributes.name: gr_number
attributes.description: Externally-known business identifier for the goods receipt document, used in supplier communications, three-way match, and ERP posting. Corresponds to the Material Document number in SAP S/4HANA MM (MIGO). Format: GR- followed by 10 digits.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM - Material Document; ISO 9001 - Traceability

attributes.name: gr_posting_date
attributes.description: Accounting date on which the goods receipt is posted to the general ledger in SAP S/4HANA. Determines the financial period for inventory valuation and accounts payable accrual. Critical for period-end close and SOX compliance.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM - GR Posting Date (MIGO); SOX Section 404 - Financial Period Controls; GAAP - Revenue Recognition

attributes.name: gr_posting_status
attributes.description: ERP posting status of the goods receipt document in SAP S/4HANA. Indicates whether the GR has been financially posted to the general ledger, is pending, has been reversed, or is blocked pending quality inspection clearance. Triggers three-way match in accounts payable upon 'posted' status.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM - GR Posting (MIGO); SOX Section 404 - Procure-to-Pay Controls

attributes.name: incoterms_code
attributes.description: International Commercial Terms (Incoterms 2020) code defining the transfer of risk and freight responsibility between supplier and buyer. Determines who bears freight cost and at what point title transfers. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: EXW|FCA|CPT|CIP|DAP|DPU|DDP|FAS|FOB|CFR|CIF — promote to reference product]
attributes.references: ICC Incoterms 2020; WTO - International Trade; SAP S/4HANA MM - Incoterms

attributes.name: is_hazardous_material
attributes.description: Indicates whether the received goods are classified as hazardous materials (HazMat) requiring special handling, storage, and transportation compliance. Triggers HazMat receiving protocols in WMS and regulatory reporting.
attributes.references: OSHA HazCom Standard 29 CFR 1910.1200; DOT 49 CFR - Hazardous Materials Regulations; ISO 9001

attributes.name: is_over_delivery
attributes.description: Indicates whether the quantity received exceeds the quantity ordered on the purchase order, beyond the configured over-delivery tolerance. Triggers procurement workflow for approval or return-to-supplier action.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM - Over-Delivery Tolerance (MIGO); ISO 9001 - Procurement Controls

attributes.name: is_under_delivery
attributes.description: Indicates whether the quantity received falls below the quantity ordered on the purchase order, beyond the configured under-delivery tolerance. May trigger a follow-up delivery or partial invoice processing in accounts payable.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM - Under-Delivery Tolerance (MIGO); ISO 9001 - Procurement Controls

attributes.name: origin_country_code
attributes.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code of the shipment origin. Required for customs declarations, import duty calculations, and trade compliance reporting under WTO regulations.
attributes.references: ISO 3166-1 Alpha-3 - Country Codes; WTO - Rules of Origin; CBP - Customs and Border Protection

attributes.name: origin_location
attributes.description: Supplier dispatch location or origin facility from which the shipment was sent. May be a supplier warehouse address, factory location, or 3PL origin hub. Used for logistics planning, lead time analysis, and customs documentation.
attributes.references: TMS - Origin Location; WTO - International Trade Documentation

attributes.name: quality_inspection_status
attributes.description: Status of the quality inspection performed upon receipt of goods. Determines whether inventory can be released to available stock in WMS. 'conditionally_accepted' indicates partial acceptance with documented deviations. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: not_required|pending|in_progress|passed|failed|conditionally_accepted — promote to reference product]
attributes.references: ISO 9001 - Incoming Inspection; SAP S/4HANA QM - Inspection Lot; CPSC - Product Safety Standards

attributes.name: quantity_ordered
attributes.description: Quantity of the SKU originally ordered on the purchase order line. Baseline for over/under delivery calculation and three-way match validation in accounts payable.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM - PO Quantity; ISO 9001 - Procurement Controls

attributes.name: quantity_received
attributes.description: Actual quantity of the SKU physically counted and accepted at the destination warehouse during the receiving process. Posted to WMS inventory and used for GR document creation in SAP S/4HANA.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM - GR Quantity (MIGO); WMS - Receiving Confirmation

attributes.name: quantity_rejected
attributes.description: Quantity of the SKU rejected during quality inspection due to damage, non-conformance, or specification failure. Drives Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA) creation and supplier debit note processing.
attributes.references: ISO 9001 - Non-Conforming Product; SAP S/4HANA QM - Usage Decision; RMA Process

attributes.name: quantity_shipped
attributes.description: Quantity of the SKU declared by the supplier on the Advance Shipment Notice (ASN) as dispatched. Used to identify pre-receipt discrepancies between ordered and shipped quantities.
attributes.references: EDI X12 856 - ASN Quantity; SAP S/4HANA MM - Delivery Quantity

attributes.name: receiving_complete_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the physical receiving process was completed and the GR document was confirmed in WMS. Used to calculate dock-to-stock cycle time and warehouse throughput metrics.
attributes.references: WMS - Receiving Completion; SAP S/4HANA MM - GR Confirmation Timestamp

attributes.name: receiving_start_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the physical receiving process was initiated at the warehouse dock. Used to measure receiving cycle time, dock-to-stock time KPI, and WMS labor productivity.
attributes.references: WMS - Receiving Process Timestamp; ISO 9001 - Process Efficiency Metrics

attributes.name: shipment_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle state of the inbound shipment from supplier dispatch through GR completion. Drives operational workflows in WMS and TMS. Values: in_transit (carrier has picked up), arrived (at dock), receiving_in_progress (WMS receiving active), completed (GR posted), exception (discrepancy or damage identified).
attributes.references: WMS - Inbound Shipment Lifecycle; TMS - Shipment Tracking

attributes.name: supplier_invoice_reference
attributes.description: Supplier-provided invoice number associated with this goods receipt, used to link the GR to the corresponding accounts payable invoice for three-way match processing and payment settlement.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-AP - Invoice Verification (MIRO); SOX Section 404 - AP Controls

attributes.name: three_way_match_status
attributes.description: Status of the three-way match process between the purchase order, goods receipt, and supplier invoice in accounts payable. 'matched' enables automatic invoice payment; 'exception' requires manual review. Critical for SOX procure-to-pay controls.
attributes.references: SOX Section 404 - Procure-to-Pay Internal Controls; SAP S/4HANA FI-AP - Three-Way Match; GAAP

attributes.name: tracking_number
attributes.description: Carrier-assigned tracking number for the inbound shipment. Used to monitor shipment progress in TMS and correlate with carrier proof-of-delivery documentation.
attributes.references: TMS - Shipment Tracking; GS1 - Serial Shipping Container Code (SSCC)

attributes.name: unit_of_measure
attributes.description: Unit of measure in which shipped and received quantities are expressed (e.g., EA=Each, CS=Case, PK=Pack, KG=Kilogram, PAL=Pallet). Must align with the PO unit of measure for accurate three-way match and inventory valuation. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: EA|CS|PK|KG|LB|L|M|M2|M3|PAL — 10 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]
attributes.references: ISO 80000 - Quantities and Units; SAP S/4HANA MM - Unit of Measure; GS1 Standards

attributes.name: updated_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the goods receipt record was last modified. Used for change tracking, data synchronization between WMS and ERP, and audit compliance.
attributes.references: ISO 27001 - Audit Logging; SOX Section 404 - Change Management; GDPR Article 5 - Data Integrity

products.name: supplier_invoice
products.description: Supplier-submitted invoice record for goods or services delivered, owned by procurement for three-way match validation (PO/GR/invoice) and discrepancy resolution. Captures invoice number, invoice date, supplier reference, PO reference, invoiced amount, tax amount, currency, payment due date, three-way match status, discrepancy reason, approval status, and payment block flag. SSOT boundary: procurement owns invoice receipt, validation, and match status; finance domain owns payment posting, GL entry, and cash disbursement. Integrates with SAP S/4HANA MIRO for AP invoice verification.

attributes.name: supplier_invoice_id
attributes.description: Unique surrogate identifier for the supplier invoice record in the procurement data platform. Primary key for the supplier_invoice data product.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MIRO - AP Invoice Verification

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Supplier invoice expense must be charged to a cost center for budgeting and variance analysis; replaces denormalized codes.

attributes.name: general_ledger_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.general_ledger. Business justification: Links each supplier invoice to the GL account for proper posting, required by the accounts payable workflow.

attributes.name: goods_receipt_id
attributes.description: Reference to the Goods Receipt (GR) document confirming physical receipt of goods or services. Required for three-way match validation (PO/GR/Invoice). Maps to MIGO goods receipt posting in SAP S/4HANA.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MIGO - Goods Receipt; WMS Receiving Module

attributes.name: payment_transaction_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to payment.payment_transaction. Business justification: AP disbursement tracking: when a supplier invoice is paid, the outgoing payment transaction records the disbursement. Finance teams reconcile supplier_invoice against payment_transaction to confirm pa

attributes.name: purchase_order_id
attributes.description: Reference to the originating Purchase Order (PO) against which this invoice is submitted. Central to three-way match validation — the PO defines the agreed quantities, prices, and terms that the invoice must reconcile against.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA ME21N - Purchase Order; ISO 6422

attributes.name: seller_profile_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to seller.seller_profile. Business justification: Finance: invoices are issued to sellers for goods received; linking supports accounts payable and tax reporting per seller.

attributes.name: supplier_id
attributes.description: Reference to the supplier (vendor) who submitted this invoice. Links to the supplier master record for vendor details, payment terms, and compliance status.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Vendor Master (LFA1); ERP Procurement Module

attributes.name: approval_status
attributes.description: Current state of the invoice in the procurement approval workflow. Distinct from invoice_status which tracks the full lifecycle; approval_status specifically tracks the authorization decision required before payment release. ESCALATED indicates the invoice has been routed to a higher approval authority due to amount threshold or discrepancy.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Workflow (SWI); SOX Section 302 - Financial Controls

attributes.name: approved_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the invoice was approved (or rejected) by the designated approver in the procurement workflow. Critical for SLA (Service Level Agreement) measurement of invoice processing cycle time and SOX audit trail.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Workflow SWI; SOX Section 302; COSO Internal Controls

attributes.name: bank_account_reference
attributes.description: Masked or tokenized reference to the supplier's bank account designated for payment of this invoice. Stored as a reference token rather than raw account number to comply with PCI DSS. Full banking details are maintained in the secure vendor master.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Vendor Bank Details (LFBK); PCI DSS v4.0 Section 3; SOX Section 404

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when the supplier invoice record was first created in the procurement data platform. Serves as the audit trail creation marker and is used for invoice aging calculations from receipt date. Aligns with RECORD_AUDIT_CREATED category requirement.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA CPUDT/CPUTM; SOX Section 404; ISO 27001 - Audit Logging

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code in which the invoice is denominated (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP). Required for multi-currency AP processing and foreign exchange revaluation. Maps to SAP S/4HANA MIRO WAERS currency key.
attributes.references: ISO 4217 - Currency Codes; SAP S/4HANA WAERS; GDPR Article 5

attributes.name: discount_amount
attributes.description: Cash discount amount available if payment is made within the early payment discount period as defined by the payment terms. Supports working capital optimization and dynamic discounting programs. Maps to SAP S/4HANA SKFBT cash discount base amount.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA SKFBT; ERP Procurement Module; SOX Section 404

attributes.name: discount_due_date
attributes.description: The deadline by which payment must be made to qualify for the early payment discount specified in the payment terms. After this date, the full gross_amount is due by payment_due_date.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Payment Terms ZTERM; ERP Procurement Module

attributes.name: discrepancy_amount
attributes.description: Monetary value of the discrepancy between the invoiced amount and the expected amount based on PO and GR. Quantifies the financial exposure of the mismatch for prioritization of resolution and escalation decisions.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MIRO Tolerance Keys; SOX Section 404 - AP Controls

attributes.name: discrepancy_reason
attributes.description: Free-text description of the specific discrepancy identified during three-way match validation or manual review. Provides context for resolution workflow, supplier dispute management, and audit trail. Populated when three_way_match_status is FAILED or PARTIAL_MATCH.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MIRO; COSO Internal Controls Framework; SOX Section 404

attributes.name: discrepancy_type
attributes.description: Classification of the discrepancy identified during three-way match validation. PRICE_VARIANCE: invoiced unit price differs from PO price beyond tolerance; QUANTITY_VARIANCE: invoiced quantity exceeds GR quantity; MISSING_GR: no goods receipt found; DUPLICATE_INVOICE: invoice number already processed; INCORRECT_PO: PO reference invalid or mismatched; TAX_MISMATCH: tax amount inconsistency.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MIRO Tolerance Keys; COSO Internal Controls Framework; SOX Section 404

attributes.name: exchange_rate
attributes.description: Foreign currency exchange rate applied to convert the invoice currency to the company's functional/local currency at the time of invoice posting. Relevant for cross-border supplier invoices. Maps to SAP S/4HANA MIRO KURSF exchange rate field.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MIRO KURSF; ISO 4217; SOX Section 404 - FX Controls

attributes.name: fiscal_period
attributes.description: The fiscal accounting period (month) within the fiscal year in which the invoice is posted. Two-digit format (01-12). Used for monthly accruals, period-end AP aging, and financial close reporting. Maps to SAP S/4HANA MONAT posting period.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MONAT; SOX Section 404; GAAP/IFRS Period Reporting

attributes.name: fiscal_year
attributes.description: The fiscal year in which the invoice is posted for accounting and financial reporting purposes. Used for period-end close, budget consumption tracking, and SOX-compliant financial reporting. Maps to SAP S/4HANA GJAHR fiscal year field.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA GJAHR; SOX Section 404; GAAP/IFRS Financial Reporting

attributes.name: functional_currency_amount
attributes.description: Gross invoice amount converted to the company's functional (local) currency using the exchange_rate at posting time. Used for GL posting, financial reporting, and SOX-compliant AP ledger entries in the finance domain.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MIRO DMBTR; SOX Section 404; IFRS IAS 21 - Effects of Changes in Foreign Exchange Rates

attributes.name: gross_amount
attributes.description: Total invoice amount inclusive of all taxes and charges (net_amount + tax_amount). Represents the total liability to be settled with the supplier. Used for AP aging, cash flow forecasting, and payment run in SAP S/4HANA.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MIRO WRBTR Gross; ISO 4217; SOX Section 404

attributes.name: invoice_category
attributes.description: Business category of the goods or services being invoiced. GOODS: physical merchandise; SERVICES: professional or managed services; FREIGHT: logistics and shipping charges; UTILITIES: energy, water, telecom; CAPEX: capital expenditure items; INTERCOMPANY: invoices between related entities. Used for spend analytics and GL account determination.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Account Assignment Category; ERP Procurement Module; SOX Section 404

attributes.name: invoice_date
attributes.description: The date printed on the supplier's invoice document, representing the date the supplier issued the invoice. Used as the principal business event date for payment due date calculation and aging analysis. Distinct from the system receipt date.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MIRO BLDAT; ISO 6422 - Layout of Trade Documents

attributes.name: invoice_number
attributes.description: Externally-assigned invoice number as submitted by the supplier on the invoice document. Used as the primary business identifier for three-way match (Purchase Order/Goods Receipt/Invoice) validation and AP correspondence. Maps to MIRO BELNR field in SAP S/4HANA.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MIRO; ISO 6422 - Layout of Trade Documents

attributes.name: invoice_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle state of the invoice within the procurement AP verification workflow. RECEIVED: invoice logged; UNDER_REVIEW: validation in progress; MATCHED: three-way match successful; DISCREPANCY: match failed; APPROVED: cleared for payment; REJECTED: invoice rejected; PAID: payment disbursed; CANCELLED: voided. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: RECEIVED|UNDER_REVIEW|MATCHED|DISCREPANCY|APPROVED|REJECTED|PAID|CANCELLED — promote to reference product]
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MIRO Workflow Status; SOX Section 404 - AP Controls

attributes.name: invoice_type
attributes.description: Classification of the invoice document type. STANDARD: regular goods/services invoice; CREDIT_NOTE: supplier-issued credit reducing liability; DEBIT_NOTE: additional charge from supplier; PRO_FORMA: preliminary invoice for customs/planning; RECURRING: periodic service invoice.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Invoice Document Types; ISO 6422

attributes.name: net_amount
attributes.description: The invoiced amount for goods or services before tax, representing the base payable amount. Used as the primary monetary value for PO price comparison in three-way match. Part of the monetary triplet (net_amount + tax_amount = gross_amount).
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MIRO WRBTR; ISO 4217 Currency Standards; SOX Section 404

attributes.name: payment_block_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the invoice has been blocked from payment processing. True when a payment block is active due to discrepancy, pending approval, compliance hold, or manual block. Maps to SAP S/4HANA payment block indicator (ZLSPR) on the AP document. Finance domain uses this flag to exclude the invoice from payment run.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MIRO ZLSPR Payment Block; SOX Section 404 - AP Controls

attributes.name: payment_due_date
attributes.description: The date by which payment must be made to the supplier to comply with agreed payment terms and avoid late payment penalties. Derived from invoice date and supplier payment terms but stored explicitly for operational payment scheduling and cash flow planning.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Payment Terms (ZTERM); SOX Section 404 - AP Controls

attributes.name: payment_method
attributes.description: The payment instrument or method designated for settling this invoice. ACH: Automated Clearing House bank transfer; WIRE: international wire transfer; CHECK: paper check; VIRTUAL_CARD: single-use virtual procurement card; DYNAMIC_DISCOUNT: early payment via supply chain finance program. Informs the payment run configuration in SAP S/4HANA.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA Payment Method (ZLSCH); PCI DSS v4.0 - Payment Controls; ERP Procurement Module

attributes.name: payment_terms_code
attributes.description: Code identifying the agreed payment terms for this invoice (e.g., NET30, NET60, 2/10NET30 for early payment discount). Determines the payment due date and any applicable early payment discount. Maps to SAP S/4HANA ZTERM payment terms key.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA ZTERM Payment Terms; ERP Procurement Module

attributes.name: receipt_date
attributes.description: The date the invoice was physically or electronically received by the procurement team. Used to calculate payment due dates based on payment terms and to measure invoice processing cycle time. Maps to MIRO BUDAT (posting date) in SAP S/4HANA.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MIRO BUDAT; FTC Consumer Protection Standards

attributes.name: rejection_reason
attributes.description: Free-text explanation provided by the approver when the invoice is rejected. Used for supplier communication, dispute resolution, and process improvement analytics. Populated only when approval_status is REJECTED.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MIRO; FTC Consumer Protection Standards; ERP Procurement Module

attributes.name: sap_document_number
attributes.description: The SAP S/4HANA accounting document number (BELNR) generated upon posting of the invoice in MIRO. Serves as the cross-reference key between the procurement data product and the finance domain's AP ledger and GL entries. Null until the invoice is posted in SAP.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MIRO BELNR; SOX Section 404 - AP Audit Trail

attributes.name: source_system
attributes.description: The originating system or channel through which the invoice was received and entered into the procurement platform. SAP_MIRO: direct SAP AP verification entry; EDI: Electronic Data Interchange automated feed; SUPPLIER_PORTAL: self-service supplier submission; EMAIL: email-based invoice receipt; MANUAL: manual data entry by AP team.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MIRO; EDI X12 810 Invoice Standard; ERP Procurement Module

attributes.name: supplier_reference_number
attributes.description: Supplier's own internal reference or order number associated with this invoice, as provided by the vendor. Used for supplier reconciliation, dispute resolution, and EDI (Electronic Data Interchange) matching with supplier systems.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MIRO XBLNR External Reference; EDI X12 810 Invoice Standard

attributes.name: tax_amount
attributes.description: Total tax amount charged on the invoice, including VAT, GST, or applicable sales tax as specified by the supplier. Used for tax reconciliation and input tax credit recovery. Maps to SAP S/4HANA MIRO WMWST tax amount field.
